<h2>Change history</h2>
<ul>
<li>2026-03-26: Initial writing. Agent YAML definition and ACP event schema driven.</li>
<li>2026-03-26: Advanced reverse engineering. 6-source loading pipeline based on <code>spawn-sync-_parse.js</code>, SKILL.md/Command frontmatter Zod schema, inode+name deduplication, caching, semantic search indexing, token-limited rendering, allowed-tools alias normalization, plugin manifest schema, skill preservation during context compression, and analysis of all telemetry events at the source code level.</li>
</ul>
<h2>Korean corpus (reference)</h2>
<blockquote>
<p>Verbatim KO corpus <code>004_skill-system/04_cp_skill.md</code> for cross-check; code blocks unchanged.</p>
</blockquote>
<h1>Copilot CLI 스킬 시스템 역공학 분석</h1>
<blockquote>
<p><strong>분석 스냅샷</strong>: <code>151_copilot_cli/</code> — agent skill YAML definitions.</p>
</blockquote>
<blockquote>
<p>⚠️ <strong>역공학 분석</strong>: <code>spawn-sync-_parse.js</code>(718줄, 전체 스킬 로딩 파이프라인), <code>slash-tips-prohibited-name-description-location-skill-help-clear-skills-available.js</code>(302줄, Skill 도구 정의와 <code>&#x3C;available_skills></code> 렌더링), <code>workspace-context.js</code>(1197줄, <code>formatInvokedSkills()</code> 컨텍스트 압축), <code>skill-invocation-telemetry.js</code>(83줄, 텔레메트리), <code>skill-index-builder.js</code>(16줄, 시맨틱 검색 인덱싱), <code>workspace-context__1025.js</code>(ACP 이벤트 스키마), <code>slash-off.js</code>(UI 스킬 표시), 그리고 <code>definitions/*.agent.yaml</code>(원본 에이전트 정의)에 기반한다.</p>
</blockquote>
<p>Copilot CLI의 스킬 시스템은 <strong>6-소스 스킬 로더 + YAML 에이전트 정의 + Skill 도구 + 플러그인 매니페스트</strong>가 통합된 구조다. 5개의 선언적 <code>.agent.yaml</code> 파일이 서브에이전트로 기능하면서, 동시에 SKILL.md 기반 사용자 스킬과 <code>.claude/commands/</code> 기반 커맨드가 같은 파이프라인에서 로딩되어 <code>&#x3C;available_skills></code> XML 블록으로 모델에 노출된다.</p>
<p>Claude Code와의 핵심 차이는 <strong>스킬과 커맨드가 완전히 분리된 스키마</strong>를 갖되 같은 로딩 파이프라인을 거친다는 점이다. Codex가 policy/dependency/interface를 분리한 메타 패키지라면, Copilot CLI는 SKILL.md frontmatter에 모든 것을 집약하면서도 <strong>플러그인 매니페스트</strong> 계층을 통해 제3자 확장을 정의한다.</p>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">graph TD
    subgraph Sources["6-Source Root 해석 (mBt)"]
        P1[".github/skills/"]
        P2[".agents/skills/"]
        P3[".claude/skills/"]
        PC["$COPILOT_CONFIG/skills/"]
        PCL["~/.claude/skills/"]
        ENV["COPILOT_SKILLS_DIRS"]
        PLG["plugin.json → skills paths"]
    end

    subgraph Scopes["Source 분류"]
        P1 --> |"project/inherited"| PROJ
        P2 --> |"project/inherited"| PROJ["project"]
        P3 --> |"project/inherited"| PROJ
        PC --> |"personal-copilot"| PERS["personal"]
        PCL --> |"personal-claude"| PERS
        ENV --> |"custom"| CUST["custom"]
        PLG --> |"plugin"| PLS["plugin"]
    end

    subgraph Loading["로딩 파이프라인 (Nhe)"]
        PROJ --> SCAN["SKILL.md 스캔"]
        PERS --> SCAN
        CUST --> SCAN
        PLS --> SCAN
        SCAN --> PARSE["frontmatter 파싱 (Eir)"]
        PARSE --> DEDUP["inode 중복 제거 + 이름 중복 제거"]
    end

    subgraph Commands["커맨드 로딩"]
        CMD1[".claude/commands/*.md"] --> CMDPARSE["커맨드 파싱 (kNs)"]
        CMD2["~/.claude/commands/*.md"] --> CMDPARSE
        CMDPARSE --> DEDUP
    end

    DEDUP --> RESULT["{ skills, warnings, errors }"]

    subgraph Consumption["소비 경로"]
        RESULT --> TOOL["Skill 도구&#x3C;br/>(&#x3C;available_skills> 렌더링)"]
        RESULT --> IDX["시맨틱 검색 인덱싱&#x3C;br/>(buildSkillIndex)"]
        RESULT --> TEL["텔레메트리&#x3C;br/>(skills_loaded)"]
        RESULT --> UI["TUI 스킬 표시&#x3C;br/>(/skills 커맨드)"]
    end
</code></pre>
<hr>
<h2>6-Source 스킬 로딩 파이프라인</h2>
<h3>Root 해석 — <code>mBt()</code> 함수</h3>
<p><code>mBt()</code> 함수가 프로젝트 루트, 커스텀 디렉터리, config 디렉터리, 플러그인 경로, cwd를 받아 스킬 루트 목록을 조합한다. 이 함수는 각 루트에 <code>source</code> 필드를 부여하여 스킬의 출처를 추적한다.</p>
<pre><code class="language-javascript">// spawn-sync-_parse.js — mBt() (재구성)
function buildSkillRoots(projectRoot, customDirs = [], configDir, pluginRoots = [], cwd) {
  const projectRoots = [
    ...resolveProjectSkillPaths(".github", "skills", projectRoot, cwd),  // project/inherited
    ...resolveProjectSkillPaths(".agents", "skills", projectRoot, cwd),  // project/inherited
    ...resolveProjectSkillPaths(".claude", "skills", projectRoot, cwd),  // project/inherited
  ];
  const personalRoots = [
    { path: path.join(getConfigDir(configDir, "config"), "skills"), source: "personal-copilot" },
    { path: path.join(os.homedir(), ".claude", "skills"),           source: "personal-claude" },
  ];
  const customRoots = [...(process.env["COPILOT_SKILLS_DIRS"]?.split(",").filter(Boolean) ?? []), ...customDirs]
    .map(dir => dir.trim()).filter(Boolean)
    .map(dir => ({ path: dir, source: "custom" }));

  return [...projectRoots, ...personalRoots, ...pluginRoots, ...customRoots]
    .filter(root => existsSync(root.path));
}
</code></pre>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>source</th>
<th>의미</th>
<th>경로</th>
<th>텔레메트리 카테고리</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><code>project</code></td>
<td>현재 프로젝트 루트의 스킬</td>
<td><code>.github/skills/</code>, <code>.agents/skills/</code>, <code>.claude/skills/</code></td>
<td>project</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>inherited</code></td>
<td>프로젝트 상위 디렉터리에서 상속된 스킬</td>
<td>cwd→home 사이의 같은 디렉터리 패턴</td>
<td>inherited</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>personal-copilot</code></td>
<td>Copilot 전역 개인 스킬</td>
<td><code>$COPILOT_CONFIG/skills/</code></td>
<td>personal (합산)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>personal-claude</code></td>
<td>Claude 호환 개인 스킬</td>
<td><code>~/.claude/skills/</code></td>
<td>personal (합산)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>plugin</code></td>
<td>플러그인 매니페스트에서 선언된 스킬</td>
<td><code>plugin.json</code>의 <code>skills</code> 경로</td>
<td>plugin</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>custom</code></td>
<td>환경변수나 CLI로 추가된 스킬</td>
<td><code>COPILOT_SKILLS_DIRS</code> 환경변수</td>
<td>custom</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<h3>상속 탐색 — <code>fDe()</code> (resolveProjectSkillPaths)</h3>
<p>프로젝트 루트부터 cwd의 상위 디렉터리까지 탐색하며 <code>.github/skills/</code>, <code>.agents/skills/</code>, <code>.claude/skills/</code>를 찾는다. <strong>첫 번째 히트는 <code>project</code>, 나머지는 <code>inherited</code>로 분류</strong>된다:</p>
<pre><code class="language-javascript">// spawn-sync-_parse.js — S7e() (재구성)
function resolveProjectSkillPaths(prefix, skillsDir, projectRoot, cwd) {
  if (cwd) {
    return walkUpDirs(cwd, skillsDir, prefix, os.homedir())
      .map((path, index) => ({
        path,
        source: index === 0 ? "project" : "inherited",
      }));
  }
  return projectRoot ? [{ path: path.join(projectRoot, prefix, skillsDir), source: "project" }] : [];
}
</code></pre>
<h3>스킬 파싱 — <code>Eir()</code> (parseSkillFile)</h3>
<p>각 <code>SKILL.md</code>에 대해 frontmatter를 파싱하고 스킬 객체를 생성한다:</p>
<pre><code class="language-javascript">// spawn-sync-_parse.js — Eir() (재구성)
async function parseSkillFile(filePath, source, pluginName, pluginVersion) {
  const content = await fs.readFile(filePath, "utf-8");
  const parsed = parseFrontmatter(content, { schema: SkillFrontmatterSchema, onUnsupportedFields: "ignore" });
  if (parsed.kind === "error") return parsed;

  const name = (parsed.value.frontmatter.name ?? deriveNameFromDir(filePath))?.replace(/\s+/g, "-");
  const description = parsed.value.frontmatter.description ?? firstThreeLines(parsed.value.body);
  const allowedTools = parsed.value.frontmatter["allowed-tools"]
    ?.split(",").map(t => t.trim()).filter(Boolean);
  const userInvocable = parsed.value.frontmatter["user-invocable"] !== false;
  const disableModelInvocation = parsed.value.frontmatter["disable-model-invocation"] === true;

  return {
    kind: "success",
    value: {
      name, description, source, filePath,
      baseDir: path.dirname(filePath),
      allowedTools, content,
      userInvocable, disableModelInvocation,
      pluginName, pluginVersion,
    },
  };
}
</code></pre>
<h3>중복 제거</h3>
<p>로딩 시 <strong>두 단계 중복 제거</strong>를 수행한다:</p>
<ol>
<li><strong>inode 기반</strong>: <code>realpathSync()</code>로 심볼릭 링크를 해소하고, 같은 inode의 파일은 건너뜀</li>
<li><strong>이름 기반</strong>: 같은 이름의 스킬이 이미 로딩되었으면 뒤의 것을 무시 (먼저 발견된 것이 우선)</li>
</ol>
<pre><code class="language-javascript">// spawn-sync-_parse.js — Nhe() 핵심 (재구성)
const seenInodes = new Set();
const seenNames = new Set();
for (const root of roots) {
  const skillFile = path.join(root.path, "SKILL.md");
  if (existsSync(skillFile)) {
    const realpath = realpathSync(skillFile);
    if (realpath &#x26;&#x26; seenInodes.has(realpath)) continue;
    const result = await parseSkillFile(skillFile, root.source, ...);
    if (result.kind === "success" &#x26;&#x26; !seenNames.has(result.value.name)) {
      realpath &#x26;&#x26; seenInodes.add(realpath);
      seenNames.add(result.value.name);
      skills.push(result.value);
    }
  }
}
</code></pre>
<h3>캐싱</h3>
<p>로딩 결과는 <strong>JSON key 기반 메모이제이션 캐시</strong>에 저장된다. 캐시 키는 <code>projectRoot</code>, <code>customDirs</code>, <code>configDir</code>, <code>envSkillDirs</code>, <code>cwd</code>, <code>additionalSourcePaths</code> 등을 JSON serialize한 값이다. <code>iG()</code>(clearCache) 호출 시 세대 카운터가 증가하며 캐시가 무효화된다.</p>
<hr>
<h2>SKILL.md Frontmatter 스키마</h2>
<p>Copilot CLI의 SKILL.md frontmatter 스키마는 Zod로 엄격하게 정의된다:</p>
<pre><code class="language-javascript">// spawn-sync-_parse.js — cBt (SkillFrontmatterSchema, 재구성)
const SkillFrontmatterSchema = z.object({
  name: z.string().trim()
    .regex(/^[a-zA-Z0-9][a-zA-Z0-9._\- ]*$/)
    .max(64, "Skill name must be at most 64 characters")
    .optional(),
  description: z.string()
    .max(1024, "Skill description must be at most 1024 characters")
    .optional(),
  "allowed-tools": z.union([z.string(), z.array(z.string())])
    .transform(v => Array.isArray(v) ? v.join(", ") : v)
    .optional(),
  "user-invocable": z.boolean().optional().default(true),
  "disable-model-invocation": z.boolean().optional().default(false),
});
</code></pre>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>필드</th>
<th>타입</th>
<th>기본값</th>
<th>설명</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><code>name</code></td>
<td>string (max 64)</td>
<td>부모 디렉터리명</td>
<td>스킬 이름, 공백은 <code>-</code>로 치환</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>description</code></td>
<td>string (max 1024)</td>
<td>본문 첫 3줄 (max 1024자)</td>
<td>스킬 설명</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>allowed-tools</code></td>
<td>string | string[]</td>
<td>없음</td>
<td>자동 승인 도구 목록</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>user-invocable</code></td>
<td>boolean</td>
<td><code>true</code></td>
<td>사용자 직접 호출 가능 여부</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>disable-model-invocation</code></td>
<td>boolean</td>
<td><code>false</code></td>
<td>모델의 Skill 도구 호출 차단</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<h3>allowed-tools 정규화</h3>
<p><code>allowed-tools</code> 값은 도구 별칭(alias) 테이블을 거쳐 정규화된다:</p>
<pre><code class="language-javascript">// slash-tips-prohibited-name-description-location-skill-help-clear-skills-available.js — Har (재구성)
const TOOL_ALIASES = {
  bash:          { kind: "shell", argument: null },
  shell:         { kind: "shell", argument: null },
  write:         { kind: "write", argument: null },
  edit:          { kind: "write", argument: null },
  create:        { kind: "write", argument: null },
  memory:        { kind: "memory", argument: null },
  store_memory:  { kind: "memory", argument: null },
  // 다음은 read-only이므로 규칙 없이 무시됨
  read: null, view: null, glob: null, grep: null, ls: null,
  task: null, webfetch: null, web_fetch: null, websearch: null, web_search: null,
};
</code></pre>
<p><code>edit</code>는 <code>write</code>로, <code>bash</code>는 <code>shell</code>로 정규화되고, <code>read</code>/<code>view</code>/<code>glob</code>/<code>grep</code> 등 읽기 전용 도구는 규칙 없이 묵시적 허용된다. 괄호 형식 인자도 지원된다: <code>shell(mkdir)</code>, <code>write(/path/to/file)</code>.</p>
<h3>커맨드 스키마</h3>
<p><code>.claude/commands/*.md</code> 파일은 별도 스키마를 사용하며, <code>isCommand: true</code>로 표시되고 <code>user-invocable</code>은 항상 <code>true</code>다:</p>
<pre><code class="language-javascript">// spawn-sync-_parse.js — IBt (CommandFrontmatterSchema, 재구성)
const CommandFrontmatterSchema = z.object({
  name: z.string().trim().regex(/^[a-zA-Z0-9][a-zA-Z0-9._\- ]*$/).max(64).optional(),
  description: z.string().max(1024).optional(),
  "allowed-tools": /* 동일 */,
  "disable-model-invocation": z.boolean().optional().default(false),
  // user-invocable 없음 — 커맨드는 항상 사용자 호출 가능
});
</code></pre>
<hr>
<h2>Skill 도구 — 모델이 스킬을 호출하는 경로</h2>
<h3>도구 정의 (Yar)</h3>
<p>Skill 도구의 description은 <code>&#x3C;skills_instructions></code>와 <code>&#x3C;available_skills></code> XML 블록을 포함한다:</p>
<pre><code class="language-javascript">// slash-tips-prohibited-name-description-location-skill-help-clear-skills-available.js — Yar() (재구성)
function buildSkillToolDescription(skills) {
  return `Execute a skill within the main conversation

&#x3C;skills_instructions>
When users ask you to perform tasks, check if any of the available skills below can help...

Important:
- When a skill is relevant, you must invoke this tool IMMEDIATELY as your first action
- When a skill matches the user's request, this is a BLOCKING REQUIREMENT:
  invoke the relevant Skill tool BEFORE generating any other response
- NEVER just announce or mention a skill in your text response without actually calling this tool
- Only use skills listed in &#x3C;available_skills> below unless the user explicitly requests a skill by name
- If the user explicitly asks to invoke a skill by name that is not listed, invoke it anyway
- Do not invoke a skill that is already running
- Do not use this tool for built-in CLI commands (like /help, /clear, etc.)
&#x3C;/skills_instructions>

&#x3C;available_skills>
${renderSkillCatalog(skills)}
&#x3C;/available_skills>`;
}
</code></pre>
<h3>토큰 제한 렌더링 — <code>JZs()</code></h3>
<p><code>&#x3C;available_skills></code> 블록은 <strong>문자 수 제한</strong>(기본 15,000자, <code>SKILL_CHAR_BUDGET</code> 환경변수로 조정)을 적용한다:</p>
<pre><code class="language-javascript">// slash-tips-prohibited-name-description-location-skill-help-clear-skills-available.js — JZs() (재구성)
function renderSkillCatalog(skills) {
  if (skills.length === 0) return "No skills available.";
  const maxChars = getSkillCharBudget();  // 기본 15000
  let rendered = [], charCount = 0;
  for (const skill of skills) {
    const xml = renderSingleSkill(skill);
    if (charCount + xml.length + 1 > maxChars) break;
    charCount += xml.length + 1;
    rendered.push(xml);
  }
  const overflow = skills.length > rendered.length
    ? `\n&#x3C;!-- Showing ${rendered.length} of ${skills.length} skills due to token limits -->`
    : "";
  return rendered.join("\n") + overflow;
}
</code></pre>
<h3>개별 스킬 렌더링 — <code>TZs()</code></h3>
<pre><code class="language-xml">&#x3C;skill>
  &#x3C;name>pdf&#x3C;/name>
  &#x3C;description>Read, create, edit, and review PDF files&#x3C;/description>
  &#x3C;location>project&#x3C;/location>  &#x3C;!-- source → "project" | "user" | "plugin" | "custom" -->
&#x3C;/skill>
</code></pre>
<p><code>source</code>는 <code>yir()</code> 함수로 단순화된다: <code>project</code>/<code>inherited</code> → <code>"project"</code>, <code>personal-copilot</code>/<code>personal-claude</code> → <code>"user"</code>, <code>plugin</code> → <code>"plugin"</code>, <code>custom</code> → <code>"custom"</code>.</p>
<hr>
<h2>시맨틱 검색 인덱싱</h2>
<p><code>buildSkillIndex()</code> 함수가 스킬 description을 시맨틱 검색 엔진에 등록한다:</p>
<pre><code class="language-javascript">// skill-index-builder.js (재구성)
async function buildSkillIndex(searchEngine, skills) {
  const entries = [];
  for (const skill of skills) {
    if (skill.description?.trim().length > 0) {
      entries.push({
        id: `skill:${skill.name}`,
        text: skill.description,
        metadata: { source: "skill", toolName: skill.name },
      });
    }
  }
  if (entries.length > 0) await searchEngine.addEntries(entries);
}
</code></pre>
<p>이 인덱싱 덕분에 사용자가 "PDF 변환" 같은 자연어를 입력하면, 스킬 description과의 시맨틱 유사도로 관련 스킬을 찾을 수 있다. <strong>이 기능은 Codex/Gemini CLI/OpenCode/Claude Code 어디에도 없는 Copilot CLI 고유 기능이다.</strong></p>
<hr>
<h2>컨텍스트 압축 시 스킬 보존 — <code>formatInvokedSkills()</code></h2>
<p>컨텍스트가 모델 토큰 한도에 접근하면 <code>CompactionProcessor</code>가 대화를 요약한다. 이때 활성 스킬은 특별 보존된다:</p>
<pre><code class="language-javascript">// workspace-context.js — HZs()/formatInvokedSkills() (재구성)
function formatInvokedSkills(skills) {
  if (!skills || skills.length === 0) return "";
  const latest = skills[skills.length - 1];   // 최근 스킬: 전문 포함
  const previous = skills.slice(0, -1);        // 이전 스킬: 경로만

  const lines = [];
  lines.push(`## Most recent skill: ${latest.name}`);
  lines.push(`Path: ${latest.path}`);
  lines.push("");
  lines.push("Continue to follow these instructions:");
  lines.push("");
  lines.push(latest.content);

  if (previous.length > 0) {
    lines.push("");
    lines.push("## Previously used skills");
    lines.push("These skills were used earlier in the session. Re-read the skill file if you need to reactivate one:");
    for (const skill of previous) {
      lines.push(`- ${skill.name}: ${skill.path}`);
    }
  }
  return `\n\n&#x3C;invoked_skills>\n${lines.join("\n")}\n&#x3C;/invoked_skills>`;
}
</code></pre>
<p><code>CompactionProcessor</code>는 <code>getInvokedSkills</code> 콜백을 생성자에서 받고, 압축된 요약 메시지에 <code>&#x3C;invoked_skills></code> 블록을 삽입한다. <strong>최근 스킬만 전문이 보존되고, 이전 스킬은 이름과 경로만 남는다.</strong> 이는 Claude Code의 동일 패턴과 정확히 일치한다.</p>
<hr>
<h2>텔레메트리 이벤트</h2>
<h3><code>skill_invoked</code> — 스킬 호출 시</h3>
<pre><code class="language-javascript">// skill-invocation-telemetry.js — buildSkillInvokedEvent() (재구성)
{
  kind: "skill_invoked",
  properties: {
    event_id: event.id,
    skill_name_hash: hashValue(event.data.name),  // 해시된 이름
    has_allowed_tools: String(hasAllowedTools),
  },
  restrictedProperties: {
    skill_name: event.data.name,       // 원본 이름 (restricted)
    skill_path: event.data.path,
    plugin_name: event.data.pluginName,
    plugin_version: event.data.pluginVersion,
  },
  metrics: {
    skill_content_length: event.data.content.length,
    allowed_tools_count: event.data.allowedTools?.length ?? 0,
  },
}
</code></pre>
<h3><code>skills_loaded</code> — 스킬 전체 로딩 완료 시</h3>
<pre><code class="language-javascript">// skill-invocation-telemetry.js — buildSkillSummaryEvent() (재구성)
{
  kind: "skills_loaded",
  metrics: {
    total_skill_count: skills.length,
    project_skill_count: sourceCount["project"],
    inherited_skill_count: sourceCount["inherited"],
    personal_skill_count: sourceCount["personal-copilot"] + sourceCount["personal-claude"],
    plugin_skill_count: sourceCount["plugin"],
    custom_skill_count: sourceCount["custom"],
    command_count: commandCount,              // isCommand === true 개수
    user_invocable_count: userInvocableCount,
    model_invocation_disabled_count: modelDisabledCount,
    skill_error_count: errors.length,
    skill_warning_count: warnings.length,
  },
  restrictedProperties: {
    skill_details: JSON.stringify(skills.map(s => ({
      name, description, source, filePath,
      pluginName, pluginVersion, allowedTools,
      userInvocable, disableModelInvocation, isCommand,
    }))),
    skill_errors: JSON.stringify(errors),
    skill_warnings: JSON.stringify(warnings),
  },
}
</code></pre>
<hr>
<h2>플러그인 매니페스트와 스킬 통합</h2>
<h3>plugin.json 스키마</h3>
<p>플러그인은 <code>.plugin/plugin.json</code>, <code>./plugin.json</code>, <code>.github/plugin/plugin.json</code>, <code>.claude-plugin/plugin.json</code> 중 하나에 매니페스트를 정의한다:</p>
<pre><code class="language-javascript">// spawn-sync-_parse.js — TNs (Plugin Manifest Schema, 재구성)
const PluginManifest = z.object({
  name: z.string().regex(/^[a-zA-Z0-9-]+$/).max(64),
  source: PluginSource,  // github repo, url, local path, marketplace
  description: z.string().max(1024).optional(),
  version: z.string().optional(),
  author: z.object({ name: z.string(), email: z.string().email().optional(), url: z.string().url().optional() }).optional(),
  skills: PluginPathSpec,        // string | string[] | { paths, exclusive }
  commands: PluginPathSpec,
  agents: PluginPathSpec,
  hooks: z.union([z.string(), z.record(z.any())]).optional(),
  mcpServers: z.union([z.string(), z.record(z.any())]).optional(),
  lspServers: z.union([z.string(), z.record(z.any())]).optional(),
  outputStyles: z.union([z.string(), z.array(z.string())]).optional(),
  logo: z.string().optional(),
  strict: z.boolean().default(true),
});
</code></pre>
<p><code>skills</code> 필드의 <code>PluginPathSpec</code>는 세 가지 형태를 지원한다:</p>
<ul>
<li><code>"skills"</code> → 단일 경로</li>
<li><code>["skills", "custom-skills"]</code> → 복수 경로</li>
<li><code>{ paths: ["skills"], exclusive: true }</code> → exclusive이면 기본 <code>skills/</code> 디렉터리를 제외</li>
</ul>
<h3>경로 변수 치환</h3>
<p>플러그인 내부 경로에서 <code>${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}</code>와 <code>${PLUGIN_ROOT}</code>가 플러그인 루트 절대 경로로 치환된다. <strong>경로 탈출 방지</strong>: <code>resolve()</code> 후 플러그인 디렉터리 바깥의 경로는 에러를 발생시킨다.</p>
<h3>마켓플레이스</h3>
<p>플러그인 소스는 네 가지 타입을 지원한다:</p>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>타입</th>
<th>형식</th>
<th>예시</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><code>github</code></td>
<td><code>owner/repo</code> 또는 <code>owner/repo:path</code></td>
<td><code>jun/my-skill:skills</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>url</code></td>
<td><code>https://...</code></td>
<td><code>https://github.com/...</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>local</code></td>
<td><code>./path</code> 또는 <code>/abs/path</code></td>
<td><code>./my-local-plugin</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>marketplace</code></td>
<td><code>plugin-name@marketplace</code></td>
<td><code>pdf-tools@copilot-marketplace</code></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

<h2>에이전트 YAML 정의 (서브에이전트 = 스킬 프리셋)</h2>
<h3>전체 에이전트 프로파일</h3>
<p>5개의 <code>.agent.yaml</code> 파일이 각각 독립 서브에이전트로 기능한다:</p>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>속성</th>
<th>Task</th>
<th>Explore</th>
<th>Research</th>
<th>Code Review</th>
<th>Configure</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><strong>모델</strong></td>
<td>claude-haiku-4.5</td>
<td>claude-sonnet-4.5</td>
<td>claude-sonnet-4.5</td>
<td>claude-sonnet-4.5</td>
<td>claude-haiku-4.5</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>도구</strong></td>
<td><code>"*"</code></td>
<td><code>"*"</code></td>
<td><code>"*"</code></td>
<td><code>"*"</code> (읽기만)</td>
<td>bash,view,edit,create,glob,grep,mcp_validate,mcp_reload</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>Custom Instructions</strong></td>
<td>❌</td>
<td>❌</td>
<td>❌</td>
<td>❌</td>
<td>❌</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>Environment Context</strong></td>
<td>❌</td>
<td>❌</td>
<td>❌</td>
<td>❌</td>
<td>✅</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>핵심 규칙</strong></td>
<td>성공=1줄, 실패=전문</td>
<td>코드 고고학자</td>
<td>검증 단계 포함</td>
<td>코드 수정 금지</td>
<td>mcp_validate 필수</td>
</tr>
<tr>

<td><code>{{cwd}}</code></td>

<td><code>{{configDir}}</code>,<code>{{cwd}}</code>,<code>{{mcpSchema}}</code>,<code>{{serverNamePattern}}</code></td>

</table>
<h3>YAML 구조 상세</h3>
<pre><code class="language-yaml"># 공통 구조
name: &#x3C;internal-name>
displayName: &#x3C;human-readable-name>
description: &#x3C;skill description for model selection>
model: &#x3C;model-id>
contexts:                     # 선택적, 추가 컨텍스트 주입
  - cli
tools:                        # 사용 가능한 도구
  - "*"                       # 전체 도구 또는 명시적 목록
promptParts:                  # 시스템 메시지 구성 요소 토글
  includeAISafety: true
  includeToolInstructions: true
  includeParallelToolCalling: true
  includeCustomAgentInstructions: false
  includeEnvironmentContext: false
prompt: |                     # 에이전트 전용 프롬프트
  ...
</code></pre>
<p><code>promptParts</code> 토글 시스템은 에이전트별로 시스템 프롬프트의 구성 요소를 선택적으로 포함/제외할 수 있게 한다. 5개 에이전트 모두 <code>includeCustomAgentInstructions: false</code>로 설정되어 사용자 커스텀 인스트럭션이 서브에이전트에는 전달되지 않는다.</p>
<hr>
<h2>ACP 이벤트 스키마</h2>
<h3>skill.invoked</h3>
<pre><code class="language-javascript">// workspace-context__1025.js — skill.invoked Zod 스키마
var skillInvoked = BaseEvent.extend({
  type: literal("skill.invoked"),
  data: object({
    name: string().describe("Name of the invoked skill"),
    path: string().describe("File path to the SKILL.md definition"),
    content: string().describe("Full content of the skill file, injected into conversation"),
    allowedTools: array(string()).optional()
      .describe("Tool names that should be auto-approved when this skill is active"),
    pluginName: string().optional().describe("Name of the plugin this skill originated from"),
    pluginVersion: string().optional().describe("Version of the plugin"),
  }),
});
</code></pre>
<h3>subagent.selected / subagent.deselected</h3>
<pre><code class="language-javascript">// workspace-context__1025.js
var subagentSelected = BaseEvent.extend({
  type: literal("subagent.selected"),
  data: object({
    agentName: string().describe("Internal name"),
    agentDisplayName: string().describe("Human-readable name"),
    tools: array(string()).nullable().describe("Available tools, or null for all"),
  }),
});

var subagentDeselected = BaseEvent.extend({
  type: literal("subagent.deselected"),
  data: object({}).describe("Empty payload; returns to default agent"),
});
</code></pre>
<h3>session.skills_loaded</h3>
<p>세션 초기화 시 로딩된 스킬 목록을 보고하는 이벤트다 (<code>workspace-context__1025.js:3420</code>).</p>

<p>로딩 에러가 있으면 <code>"The following skills failed to load:"</code> 메시지와 함께 에러 목록을 표시한다.</p>

<h2>종합 시퀀스 다이어그램</h2>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">sequenceDiagram
    participant User as 사용자
    participant CLI as Copilot CLI
    participant Loader as Skill Loader (Nhe)
    participant FS as 파일 시스템
    participant Index as Semantic Index
    participant Tool as Skill 도구
    participant Model as LLM
    participant Tel as Telemetry

    Note over CLI: 세션 시작
    CLI->>Loader: loadSkills()
    Loader->>Loader: mBt() → 6-source root 목록
    loop 각 root
        Loader->>FS: SKILL.md 스캔
        FS-->>Loader: SKILL.md 파일
        Loader->>Loader: Eir() → frontmatter 파싱 + Zod 검증
        Loader->>Loader: inode/이름 중복 제거
    end
    loop .claude/commands/*.md
        Loader->>FS: *.md 스캔
        FS-->>Loader: 커맨드 파일
        Loader->>Loader: kNs() → 커맨드 파싱
    end
    Loader-->>CLI: { skills, warnings, errors }
    CLI->>Tel: skills_loaded 이벤트

    CLI->>Index: buildSkillIndex(skills)
    Note over Index: description → 시맨틱 검색 엔진

    CLI->>Tool: Skill 도구 정의에 &#x3C;available_skills> 주입
    Note over Tool: 토큰 제한 렌더링 (max 15000자)

    User->>Model: "PDF를 만들어줘"
    Model->>Tool: Skill({ skill: "pdf" })
    Tool->>Tel: skill_invoked 이벤트
    Tool-->>Model: 스킬 본문 주입

    Note over CLI: 컨텍스트 한도 접근 시
    CLI->>CLI: CompactionProcessor.startBackgroundCompaction()
    CLI->>CLI: formatInvokedSkills() → &#x3C;invoked_skills> 블록
    Note over CLI: 최근 스킬=전문, 이전 스킬=경로만
</code></pre>
<hr>
<h2>비교 분석</h2>
<h3>Copilot CLI 스킬의 독창적 요소</h3>
<ol>
<li><strong>6-source 로딩</strong>: <code>.github/skills/</code>, <code>.agents/skills/</code>, <code>.claude/skills/</code> 3개 프로젝트 경로 + Copilot/Claude 개인 경로 + 환경변수 + 플러그인으로 가장 다양한 소스를 지원</li>
<li><strong>시맨틱 검색 인덱싱</strong>: description을 벡터 검색 엔진에 등록하여 자연어 매칭 — 다른 에이전트에 없는 고유 기능</li>
<li><strong>토큰 제한 렌더링</strong>: <code>SKILL_CHAR_BUDGET</code>으로 <code>&#x3C;available_skills></code> 크기를 제어하여 프롬프트 오버플로 방지</li>
<li><strong>플러그인 매니페스트</strong>: <code>plugin.json</code>으로 skills/commands/agents/hooks/mcpServers/lspServers를 통합 선언</li>
<li><strong>allowed-tools 별칭 정규화</strong>: <code>edit</code>→<code>write</code>, <code>bash</code>→<code>shell</code> 등 도구 별칭 매핑</li>
<li><strong>상속 탐색</strong>: cwd→home까지 계층적으로 <code>.github/.agents/.claude</code> 스킬을 탐색</li>
<li><strong>커맨드와 스킬의 통합</strong>: <code>.claude/commands/*.md</code>가 <code>isCommand: true</code> 스킬로 로딩됨</li>
</ol>

<h2>변경 기록</h2>
<ul>
<li>2026-03-26: 초기 작성. 에이전트 YAML 정의와 ACP 이벤트 스키마 중심.</li>
<li>2026-03-26: 역공학 심화. <code>spawn-sync-_parse.js</code> 기반 6-source 로딩 파이프라인, SKILL.md/Command frontmatter Zod 스키마, inode+이름 중복 제거, 캐싱, 시맨틱 검색 인덱싱, 토큰 제한 렌더링, allowed-tools 별칭 정규화, 플러그인 매니페스트 스키마, 컨텍스트 압축 시 스킬 보존, 텔레메트리 이벤트 전체를 소스 코드 수준에서 분석.</li>

1e:["$","$L2d","20-axis-04-skill",{"id":"20-axis-04-skill","order":26,"tier":"deep","title":"Axis 04: Skill system","description":"004_skill-system/04_cp_skill.md","lang":"en","badge":"AXIS","children":["$","div",null,{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"$45"}}]}]
46:Td917,<h2>Overview</h2>
<p><strong>Axis 05: Subagents</strong> — developer-depth section from the codex corpus. Structural highlights extracted from the analysis:</p>
<ul>
<li>
<blockquote>
<p><strong>분석 스냅샷</strong>: <code>151_copilot_cli/</code> — subagent/collaboration dispatch.</p>
</blockquote>
</li>
<li>
<ol>
<li><strong>로컬 서브에이전트 (ACP 이벤트 기반)</strong>: 5개 YAML 에이전트가 <code>subagent.started/completed/failed</code> 이벤트로 생명주기를 관리하며, trajectory writer가 XML 태그(<code>&#x3C;subagent name="..."></code>)로 실행 기록을 파일에 스트리밍한다.</li>
</ol>
</li>
<li>
<ol start="2">
<li><strong>원격 위임 (Remote Delegation)</strong>: <code>bgt</code> 클래스(RemoteDelegationManager)가 5단계 상태 머신으로 GitHub Copilot 서버에 작업을 위임하고, PR 생성·추적·폴링까지 자동화한다.</li>
</ol>
</li>
<li>
<ol start="3">
<li><strong>서브에이전트 텔레메트리</strong>: 4단계 이벤트(<code>selected</code>, <code>started</code>, <code>completed</code>, <code>failed</code>)가 <code>agent_name_hash</code> 해시로 에이전트 이름을 익명화하여 수집된다.</li>
</ol>
</li>
<li>
<blockquote>

var subagentStarted = BaseEvent.extend({
  type: literal("subagent.started"),
  data: object({
    toolCallId: string().describe("Parent tool call that spawned this sub-agent"),
    agentName: string().describe("Internal name"),
    agentDisplayName: string().describe("Human-readable name"),
    agentDescription: string().describe("What the sub-agent does"),
  }),
});

var subagentCompleted = BaseEvent.extend({
  type: literal("subagent.completed"),
  data: object({
    toolCallId: string(), agentName: string(), agentDisplayName: string(),
  }),
});

var subagentFailed = BaseEvent.extend({
  type: literal("subagent.failed"),
  data: object({
    toolCallId: string(), agentName: string(), agentDisplayName: string(),
    error: string().describe("Error message"),
  }),
});
</code></pre>
<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-javascript">// slash-subagent.js — tlt 클래스 (재구성)
class TrajectoryWriter {
  toolCalls = {};           // 진행 중인 tool call 추적
  trajectoryOutputFile;     // 출력 파일 경로
  trajectoryStream;         // fs.createWriteStream
  trajectoryFormatter;      // XML 포매터

  constructor(logger, outputFile) {
    this.logger = logger;
    this.trajectoryOutputFile = outputFile;
    this.initTrajectoryOutputFileIfNeeded();
  }

  // 세션 경계 처리 (핵심 메서드)
  async progress(event) {
    if (isSessionBoundary(event)) {
      let { sessionBoundaryType, agentName, agentId } = event;
      let idAttr = agentId ? ` id="${agentId}"` : "";

      if (sessionBoundaryType === "start")
        this.writeToTrajectoryFile(`\n&#x3C;subagent name="${agentName}"${idAttr}>`);
      else if (sessionBoundaryType === "end")
        this.writeToTrajectoryFile("&#x3C;/subagent>");
      else {
        let errorMsg = event.error ? `: ${event.error}` : "";
        this.writeToTrajectoryFile(
          `&#x3C;/subagent name="${agentName}" status="failed"${errorMsg}>`
        );
      }
      return;
    }

    // LLM 메시지 처리
    if (isMessage(event)) {
      if (isAssistantMessage(event)) {
        // content + reasoning_text 기록
        if (event.message.content) this.handleAssistantMessageWithContent(event.message.content);
        if (event.message.reasoning_text) this.handleAssistantMessageWithContent(event.message.reasoning_text);
        if (hasToolCalls(event)) this.handleAssistantToolCalls(event.message.tool_calls);
      } else if (isToolResult(event)) {
        this.handleToolCallId(event.message.tool_call_id, event.message.content);
      }
    }
  }
}
</code></pre>
<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-xml">&#x3C;!-- 서브에이전트 시작 -->
&#x3C;subagent name="code-reviewer" id="tc_abc123">

&#x3C;!-- assistant 메시지 -->
[포매팅된 assistant 메시지]

&#x3C;!-- 도구 호출 -->
[포매팅된 도구 호출]

&#x3C;!-- 도구 결과 -->
[포매팅된 도구 결과]

&#x3C;!-- 서브에이전트 완료 -->
&#x3C;/subagent>

&#x3C;!-- 실패 시 -->
&#x3C;/subagent name="code-reviewer" status="failed": Error message here>
</code></pre>
<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-javascript">// subagent-telemetry.js — 해시 기반 익명화
properties: {
  event_id: t.id,
  tool_call_id: t.data.toolCallId,
  agent_name_hash: hashString(t.data.agentName),  // 이름 자체는 해시
},
restrictedProperties: {
  agent_name: t.data.agentName,                    // 제한된 파이프라인에만 전송
  agent_display_name: t.data.agentDisplayName,
}

<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-javascript">// remote-delegation.js — bgt (RemoteDelegationManager, 축약)
class RemoteDelegationManager {
  state = null;
  onStateChangeCallback = null;
  onSessionCompleteCallback = null;
  timeoutId = null;
  pollingIntervalId = null;
  initialAuthInfo;
  authInfo;
  logger;
  integrationId;

  // Stage 1: Git 상태 검증
  async checkUncommittedChanges() {
    // 1. Git 저장소 확인 (findGitRoot)
    // 2. Remote 목록 확인 (getGitRemotes)
    // 3. 인증 호스트 일치 검증
    //    authHost !== repoInfo.repositoryHost → 에러
    // 4. 병렬 검증: detached HEAD, 저장소 접근, Copilot 상태
    // 5. 변경사항 확인 (staged, unstaged, untracked 카운트)
  }

  // Stage 2: 위임 확인 데이터 로드
  async loadDelegationConfirmationData() {
    // remote 선택, 저장소 정보 로드
    // → repository, repositoryHost, baseBranch, headBranch, asyncBranch
  }

  // Stage 3: 위임 작업 실행
  async executeDelegationOperations() {
    let operations = this.buildOperationsList();
    // [commit?, create-branch?, summarize-context, start-job, check-job, wait-for-session]
    for (let op of operations) {
      switch (op.id) {
        case "commit":        // Git commit 생성 (checkpoint commit)
        case "create-branch": // async 브랜치 생성 + push + 복귀
        case "summarize-context": // LLM으로 대화 컨텍스트 요약
        case "start-job":    // GitHub API로 원격 작업 생성
        case "check-job":    // PR 정보 폴링 (최대 90초)
        case "wait-for-session": // 세션 in_progress 대기 (최대 90초)
      }
    }
  }

  // Stage 4: 작업 추적 (적응형 폴링)
  async startJobTracking() {
    this.pollingIntervalId = setInterval(async () => {
      let session = await checkSessionStatus({...});
      // PR 상세 갱신 (파일 목록 최대 10개)
      // 유휴 상태에서 폴링 간격 점진적 증가 (1초 → 30초)
    }, 1000);
  }

  // Stage 5: 위임 완료
  completeDelegationOperation() {
    // Job ID, Session ID, PR URL, Commit Hash, Branch, Final State 로깅
  }
}
</code></pre>

  let intervals = Math.floor(elapsed / 300_000);  // 5분마다

<h2>Main analysis</h2>
<h1>Copilot CLI subagent/collaborative reverse engineering analysis</h1>
<blockquote>
<p><strong>Analysis Snapshot</strong>: <code>151_copilot_cli/</code> — subagent/collaboration dispatch.</p>
</blockquote>
<p>Subagent/collaboration in Copilot CLI consists of <strong>three independent mechanisms</strong>:</p>
<ol>
<li><strong>Local subagent (ACP event-based)</strong>: Five YAML agents manage the life cycle with <code>subagent.started/completed/failed</code> events, and the trajectory writer streams execution history to a file with XML tags (<code>&#x3C;subagent name="..."></code>).</li>
<li><strong>Remote Delegation</strong>: The <code>bgt</code> class (RemoteDelegationManager) delegates tasks to the GitHub Copilot server with a 5-step state machine and automates PR creation, tracking, and polling.</li>
<li><strong>Subagent telemetry</strong>: Level 4 events (<code>selected</code>, <code>started</code>, <code>completed</code>, <code>failed</code>) are collected by anonymizing the agent name with the <code>agent_name_hash</code> hash.</li>
</ol>
<blockquote>
<p>⚠️ <strong>Based on decompilation analysis</strong>: <code>deobfuscated/src/app/core/slash-subagent.js</code> (176 lines, trajectory writer), <code>deobfuscated/src/app/mcp/subagent-telemetry.js</code> (60 lines, telemetry builder), <code>deobfuscated/src/app/agent/runtime/remote-delegation.js</code> (213,816 bytes, remote delegation state machine), <code>decoded/03_agents/runtime/workspace-context__1025.js</code> (ACP event definition)</p>
</blockquote>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">stateDiagram-v2
    [*] --> uncommitted_changes_check: startDelegation()
    uncommitted_changes_check --> confirm: 변경사항 없음 / 커밋 가능
    confirm --> processing: remote 선택 + 사용자 확인
    processing --> tracking: 모든 operation 완료
    tracking --> complete: 세션 종료 상태 감지

    state processing {
        [*] --> commit: hasUncommittedChanges
        commit --> create_branch
        create_branch --> summarize_context
        [*] --> summarize_context: clean
        summarize_context --> start_job
        start_job --> check_job
        check_job --> wait_for_session
    }

    state tracking {
        polling: 1초 폴링
        polling --> polling: in_progress
        polling --> [*]: completed/failed/cancelled/timed_out
    }
</code></pre>
<hr>
<h2>1. Local subagent — ACP Event and Trajectory Writer</h2>
<h3>1.1 Life cycle events</h3>
<p>Three Agent Communication Protocol (ACP) events:</p>
<pre><code class="language-javascript">// workspace-context__1025.js:2786-2831 — 서브에이전트 생명주기
var subagentStarted = BaseEvent.extend({
  type: literal("subagent.started"),
  data: object({
    toolCallId: string().describe("Parent tool call that spawned this sub-agent"),
    agentName: string().describe("Internal name"),
    agentDisplayName: string().describe("Human-readable name"),
    agentDescription: string().describe("What the sub-agent does"),
  }),
});

var subagentCompleted = BaseEvent.extend({
  type: literal("subagent.completed"),
  data: object({
    toolCallId: string(), agentName: string(), agentDisplayName: string(),
  }),
});

var subagentFailed = BaseEvent.extend({
  type: literal("subagent.failed"),
  data: object({
    toolCallId: string(), agentName: string(), agentDisplayName: string(),
    error: string().describe("Error message"),
  }),
});
</code></pre>
<h3>1.2 Trajectory Writer — XML-based execution history</h3>
<blockquote>
<p>Source: <code>deobfuscated/src/app/core/slash-subagent.js</code> (line 176)</p>
</blockquote>
<p>The <code>tlt</code> class (TrajectoryWriter) streams the entire execution process of the subagent as a file with XML tags. This is a <strong>structured execution history format</strong> that is difficult to find in other agents:</p>
<pre><code class="language-javascript">// slash-subagent.js — tlt 클래스 (재구성)
class TrajectoryWriter {
  toolCalls = {};           // 진행 중인 tool call 추적
  trajectoryOutputFile;     // 출력 파일 경로
  trajectoryStream;         // fs.createWriteStream
  trajectoryFormatter;      // XML 포매터

  constructor(logger, outputFile) {
    this.logger = logger;
    this.trajectoryOutputFile = outputFile;
    this.initTrajectoryOutputFileIfNeeded();
  }

  // 세션 경계 처리 (핵심 메서드)
  async progress(event) {
    if (isSessionBoundary(event)) {
      let { sessionBoundaryType, agentName, agentId } = event;
      let idAttr = agentId ? ` id="${agentId}"` : "";

      if (sessionBoundaryType === "start")
        this.writeToTrajectoryFile(`\n&#x3C;subagent name="${agentName}"${idAttr}>`);
      else if (sessionBoundaryType === "end")
        this.writeToTrajectoryFile("&#x3C;/subagent>");
      else {
        let errorMsg = event.error ? `: ${event.error}` : "";
        this.writeToTrajectoryFile(
          `&#x3C;/subagent name="${agentName}" status="failed"${errorMsg}>`
        );
      }
      return;
    }

    // LLM 메시지 처리
    if (isMessage(event)) {
      if (isAssistantMessage(event)) {
        // content + reasoning_text 기록
        if (event.message.content) this.handleAssistantMessageWithContent(event.message.content);
        if (event.message.reasoning_text) this.handleAssistantMessageWithContent(event.message.reasoning_text);
        if (hasToolCalls(event)) this.handleAssistantToolCalls(event.message.tool_calls);
      } else if (isToolResult(event)) {
        this.handleToolCallId(event.message.tool_call_id, event.message.content);
      }
    }
  }
}
</code></pre>
<p><strong>Trajectory output format:</strong></p>
<pre><code class="language-xml">&#x3C;!-- 서브에이전트 시작 -->
&#x3C;subagent name="code-reviewer" id="tc_abc123">

&#x3C;!-- assistant 메시지 -->
[포매팅된 assistant 메시지]

&#x3C;!-- 도구 호출 -->
[포매팅된 도구 호출]

&#x3C;!-- 도구 결과 -->
[포매팅된 도구 결과]

&#x3C;!-- 서브에이전트 완료 -->
&#x3C;/subagent>

&#x3C;!-- 실패 시 -->
&#x3C;/subagent name="code-reviewer" status="failed": Error message here>
</code></pre>
<p>Key design points:</p>
<ul>
<li><code>toolCalls = {}</code> Stores ongoing tool calls in the map, and records matching results when they return.</li>
<li>Also records <code>reasoning_text</code> (thought process) separately — useful for debugging</li>
<li>In the <code>result()</code> method, retrieve <code>blockedRequests</code> from the firewall log and add it (for security auditing)</li>
<li><code>result()</code>/<code>error()</code> promises are resolved only when the file stream ends — preventing data loss</li>
</ul>
<p>This implementation provides a much more detailed structured record than Claude Code's <code>task_progress</code> system message.</p>
<hr>
<h2>2. Subagent telemetry</h2>
<blockquote>
<p>Source: <code>deobfuscated/src/app/mcp/subagent-telemetry.js</code> (line 60)</p>
</blockquote>
<p>Step 4 Telemetry Event Builder:</p>
<h3>2.1 Event schema</h3>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>Event</th>
<th>public properties</th>
<th>limited properties</th>
<th>metrics</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><code>subagent_selected</code></td>
<td><code>event_id</code>, <code>agent_name_hash</code></td>
<td><code>agent_name</code>, <code>agent_display_name</code></td>
<td><code>tool_count</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>subagent_started</code></td>
<td><code>event_id</code>, <code>tool_call_id</code>, <code>agent_name_hash</code></td>
<td><code>agent_name</code>, <code>agent_display_name</code>, <code>agent_description</code></td>
<td>—</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>subagent_completed</code></td>
<td><code>event_id</code>, <code>tool_call_id</code>, <code>agent_name_hash</code></td>
<td><code>agent_name</code>, <code>agent_display_name</code></td>
<td>—</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>subagent_failed</code></td>
<td><code>event_id</code>, <code>tool_call_id</code>, <code>agent_name_hash</code></td>
<td><code>agent_name</code>, <code>agent_display_name</code>, <code>error</code></td>
<td>—</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<h3>2.2 Privacy by design</h3>
<pre><code class="language-javascript">// subagent-telemetry.js — 해시 기반 익명화
properties: {
  event_id: t.id,
  tool_call_id: t.data.toolCallId,
  agent_name_hash: hashString(t.data.agentName),  // 이름 자체는 해시
},
restrictedProperties: {
  agent_name: t.data.agentName,                    // 제한된 파이프라인에만 전송
  agent_display_name: t.data.agentDisplayName,
}
</code></pre>
<p><code>properties</code> are sent to all telemetry pipelines, but are anonymized with <code>agent_name_hash</code>. <code>restrictedProperties</code> can only be accessed from authenticated internal pipelines.</p>
<p><strong><code>tool_count</code> metric from the <code>subagent_selected</code> event</strong>: Collects the number of tools assigned to the agent (<code>t.data.tools?.length ?? 0</code>). Through this, the number of tools and the success/failure correlation can be analyzed.</p>
<p>This anonymization pattern has the same purpose as Claude Code's <code>vx7()</code> function (<code>isBuiltIn ? subagentName : "user-defined"</code>), but Copilot is more informative in that it can track <strong>reuse frequency of the same agent</strong> using hashes.</p>
<hr>
<h2>3. Remote Delegation State Machine (RemoteDelegationManager)</h2>
<blockquote>
<p>Source: <code>deobfuscated/src/app/agent/runtime/remote-delegation.js</code> (213,816 bytes)</p>
</blockquote>
<p>Five-level state machine of class <code>bgt</code>:</p>
<pre><code class="language-javascript">// remote-delegation.js — bgt (RemoteDelegationManager, 축약)
class RemoteDelegationManager {
  state = null;
  onStateChangeCallback = null;
  onSessionCompleteCallback = null;
  timeoutId = null;
  pollingIntervalId = null;
  initialAuthInfo;
  authInfo;
  logger;
  integrationId;

  // Stage 1: Git 상태 검증
  async checkUncommittedChanges() {
    // 1. Git 저장소 확인 (findGitRoot)
    // 2. Remote 목록 확인 (getGitRemotes)
    // 3. 인증 호스트 일치 검증
    //    authHost !== repoInfo.repositoryHost → 에러
    // 4. 병렬 검증: detached HEAD, 저장소 접근, Copilot 상태
    // 5. 변경사항 확인 (staged, unstaged, untracked 카운트)
  }

  // Stage 2: 위임 확인 데이터 로드
  async loadDelegationConfirmationData() {
    // remote 선택, 저장소 정보 로드
    // → repository, repositoryHost, baseBranch, headBranch, asyncBranch
  }

  // Stage 3: 위임 작업 실행
  async executeDelegationOperations() {
    let operations = this.buildOperationsList();
    // [commit?, create-branch?, summarize-context, start-job, check-job, wait-for-session]
    for (let op of operations) {
      switch (op.id) {
        case "commit":        // Git commit 생성 (checkpoint commit)
        case "create-branch": // async 브랜치 생성 + push + 복귀
        case "summarize-context": // LLM으로 대화 컨텍스트 요약
        case "start-job":    // GitHub API로 원격 작업 생성
        case "check-job":    // PR 정보 폴링 (최대 90초)
        case "wait-for-session": // 세션 in_progress 대기 (최대 90초)
      }
    }
  }

  // Stage 4: 작업 추적 (적응형 폴링)
  async startJobTracking() {
    this.pollingIntervalId = setInterval(async () => {
      let session = await checkSessionStatus({...});
      // PR 상세 갱신 (파일 목록 최대 10개)
      // 유휴 상태에서 폴링 간격 점진적 증가 (1초 → 30초)
    }, 1000);
  }

  // Stage 5: 위임 완료
  completeDelegationOperation() {
    // Job ID, Session ID, PR URL, Commit Hash, Branch, Final State 로깅
  }
}
</code></pre>
<h3>3.1 Session state values</h3>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>status</th>
<th>Meaning</th>
<th>processing</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><code>queued</code></td>
<td>Waiting</td>
<td>Polling continues</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>in_progress</code></td>
<td>Running</td>
<td>Start tracking</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>waiting_for_user</code></td>
<td>Wait for user input</td>
<td>Increase polling interval</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>idle</code></td>
<td>idle</td>
<td>Increase polling interval</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>completed</code></td>
<td>Done</td>
<td>Ends in 3 seconds</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>failed</code></td>
<td>failure</td>
<td>Ends in 3 seconds</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>cancelled</code></td>
<td>Cancel</td>
<td>Ends in 3 seconds</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>timed_out</code></td>
<td>timeout</td>
<td>Ends in 3 seconds</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<h3>3.2 Delegation state data structure</h3>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">interface DelegationState {
  stage: "uncommitted_changes_check" | "confirm" | "processing" | "tracking";
  prompt?: string;
  cliSessionId: string;
  getContextSummary?: () => Promise&#x3C;string>;
  isLoading: boolean;
  error?: Error;

  // Git 정보
  isGitRepository?: boolean;
  hasUncommittedChanges?: boolean;
  fileCount?: { staged: number; unstaged: number; untracked: number };
  commitMessage?: string;
  commitHash?: string;

  // Remote/Repository 정보
  remoteNames?: string[];
  selectedRemote?: string;
  repository?: string;       // "owner/repo"
  repositoryHost?: string;
  baseBranch?: string;
  headBranch?: string;
  asyncBranch?: string;

  // Job 정보
  jobId?: string;
  sessionId?: string;
  jobUrl?: string;
  jobCreatedBy?: string;
  jobCreatedAt?: string;
  jobStatus?: string;

  // PR 정보
  prNumber?: number;
  prUrl?: string;
  prTitle?: string;
  prDraft?: boolean;
  prCreatedAt?: string;
  prChangedFiles?: number;
  prTotalAdditions?: number;
  prTotalDeletions?: number;
  prFiles?: Array&#x3C;{ filename: string; status: string; additions: number; deletions: number }>;

  // 세션
  sessionState?: string;
  queuedAtHandoff?: boolean;
  problemContext?: string;
  processingStartTime?: Date;
  operations?: Array&#x3C;{ id: string; status: string; error?: string }>;
}
</code></pre>
<h3>3.3 Adaptive polling</h3>
<pre><code class="language-javascript">// 유휴 상태에서 폴링 간격 점진적 증가
if (session.state === "waiting_for_user" || session.state === "idle") {
  let elapsed = Date.now() - idleStartTime;
  let intervals = Math.floor(elapsed / 300_000);  // 5분마다
  let newInterval = Math.min(5000 + intervals * 5000, 30_000);
}
</code></pre>

<hr>
<h2>4. Authentication host verification</h2>
<p><strong>Authentication host/repository host match verification</strong> is required for remote delegation:</p>
<pre><code class="language-javascript">// remote-delegation.js — 호스트 일치 검증
let authHost = new URL(getApiUrl(this.authInfo)).host;
if (authHost !== repoInfo.repositoryHost)
  throw new Error(
    `Auth host mismatch: logged into ${authHost} but repo on ${repoInfo.repositoryHost}`
  );
</code></pre>
<p>Prevents tasks from being delegated to the wrong server in a mixed environment of GitHub Enterprise and github.com.</p>

<h3>Copilot CLI-specific elements</h3>
<ol>
<li><strong>XML Trajectory Writer</strong>: Structures subagent execution with <code>&#x3C;subagent></code> tags and streams them to a file. Optimal for debugging by recording reasoning_text</li>
<li><strong>Remote PR Delegation</strong>: “Server-side delegation” on a completely different axis from local agents. Automate Git branch creation → context summary → remote job creation → PR tracking</li>
<li><strong>Adaptive Polling</strong>: Increase polling interval by 5 seconds every 5 minutes when idle (up to 30 seconds) — Resource efficient</li>
<li><strong>Hash-based telemetry anonymization</strong>: Hash the agent name with <code>agent_name_hash</code>, but can track reuse frequency.</li>
<li><strong>Firewall log integration</strong>: Provides security audit data by collecting <code>blockedRequests</code> in trajectory from firewall logs.</li>
</ol>
<hr>
<h2>Technical Reference</h2>
<h3>Reuse seam</h3>
<ul class="contains-task-list">
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> XML trajectory writer is the reference implementation of structured agent execution history.</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> Five-level state machines are a good reference architecture for asynchronous task delegation.</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> Authentication host matching verification is a required pattern in a multi-host environment</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> Adaptive polling (incremental increase in interval when idle) is resource efficient</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> Hash-based telemetry anonymization is a balance between privacy protection and analysis.</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> Remote delivery after context summary is the key to agent handoff</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" disabled> Depends heavily on GitHub API — requires large abstractions to adapt to other VCS</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" disabled> The exact schema of the YAML agent definition file requires further analysis.</li>
</ul>

<h2>Korean corpus (reference)</h2>
<blockquote>
<p>Verbatim KO corpus <code>005_subagents-collab/05_cp_subagent.md</code> for cross-check; code blocks unchanged.</p>

<h1>Copilot CLI 서브에이전트·협업 역공학 분석</h1>
<blockquote>
<p><strong>분석 스냅샷</strong>: <code>151_copilot_cli/</code> — subagent/collaboration dispatch.</p>
</blockquote>
<p>Copilot CLI의 서브에이전트/협업은 <strong>세 가지 독립된 메커니즘</strong>으로 구성된다:</p>
<ol>
<li><strong>로컬 서브에이전트 (ACP 이벤트 기반)</strong>: 5개 YAML 에이전트가 <code>subagent.started/completed/failed</code> 이벤트로 생명주기를 관리하며, trajectory writer가 XML 태그(<code>&#x3C;subagent name="..."></code>)로 실행 기록을 파일에 스트리밍한다.</li>
<li><strong>원격 위임 (Remote Delegation)</strong>: <code>bgt</code> 클래스(RemoteDelegationManager)가 5단계 상태 머신으로 GitHub Copilot 서버에 작업을 위임하고, PR 생성·추적·폴링까지 자동화한다.</li>
<li><strong>서브에이전트 텔레메트리</strong>: 4단계 이벤트(<code>selected</code>, <code>started</code>, <code>completed</code>, <code>failed</code>)가 <code>agent_name_hash</code> 해시로 에이전트 이름을 익명화하여 수집된다.</li>
</ol>
<blockquote>
<p>⚠️ <strong>디컴파일 분석 근거</strong>: <code>deobfuscated/src/app/core/slash-subagent.js</code> (176줄, trajectory writer), <code>deobfuscated/src/app/mcp/subagent-telemetry.js</code> (60줄, 텔레메트리 빌더), <code>deobfuscated/src/app/agent/runtime/remote-delegation.js</code> (213,816바이트, 원격 위임 상태 머신), <code>decoded/03_agents/runtime/workspace-context__1025.js</code> (ACP 이벤트 정의)</p>
</blockquote>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">stateDiagram-v2
    [*] --> uncommitted_changes_check: startDelegation()
    uncommitted_changes_check --> confirm: 변경사항 없음 / 커밋 가능
    confirm --> processing: remote 선택 + 사용자 확인
    processing --> tracking: 모든 operation 완료
    tracking --> complete: 세션 종료 상태 감지

    state processing {
        [*] --> commit: hasUncommittedChanges
        commit --> create_branch
        create_branch --> summarize_context
        [*] --> summarize_context: clean
        summarize_context --> start_job
        start_job --> check_job
        check_job --> wait_for_session
    }

    state tracking {
        polling: 1초 폴링
        polling --> polling: in_progress
        polling --> [*]: completed/failed/cancelled/timed_out
    }
</code></pre>
<hr>
<h2>1. 로컬 서브에이전트 — ACP 이벤트와 Trajectory Writer</h2>
<h3>1.1 생명주기 이벤트</h3>
<p>3가지 ACP(Agent Communication Protocol) 이벤트:</p>
<pre><code class="language-javascript">// workspace-context__1025.js:2786-2831 — 서브에이전트 생명주기
var subagentStarted = BaseEvent.extend({
  type: literal("subagent.started"),
  data: object({
    toolCallId: string().describe("Parent tool call that spawned this sub-agent"),
    agentName: string().describe("Internal name"),
    agentDisplayName: string().describe("Human-readable name"),
    agentDescription: string().describe("What the sub-agent does"),
  }),
});

var subagentCompleted = BaseEvent.extend({
  type: literal("subagent.completed"),
  data: object({
    toolCallId: string(), agentName: string(), agentDisplayName: string(),
  }),
});

var subagentFailed = BaseEvent.extend({
  type: literal("subagent.failed"),
  data: object({
    toolCallId: string(), agentName: string(), agentDisplayName: string(),
    error: string().describe("Error message"),
  }),
});
</code></pre>
<h3>1.2 Trajectory Writer — XML 기반 실행 기록</h3>
<blockquote>
<p>소스: <code>deobfuscated/src/app/core/slash-subagent.js</code> (176줄)</p>
</blockquote>
<p><code>tlt</code> 클래스(TrajectoryWriter)는 서브에이전트의 전체 실행 과정을 XML 태그와 함께 파일로 스트리밍한다. 이것은 다른 에이전트에서 찾기 어려운 <strong>구조화된 실행 기록 포맷</strong>이다:</p>
<pre><code class="language-javascript">// slash-subagent.js — tlt 클래스 (재구성)
class TrajectoryWriter {
  toolCalls = {};           // 진행 중인 tool call 추적
  trajectoryOutputFile;     // 출력 파일 경로
  trajectoryStream;         // fs.createWriteStream
  trajectoryFormatter;      // XML 포매터

  constructor(logger, outputFile) {
    this.logger = logger;
    this.trajectoryOutputFile = outputFile;
    this.initTrajectoryOutputFileIfNeeded();
  }

  // 세션 경계 처리 (핵심 메서드)
  async progress(event) {
    if (isSessionBoundary(event)) {
      let { sessionBoundaryType, agentName, agentId } = event;
      let idAttr = agentId ? ` id="${agentId}"` : "";

      if (sessionBoundaryType === "start")
        this.writeToTrajectoryFile(`\n&#x3C;subagent name="${agentName}"${idAttr}>`);
      else if (sessionBoundaryType === "end")
        this.writeToTrajectoryFile("&#x3C;/subagent>");
      else {
        let errorMsg = event.error ? `: ${event.error}` : "";
        this.writeToTrajectoryFile(
          `&#x3C;/subagent name="${agentName}" status="failed"${errorMsg}>`
        );
      }
      return;
    }

    // LLM 메시지 처리
    if (isMessage(event)) {
      if (isAssistantMessage(event)) {
        // content + reasoning_text 기록
        if (event.message.content) this.handleAssistantMessageWithContent(event.message.content);
        if (event.message.reasoning_text) this.handleAssistantMessageWithContent(event.message.reasoning_text);
        if (hasToolCalls(event)) this.handleAssistantToolCalls(event.message.tool_calls);
      } else if (isToolResult(event)) {
        this.handleToolCallId(event.message.tool_call_id, event.message.content);
      }
    }
  }
}
</code></pre>
<p><strong>Trajectory 출력 포맷:</strong></p>
<pre><code class="language-xml">&#x3C;!-- 서브에이전트 시작 -->
&#x3C;subagent name="code-reviewer" id="tc_abc123">

&#x3C;!-- assistant 메시지 -->
[포매팅된 assistant 메시지]

&#x3C;!-- 도구 호출 -->
[포매팅된 도구 호출]

&#x3C;!-- 도구 결과 -->
[포매팅된 도구 결과]

&#x3C;!-- 서브에이전트 완료 -->
&#x3C;/subagent>

&#x3C;!-- 실패 시 -->
&#x3C;/subagent name="code-reviewer" status="failed": Error message here>
</code></pre>
<p>핵심 설계 포인트:</p>
<ul>
<li><code>toolCalls = {}</code> 맵에 진행 중인 도구 호출을 저장하고, 결과가 돌아오면 매칭하여 기록</li>
<li><code>reasoning_text</code>(사고 과정)도 별도로 기록 — 디버깅에 유용</li>
<li><code>result()</code> 메서드에서 <code>blockedRequests</code>를 방화벽 로그에서 가져와 추가 (보안 감사용)</li>
<li>파일 스트림이 끝나야 <code>result()</code>/<code>error()</code> Promise가 resolve — 데이터 유실 방지</li>
</ul>
<p>이 구현은 Claude Code의 <code>task_progress</code> 시스템 메시지보다 훨씬 상세한 구조화된 기록을 제공한다.</p>
<hr>
<h2>2. 서브에이전트 텔레메트리</h2>
<blockquote>
<p>소스: <code>deobfuscated/src/app/mcp/subagent-telemetry.js</code> (60줄)</p>
</blockquote>
<p>4단계 텔레메트리 이벤트 빌더:</p>
<h3>2.1 이벤트 스키마</h3>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>이벤트</th>
<th>공개 속성</th>
<th>제한 속성</th>
<th>메트릭</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><code>subagent_selected</code></td>
<td><code>event_id</code>, <code>agent_name_hash</code></td>
<td><code>agent_name</code>, <code>agent_display_name</code></td>
<td><code>tool_count</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>subagent_started</code></td>
<td><code>event_id</code>, <code>tool_call_id</code>, <code>agent_name_hash</code></td>
<td><code>agent_name</code>, <code>agent_display_name</code>, <code>agent_description</code></td>
<td>—</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>subagent_completed</code></td>
<td><code>event_id</code>, <code>tool_call_id</code>, <code>agent_name_hash</code></td>
<td><code>agent_name</code>, <code>agent_display_name</code></td>
<td>—</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>subagent_failed</code></td>
<td><code>event_id</code>, <code>tool_call_id</code>, <code>agent_name_hash</code></td>
<td><code>agent_name</code>, <code>agent_display_name</code>, <code>error</code></td>
<td>—</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<h3>2.2 프라이버시 설계</h3>
<pre><code class="language-javascript">// subagent-telemetry.js — 해시 기반 익명화
properties: {
  event_id: t.id,
  tool_call_id: t.data.toolCallId,
  agent_name_hash: hashString(t.data.agentName),  // 이름 자체는 해시
},
restrictedProperties: {
  agent_name: t.data.agentName,                    // 제한된 파이프라인에만 전송
  agent_display_name: t.data.agentDisplayName,
}
</code></pre>
<p><code>properties</code>는 모든 텔레메트리 파이프라인에 전송되지만 <code>agent_name_hash</code>로 익명화되어 있다. <code>restrictedProperties</code>는 인증된 내부 파이프라인에서만 접근 가능하다.</p>
<p><strong><code>subagent_selected</code> 이벤트의 <code>tool_count</code> 메트릭</strong>: 에이전트에 할당된 도구 수를 수집한다 (<code>t.data.tools?.length ?? 0</code>). 이를 통해 도구 수와 성공/실패 상관관계를 분석할 수 있다.</p>
<p>이 익명화 패턴은 Claude Code의 <code>vx7()</code> 함수(<code>isBuiltIn ? subagentName : "user-defined"</code>)와 목적은 같지만, Copilot은 해시를 사용하여 <strong>같은 에이전트의 재사용 빈도</strong>까지 추적할 수 있다는 점에서 더 정보량이 많다.</p>
<hr>
<h2>3. 원격 위임 상태 머신 (RemoteDelegationManager)</h2>
<blockquote>
<p>소스: <code>deobfuscated/src/app/agent/runtime/remote-delegation.js</code> (213,816바이트)</p>
</blockquote>
<p><code>bgt</code> 클래스의 5단계 상태 머신:</p>
<pre><code class="language-javascript">// remote-delegation.js — bgt (RemoteDelegationManager, 축약)
class RemoteDelegationManager {
  state = null;
  onStateChangeCallback = null;
  onSessionCompleteCallback = null;
  timeoutId = null;
  pollingIntervalId = null;
  initialAuthInfo;
  authInfo;
  logger;
  integrationId;

  // Stage 1: Git 상태 검증
  async checkUncommittedChanges() {
    // 1. Git 저장소 확인 (findGitRoot)
    // 2. Remote 목록 확인 (getGitRemotes)
    // 3. 인증 호스트 일치 검증
    //    authHost !== repoInfo.repositoryHost → 에러
    // 4. 병렬 검증: detached HEAD, 저장소 접근, Copilot 상태
    // 5. 변경사항 확인 (staged, unstaged, untracked 카운트)
  }

  // Stage 2: 위임 확인 데이터 로드
  async loadDelegationConfirmationData() {
    // remote 선택, 저장소 정보 로드
    // → repository, repositoryHost, baseBranch, headBranch, asyncBranch
  }

  // Stage 3: 위임 작업 실행
  async executeDelegationOperations() {
    let operations = this.buildOperationsList();
    // [commit?, create-branch?, summarize-context, start-job, check-job, wait-for-session]
    for (let op of operations) {
      switch (op.id) {
        case "commit":        // Git commit 생성 (checkpoint commit)
        case "create-branch": // async 브랜치 생성 + push + 복귀
        case "summarize-context": // LLM으로 대화 컨텍스트 요약
        case "start-job":    // GitHub API로 원격 작업 생성
        case "check-job":    // PR 정보 폴링 (최대 90초)
        case "wait-for-session": // 세션 in_progress 대기 (최대 90초)
      }
    }
  }

  // Stage 4: 작업 추적 (적응형 폴링)
  async startJobTracking() {
    this.pollingIntervalId = setInterval(async () => {
      let session = await checkSessionStatus({...});
      // PR 상세 갱신 (파일 목록 최대 10개)
      // 유휴 상태에서 폴링 간격 점진적 증가 (1초 → 30초)
    }, 1000);
  }

  // Stage 5: 위임 완료
  completeDelegationOperation() {
    // Job ID, Session ID, PR URL, Commit Hash, Branch, Final State 로깅
  }
}
</code></pre>
<h3>3.1 세션 상태 값</h3>

<td>tracking 시작</td>

</tr>

<td>폴링 간격 증가</td>

<td>3초 후 종료</td>
</tr>

<td>3초 후 종료</td>
</tr>

<h3>3.2 위임 상태 데이터 구조</h3>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">interface DelegationState {
  stage: "uncommitted_changes_check" | "confirm" | "processing" | "tracking";
  prompt?: string;
  cliSessionId: string;
  getContextSummary?: () => Promise&#x3C;string>;
  isLoading: boolean;
  error?: Error;

  // Git 정보
  isGitRepository?: boolean;
  hasUncommittedChanges?: boolean;
  fileCount?: { staged: number; unstaged: number; untracked: number };
  commitMessage?: string;
  commitHash?: string;

  // Remote/Repository 정보
  remoteNames?: string[];
  selectedRemote?: string;
  repository?: string;       // "owner/repo"
  repositoryHost?: string;
  baseBranch?: string;
  headBranch?: string;
  asyncBranch?: string;

  // Job 정보
  jobId?: string;
  sessionId?: string;
  jobUrl?: string;
  jobCreatedBy?: string;
  jobCreatedAt?: string;
  jobStatus?: string;

  // PR 정보
  prNumber?: number;
  prUrl?: string;
  prTitle?: string;
  prDraft?: boolean;
  prCreatedAt?: string;
  prChangedFiles?: number;
  prTotalAdditions?: number;
  prTotalDeletions?: number;
  prFiles?: Array&#x3C;{ filename: string; status: string; additions: number; deletions: number }>;

  // 세션
  sessionState?: string;
  queuedAtHandoff?: boolean;
  problemContext?: string;
  processingStartTime?: Date;
  operations?: Array&#x3C;{ id: string; status: string; error?: string }>;
}
</code></pre>
<h3>3.3 적응형 폴링</h3>
<pre><code class="language-javascript">// 유휴 상태에서 폴링 간격 점진적 증가
if (session.state === "waiting_for_user" || session.state === "idle") {
  let elapsed = Date.now() - idleStartTime;
  let intervals = Math.floor(elapsed / 300_000);  // 5분마다
  let newInterval = Math.min(5000 + intervals * 5000, 30_000);
}
</code></pre>

<h2>4. 인증 호스트 검증</h2>
<p>원격 위임에는 <strong>인증 호스트·저장소 호스트 일치 검증</strong>이 필수다:</p>
<pre><code class="language-javascript">// remote-delegation.js — 호스트 일치 검증
let authHost = new URL(getApiUrl(this.authInfo)).host;
if (authHost !== repoInfo.repositoryHost)
  throw new Error(
    `Auth host mismatch: logged into ${authHost} but repo on ${repoInfo.repositoryHost}`
  );
</code></pre>
<p>GitHub Enterprise와 github.com이 혼재된 환경에서 잘못된 서버에 작업이 위임되는 것을 방지한다.</p>

<h3>Copilot CLI 고유 요소</h3>
<ol>
<li><strong>XML Trajectory Writer</strong>: 서브에이전트 실행을 <code>&#x3C;subagent></code> 태그로 구조화하여 파일에 스트리밍. reasoning_text까지 기록하여 디버깅에 최적</li>
<li><strong>원격 PR 위임</strong>: 로컬 에이전트와 완전히 다른 축의 "서버사이드 위임". Git branch 생성 → 컨텍스트 요약 → 원격 Job 생성 → PR 추적까지 자동화</li>
<li><strong>적응형 폴링</strong>: 유휴 시 5분마다 5초씩 폴링 간격 증가 (최대 30초) — 리소스 효율적</li>
<li><strong>해시 기반 텔레메트리 익명화</strong>: <code>agent_name_hash</code>로 에이전트 이름을 해시화하되 재사용 빈도 추적 가능</li>
<li><strong>방화벽 로그 통합</strong>: trajectory에 <code>blockedRequests</code>를 방화벽 로그에서 수집하여 보안 감사 데이터 제공</li>
</ol>
<hr>
<h2>기술 참조</h2>
<h3>재사용 seam</h3>
<ul class="contains-task-list">
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> XML trajectory writer는 구조화된 에이전트 실행 기록의 참조 구현</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> 5단계 상태 머신은 비동기 작업 위임의 좋은 참조 아키텍처</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> 인증 호스트 일치 검증은 멀티 호스트 환경에서 필수 패턴</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> 적응형 폴링 (유휴 시 간격 점진적 증가)은 리소스 효율적</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> 해시 기반 텔레메트리 익명화는 프라이버시 보호와 분석의 균형점</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> 컨텍스트 요약 후 원격 전달은 에이전트 핸드오프의 핵심</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" disabled> GitHub API에 깊이 의존 — 다른 VCS에 적용하려면 대규모 추상화 필요</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" disabled> YAML 에이전트 정의 파일의 정확한 스키마는 추가 분석 필요</li>
</ul>

47:Td368,<h2>Overview</h2>
<p><strong>Axis 06: App surfaces</strong> — developer-depth section from the codex corpus. Structural highlights extracted from the analysis:</p>
<ul>
<li>
<blockquote>
<p><strong>분석 스냅샷</strong>: <code>151_copilot_cli/</code> — app/server/client surfaces.</p>
</blockquote>
</li>
<li>
<blockquote>
<p>⚠️ <strong>디컴파일 번들 분석</strong>: <code>151_copilot_cli/decoded/</code> 트리의 <code>13_export_surface/</code>(114 파일), <code>10_sdk/</code>(4 파일), <code>03_agents/</code>(10 파일), <code>01_core/</code>(다수), <code>02_session/</code>(다수) 모듈과 <code>npm-package/</code> 배포 구조의 역공학 분석이다.</p>
</blockquote>
</li>
<li>Copilot CLI는 <strong>3단계 부트스트랩 체인</strong>(Electron preload → Worker → SDK)과 <strong>다중 서피스</strong>(CLI, VS Code Extension, Worker Process)를 가진다. 흥미롭게도 지금까지 분석한 에이전트 중 <strong>가장 넓은 모델 카탈로그</strong>(20+ 모델, 4개 제공사)와 <strong>가장 정교한 에이전트 정의 시스템</strong>(YAML 기반 5종 내장 에이전트)을 가지고 있다.</li>
<li>graph TD</li>
<li>subgraph Bootstrap["3단계 부트스트랩"]</li>
<li>Entry["Entry Point\n(cli.js / extension.js)"]</li>
<li>Preload["Preload\n(preloadCommon.js)"]</li>
<li>Worker["Worker\n(agentWorker.js)"]</li>
<li>SDK["copilot-sdk\n(내부 SDK)"]</li>
<li>end</li>
<li>subgraph Surfaces["서피스"]</li>
<li>CLI["CLI Mode\n(터미널 직접 실행)"]</li>
</ul>
<h2>Topics covered</h2>
<ul>
<li>
<ol>
<li>Bootstrap 체인 상세</li>
</ol>
</li>
<li>1.1 Entry Point (app.js — 520K줄)</li>
<li>1.2 Preload (preloadCommon.js — ~15K줄)</li>
<li>1.3 Worker (agentWorker.js — ~3K줄)</li>
<li>
<ol start="2">
<li>모델 해석 시스템</li>
</ol>
</li>
<li>2.1 모델 카탈로그 (20+ 모델)</li>
<li>2.2 모델 해석 우선순위</li>
<li>2.3 Reasoning Effort 지원</li>
<li>2.4 Subagent 모델 오버라이드</li>
<li>

</ul>

2. cli: --model CLI 인수
3. session: 세션 내 선택 모델

<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-javascript">// 모델 + reasoning effort → CAPI 요청 문자열
async function utn(model, settings, effort) {
  let capiModel = `capi:${model}`;
  if (hasReasoningEffort(model)) {
    let resolved = resolveEffort(model, effort);
    if (resolved) return `${capiModel}:defaultReasoningEffort=${resolved}`;
  }
  return capiModel;
}
</code></pre>
<h3>README / docs</h3>

const AgentDefinition = z.object({
  name: z.string(),
  displayName: z.string(),
  description: z.string(),
  model: z.string().optional(),
  tools: z.array(z.string()),
  promptParts: z.object({
    includeAISafety: z.boolean().default(true),
    includeToolInstructions: z.boolean().default(true),
    includeParallelToolCalling: z.boolean().default(false),
    includeCustomAgentInstructions: z.boolean().default(false),
    includeEnvironmentContext: z.boolean().default(true),
  }).default({}),
  prompt: z.string(),
  mcpServers: z.record(z.string(), z.custom()).optional(),
  contexts: z.array(z.enum(["cli", "cca", "sdk"])).optional(),
});
</code></pre>

2. xat(): COPILOT_CLI_ENABLED_FEATURE_FLAGS 환경변수로 오버라이드

<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">sequenceDiagram
    participant CLI as Copilot CLI
    participant GH as GitHub API

    CLI->>GH: POST /login/device/code\n(client_id, scope: read:user,repo,gist)
    GH-->>CLI: device_code, user_code, verification_uri
    CLI->>User: "브라우저에서 {verification_uri} 열고\n코드 {user_code} 입력"
    loop 폴링
        CLI->>GH: POST /login/oauth/access_token\n(device_code, grant_type: device_code)
        alt 대기 중
            GH-->>CLI: error: authorization_pending
        else 승인됨
            GH-->>CLI: access_token
        end
    end
    CLI->>GH: API 호출 (Authorization: Bearer {token})
</code></pre>

<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-javascript">// Content Exclusion 스키마 (재구성)
const ContentExclusionRule = z.object({
  paths: z.array(z.string()),
  ifAnyMatch: z.array(z.string()).optional(),
  ifNoneMatch: z.array(z.string()).optional(),
  source: z.object({ name: z.string(), type: z.string() }),
});

const ContentExclusionConfig = z.object({
  rules: z.array(ContentExclusionRule),
  last_updated_at: z.union([z.string(), z.number()]),
  scope: z.enum(["repo", "all"]),
});
</code></pre>
<h2>Main analysis</h2>
<h1>Copilot CLI app·server·client surface analysis</h1>
<blockquote>
<p><strong>Analysis Snapshot</strong>: <code>151_copilot_cli/</code> — app/server/client surfaces.</p>
</blockquote>
<blockquote>
<p>⚠️ <strong>Decompilation bundle analysis</strong>: modules <code>13_export_surface/</code> (114 files), <code>10_sdk/</code> (4 files), <code>03_agents/</code> (10 files), <code>01_core/</code> (many), and <code>02_session/</code> (many) in the <code>151_copilot_cli/decoded/</code> tree. This is a reverse engineering analysis of the <code>npm-package/</code> distribution structure.</p>
</blockquote>
<p>Copilot CLI has a <strong>3-step bootstrap chain</strong> (Electron preload → Worker → SDK) and <strong>multiple surfaces</strong> (CLI, VS Code Extension, Worker Process). Interestingly, it has the <strong>widest model catalog</strong> (20+ models, 4 providers) and <strong>the most sophisticated agent definition system</strong> (5 types of built-in agents based on YAML) among the agents analyzed so far.</p>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">graph TD
    subgraph Bootstrap["3단계 부트스트랩"]
        Entry["Entry Point\n(cli.js / extension.js)"]
        Preload["Preload\n(preloadCommon.js)"]
        Worker["Worker\n(agentWorker.js)"]
        SDK["copilot-sdk\n(내부 SDK)"]
    end

    subgraph Surfaces["서피스"]
        CLI["CLI Mode\n(터미널 직접 실행)"]
        VSCode["VS Code Extension\n(Copilot Chat)"]
        WorkerProc["Worker Process\n(격리된 에이전트)"]
        CCA["CCA 모드\n(Copilot Coding Agent)"]
    end

    subgraph Runtime["런타임"]
        ModelRes["모델 해석기\n(20+ 모델)"]
        AgentDef["에이전트 정의\n(YAML, 5종)"]
        FeatureFlags["피처 플래그\n(25+ 플래그)"]
        Session["세션 스토어\n(SQLite)"]
    end

    Entry --> Preload
    Preload --> Worker
    Worker --> SDK
    CLI --> Entry
    VSCode --> Entry
    Worker --> WorkerProc
    CCA --> Entry

    SDK --> ModelRes
    SDK --> AgentDef
    SDK --> FeatureFlags
    SDK --> Session
</code></pre>
<hr>
<h2>1. Bootstrap chain details</h2>
<h3>1.1 Entry Point (app.js — 520K lines)</h3>
<p>A single megabundle <code>app.js</code> contains the entire app logic. It is a CommonJS format built with Webpack, and 3,000+ modules are bundled into one file (high reliability 🟢).</p>
<pre><code>app.js 내부 구조:
  모듈 1~100     → 코어 유틸리티, Node.js polyfill
  모듈 100~500   → 벤더 (axios, ajv, zod, cheerio, undici 등)
  모듈 500~900   → 앱 로직 (에이전트, 도구, TUI, 설정)
  모듈 900~1100  → SDK, 세션, 인증
  모듈 1100+     → LSP, MCP, 검색, 대화 관리
</code></pre>
<h3>1.2 Preload (preloadCommon.js — ~15K lines)</h3>
<p>Electron preload script. When running as a VS Code Extension, it runs in the Electron renderer. Set up a secure context bridge and IPC channel.</p>
<h3>1.3 Worker (agentWorker.js — ~3K lines)</h3>
<p>Worker process for running isolated agents. It runs as a subprocess and runs an agent loop that is separated from the main process. Subagents (explore, task, code-review) run in Workers.</p>
<hr>

<h3>2.2 Model interpretation priorities</h3>
<p>The <code>Hat()</code> function is responsible for model interpretation. Level 6 Priority (High Confidence 🟢):</p>
<pre><code>1. alt_provider: COPILOT_AGENT_MODEL 환경변수 (대안 제공사 모드)
2. cli: --model CLI 인수
3. session: 세션 내 선택 모델
4. env: COPILOT_MODEL 환경변수
5. config: 설정 파일 (.copilot/config) 모델
6. default: WAe() 함수의 기본 모델 (staff → opus, 일반 → 사용 가능한 최고 모델)
</code></pre>
<h3>2.3 Reasoning Effort Support</h3>
<p>Inject model-specific reasoning effort (<code>defaultReasoningEffort</code>) into CAPI requests. Can be overridden with configuration files and CLI arguments.</p>
<pre><code class="language-javascript">// 모델 + reasoning effort → CAPI 요청 문자열
async function utn(model, settings, effort) {
  let capiModel = `capi:${model}`;
  if (hasReasoningEffort(model)) {
    let resolved = resolveEffort(model, effort);
    if (resolved) return `${capiModel}:defaultReasoningEffort=${resolved}`;
  }
  return capiModel;
}
</code></pre>
<h3>2.4 Subagent model override</h3>
<p>The <code>g9s()</code> function has feature flag-based logic that defaults to assigning <code>gpt-5.4</code> to subagents (high reliability 🟢).</p>
<hr>
<h2>3. Agent definition system</h2>
<h3>3.1 YAML-based agent definition (5 types)</h3>
<p>The agent is defined in 5 YAML files in the <code>npm-package/definitions/</code> directory (highly reliable 🟢):</p>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>agent</th>
<th>file</th>
<th>Role</th>
<th>side effects</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><code>explore</code></td>
<td><code>explore.agent.yaml</code></td>
<td>Codebase navigation, questions answered (grep/glob/view)</td>
<td>❌</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>task</code></td>
<td><code>task.agent.yaml</code></td>
<td>Run command (test/build/lint)</td>
<td>✅</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>general-purpose</code></td>
<td>(code embedded)</td>
<td>Universal agent with complete toolset</td>
<td>✅</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>code-review</code></td>
<td><code>code-review.agent.yaml</code></td>
<td>Code review (bug/security specialist)</td>
<td>❌</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>configure-copilot</code></td>
<td><code>configure-copilot.agent.yaml</code></td>
<td>Manage MCP Server Settings</td>
<td>✅</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<h3>3.2 Agent definition schema (Zod)</h3>
<pre><code class="language-javascript">// 에이전트 정의 스키마 (재구성)
const AgentDefinition = z.object({
  name: z.string(),
  displayName: z.string(),
  description: z.string(),
  model: z.string().optional(),
  tools: z.array(z.string()),
  promptParts: z.object({
    includeAISafety: z.boolean().default(true),
    includeToolInstructions: z.boolean().default(true),
    includeParallelToolCalling: z.boolean().default(false),
    includeCustomAgentInstructions: z.boolean().default(false),
    includeEnvironmentContext: z.boolean().default(true),
  }).default({}),
  prompt: z.string(),
  mcpServers: z.record(z.string(), z.custom()).optional(),
  contexts: z.array(z.enum(["cli", "cca", "sdk"])).optional(),
});
</code></pre>
<h3>3.3 Agent filtering by context</h3>
<p>Agents are filtered by execution environment (CLI, CCA, SDK) using the <code>contexts</code> field. The <code>configure-copilot</code> agent is CLI only.</p>
<h3>3.4 Prompt template variables</h3>
<p>At the agent prompt, the variables <code>{{cwd}}</code>, <code>{{homedir}}</code>, and <code>{{configDir}}</code> are replaced at runtime (high reliability 🟢).</p>
<hr>
<h2>4. Feature flag system (25+ flags)</h2>
<h3>4.1 Feature flag availability</h3>
<p>The <code>wAe</code> map defines more than 25 feature flags. Each flag is classified into 5 levels of availability (high confidence 🟢):</p>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>Availability</th>
<th>Meaning</th>
</tr>

</tr>

<td><code>off</code></td>
<td>inactive</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>staff</code></td>
<td>Employees only</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>experimental</code></td>
<td>experimental (explicit opt-in)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>staff-or-experimental</code></td>
<td>Employee or Experimental</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>team</code></td>
<td>Rollout by team</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>CODEX_FOR_SUBAGENTS</code></td>
<td>off</td>
<td>Codex subagent (inactive)</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<h3>4.3 Flag interpretation chain</h3>
<pre><code>1. CYr(): 기본 가용성 매트릭스에서 플래그 계산
2. xat(): COPILOT_CLI_ENABLED_FEATURE_FLAGS 환경변수로 오버라이드
3. YYr(): 설정 파일 feature_flags.enabled에서 추가 활성화
</code></pre>
<hr>
<h2>5. Export Surface (13_export_surface/ — 114 files)</h2>
<h3>5.1 Role</h3>
<p>The <code>13_export_surface/</code> directory defines the app's <strong>public API surface</strong>. Internally, it includes a slash command handler, Zod schema, LSP integration, authentication, configuration routes, etc.</p>
<h3>5.2 Major module classification</h3>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>pattern</th>
<th>number of files</th>
<th>Role</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><code>slash-*</code></td>
<td>15+</td>
<td>Command route (types, plain, octet-stream, etc.)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>Zod*</code></td>
<td>3+</td>
<td>Schema validation (ISODate, ISODateTime, types)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>LSP*</code></td>
<td>10+</td>
<td>Language Server Protocol Integration</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>dispose</code></td>
<td>3</td>
<td>Organize resources</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>get*</code> / <code>set*</code></td>
<td>majority</td>
<td>Settings/Status Access</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Certification</td>
<td>majority</td>
<td>GitHub OAuth, device code authentication</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<h3>5.3 Authentication flow (GitHub OAuth)</h3>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">sequenceDiagram
    participant CLI as Copilot CLI
    participant GH as GitHub API

    CLI->>GH: POST /login/device/code\n(client_id, scope: read:user,repo,gist)
    GH-->>CLI: device_code, user_code, verification_uri
    CLI->>User: "브라우저에서 {verification_uri} 열고\n코드 {user_code} 입력"
    loop 폴링
        CLI->>GH: POST /login/oauth/access_token\n(device_code, grant_type: device_code)
        alt 대기 중
            GH-->>CLI: error: authorization_pending
        else 승인됨
            GH-->>CLI: access_token
        end
    end
    CLI->>GH: API 호출 (Authorization: Bearer {token})
</code></pre>
<hr>
<h2>6. Session Management</h2>
<h3>6.1 Session Store (Experimental)</h3>
<p>When the <code>SESSION_STORE</code> feature flag is enabled, SQLite-based session storage is used. History, file tracking, and search between sessions are possible (reliability 🟡 medium).</p>
<h3>6.2 Remote Session</h3>
<p>The <code>CONTINUITY_REMOTE_CONTROL</code> and <code>REMOTE_SESSION_EXPORT</code> flags control remote session functionality. The <code>copilot_cli_websocket_responses</code> feature flag suggests WebSocket-based response conversion.</p>
<hr>
<h2>7. Distribution structure</h2>
<h3>7.1 npm-package/ Deployment</h3>
<pre><code>npm-package/
├── definitions/          # 에이전트 YAML (5개)
│   ├── task.agent.yaml
│   ├── explore.agent.yaml
│   ├── research.agent.yaml
│   ├── code-review.agent.yaml
│   └── configure-copilot.agent.yaml
├── prebuilds/            # 네이티브 모듈 (5 플랫폼)
│   ├── darwin-arm64/     # macOS ARM (node-pty, keytar)
│   ├── darwin-x64/       # macOS Intel
│   ├── linux-arm64/      # Linux ARM
│   ├── linux-x64/        # Linux x64
│   └── win32-x64/        # Windows (conpty, node-pty)
├── vendor/               # 벤더 바이너리
│   ├── rg (ripgrep)      # 코드 검색 엔진
│   └── tree-sitter-*.wasm  # AST 파싱
├── app.js                # 메가 번들 (520K줄)
├── preloadCommon.js      # Preload (15K줄)
├── agentWorker.js        # Worker (3K줄)
├── package.json
└── prompt/               # 프롬프트 템플릿
</code></pre>

<h2>8. Content Exclusion System</h2>
<p>A content exclusion system exists, protected by the <code>CONTENT_EXCLUSION</code> feature flag. Restrict file access by importing exclusion rules from the Copilot API (reliability 🟡 medium):</p>
<pre><code class="language-javascript">// Content Exclusion 스키마 (재구성)
const ContentExclusionRule = z.object({
  paths: z.array(z.string()),
  ifAnyMatch: z.array(z.string()).optional(),
  ifNoneMatch: z.array(z.string()).optional(),
  source: z.object({ name: z.string(), type: z.string() }),
});

const ContentExclusionConfig = z.object({
  rules: z.array(ContentExclusionRule),
  last_updated_at: z.union([z.string(), z.number()]),
  scope: z.enum(["repo", "all"]),
});
</code></pre>
