<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">sequenceDiagram
    participant User as 사용자
    participant Agent as configure-copilot
    participant FS as 파일 시스템
    participant MCP as MCP 런타임

    User->>Agent: "Postgres MCP 서버 추가해줘"
    Agent->>FS: view(mcp-config.json)
    FS-->>Agent: 현재 설정
    Agent->>FS: edit(mcp-config.json, 새 서버 추가)
    Agent->>MCP: mcp_validate(mcp-config.json)
    alt 스키마 검증 실패
        MCP-->>Agent: 에러 상세
        Agent->>FS: edit(mcp-config.json, 수정)
        Agent->>MCP: mcp_validate(재검증)
    end
    MCP-->>Agent: 검증 성공
    Agent->>MCP: mcp_reload()
    MCP-->>Agent: 서버 연결 확인
    Agent-->>User: "Postgres MCP 서버 추가 완료"
</code></pre>
<h2>Main analysis</h2>
<h1>Copilot CLI setup system analysis</h1>
<blockquote>
<p><strong>Analysis Snapshot</strong>: <code>151_copilot_cli/</code> — configuration system.</p>
</blockquote>
<blockquote>
<p>⚠️ <strong>Reverse engineering analysis</strong>: 13 configuration-related modules in <code>configure-copilot.agent.yaml</code>, MCP configuration schema, <code>decoded/07_config/</code>, <code>deobfuscated/src/app/config/settings/store.js</code> (65KB) + <code>store__1563.js</code> (11KB), and <code>marketplace.js</code> (21KB) 역공학 분석이다. Obfuscated symbol names are pattern-based guesses and may be somewhat uncertain.</p>
</blockquote>
<p>The configuration of Copilot CLI is a four-axis structure of <strong>3-layer MCP-centric configuration</strong> (user/project/workspace), <strong>JSON-based configuration store</strong> (<code>ir</code> singleton), <strong>configure-copilot AI agent</strong> (configuration automation), and <strong>GitHub Marketplace integration</strong> (plug-in ecosystem). After changing the settings, the two-step verification flow of <code>mcp_validate</code> → <code>mcp_reload</code> is forced, and plugin installation/activation is managed atomically by JSON write through the <code>installed_plugins</code> array.</p>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">graph TD
    subgraph ConfigSources["설정 소스 계층"]
        UserConfig["User Config&#x3C;br/>~/.config/copilot/mcp-config.json&#x3C;br/>{mcpServers: {...}}"]
        ProjectConfig["Project Config&#x3C;br/>.mcp.json&#x3C;br/>{servers: {...}}"]
        WorkspaceConfig["Workspace Config&#x3C;br/>.vscode/mcp.json&#x3C;br/>{servers: {...}}"]
        ClaudeSettings[".claude/settings.json&#x3C;br/>extraKnownMarketplaces"]
    end

    subgraph SettingsStore["설정 스토어 (ir 싱글톤)"]
        StoreLoad["ir.load(context)&#x3C;br/>JSON 읽기"]
        StoreWrite["ir.write(data, prefix, context)&#x3C;br/>JSON 쓰기"]
        Plugins["installed_plugins[]&#x3C;br/>name, marketplace, enabled, source"]
    end

    subgraph ConfigAgent["configure-copilot 에이전트"]
        Agent["configure-copilot.agent.yaml&#x3C;br/>claude-haiku-4.5"]
        Validate["mcp_validate&#x3C;br/>(스키마 검증)"]
        Reload["mcp_reload&#x3C;br/>(런타임 적용)"]
    end

    subgraph Marketplace["Marketplace 레지스트리"]
        BuiltIn["Built-in Marketplaces&#x3C;br/>copilot-plugins, awesome-copilot"]
        Extra["extraKnownMarketplaces&#x3C;br/>(Claude settings)"]
        Custom["사용자 정의 소스&#x3C;br/>github/url/local"]
    end

    subgraph Templates["변수 치환 시스템"]
        ConfigDir["{{configDir}}"]
        CWD["{{cwd}}"]
        Schema["{{mcpSchema}}"]
        InputVar["${input:id}"]
        EnvVar["$VAR / ${VAR:-default}"]
    end

    UserConfig --> StoreLoad
    ProjectConfig --> Agent
    WorkspaceConfig --> Agent
    ClaudeSettings -->|extraKnownMarketplaces| Marketplace
    Agent --> Validate
    Validate --> Reload
    Marketplace --> Plugins
    StoreLoad --> Plugins
    InputVar --> ProjectConfig
    EnvVar --> UserConfig
</code></pre>
<hr>
<h2>1. Settings store internal structure</h2>
<h3>1.1 <code>ir</code> singleton — JSON configuration manager</h3>
<p>The <code>ir</code> object in <code>settings/store.js</code> (65KB) is responsible for CRUD of all settings. The <code>BPe()</code> factory function takes a Zod schema and a file name and creates a type-safe configuration store:</p>
<pre><code class="language-javascript">// deobfuscated/src/app/config/settings/store__1563.js (재구성)
// ir = BPe(schema.parse, "config-filename")
// BPe 팩토리 패턴:
//   .load(context)  → JSON 파일 읽기 + Zod 파싱
//   .write(data, prefix, context)  → JSON 직렬화 + 파일 쓰기
</code></pre>
<p>Key fields in configuration data:</p>
<ul>
<li><code>installed_plugins</code> — Array of installed plugins (name, marketplace, enabled, source)</li>
<li><code>extraKnownMarketplaces</code> — define additional marketplaces</li>
<li><code>marketplaces</code> — Marketplace source registry</li>
<li><code>commandHistory</code> — Command history (separate store, maximum 50)</li>
</ul>
<h3>1.2 Command History Store</h3>
<p>The <code>commandHistory</code> dedicated store is separate from the settings store:</p>
<pre><code class="language-javascript">// store__1563.js — 명령 히스토리 Zod 스키마
const historySchema = z.object({ commandHistory: z.array(z.string()) });
const historyStore = BPe(historySchema.parse, "command-history");

class CommandHistory {
  commandHistory = [];     // 최대 50개 유지
  historyIndex = -1;       // 현재 탐색 위치
  isNavigatingHistory = false;
  unSubmittedCommand = null;
  shellPrefix = undefined;  // "!" 접두사 필터
  excludePrefix = undefined;

  async addCommand(cmd) {
    // 중복 제거 → 앞에 추가 → 50개 제한 → 저장
    this.commandHistory = this.commandHistory.filter(c => c !== cmd);
    this.commandHistory.unshift(cmd);
    this.commandHistory = this.commandHistory.slice(0, 50);
    await this.saveHistory();
  }

  searchHistory(query, startIndex = 0, options) {
    // 대소문자 무시 검색, requirePrefix/excludePrefix 필터링
    const lower = query.toLowerCase();
    for (let i = startIndex; i &#x3C; this.commandHistory.length; i++) {
      const cmd = this.commandHistory[i];
      if (options?.requirePrefix &#x26;&#x26; !cmd.startsWith(options.requirePrefix)) continue;
      if (options?.excludePrefix &#x26;&#x26; cmd.startsWith(options.excludePrefix)) continue;
      if (cmd.toLowerCase().includes(lower)) return { index: i, command: cmd };
    }
    return null;
  }
}
</code></pre>
<h3>1.3 Output buffer system</h3>
<p>The <code>Bpt</code> class manages command output line by line. The <code>maxLines</code> limit and partial line handling are key:</p>
<pre><code class="language-javascript">// store__1563.js — 출력 버퍼
class OutputBuffer {
  static MAX_PARTIAL_LENGTH = 64 * 1024;  // 64KB 부분 라인 제한
  lines = [];
  linesDropped = 0;
  partial = "";

  append(text) {
    const parts = (this.partial + text).split('\n');
    this.partial = parts.pop();
    for (const line of parts) this.lines.push(line);
    // 부분 라인이 64KB 초과 시 강제 라인 분리
    if (this.partial.length > OutputBuffer.MAX_PARTIAL_LENGTH) {
      this.lines.push(this.partial);
      this.partial = "";
    }
    // maxLines 초과 시 앞에서 제거
    if (this.lines.length > this.maxLines) {
      const excess = this.lines.length - this.maxLines;
      this.lines.splice(0, excess);
      this.linesDropped += excess;
    }
  }

  snapshot() {
    // 드롭된 라인 수 표시 + 현재 라인 + partial 결합
    const prefix = this.linesDropped > 0
      ? truncationNotice("output", "lines", this.linesDropped, "start")
      : "";
    const all = this.partial ? [...this.lines, this.partial] : this.lines;
    return prefix + all.join('\n');
  }
}
</code></pre>
<hr>
<h2>2. MCP configuration file structure</h2>
<h3>2.1 File format and key system</h3>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>tier</th>
<th>file path</th>
<th>root key</th>
<th>variable reference</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>User</td>
<td><code>{{configDir}}/mcp-config.json</code></td>
<td><code>mcpServers</code></td>
<td><code>$VAR</code>, <code>${VAR:-default}</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Project</td>
<td><code>.mcp.json</code></td>
<td><code>servers</code></td>
<td><code>${input:id}</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Workspace</td>
<td><code>.vscode/mcp.json</code></td>
<td><code>servers</code></td>
<td><code>${input:id}</code></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<p><strong>Key difference</strong>: User config uses the <code>mcpServers</code> key, Project/Workspace uses the <code>servers</code> key. This asymmetry is a similar historical decision to Claude Code's <code>pluginConfigs</code> → <code>.claude/settings.json</code>.</p>
<h3>2.2 Environment variable substitution details</h3>
<pre><code class="language-javascript">// 치환 패턴 (재구성)
// 1. 단순 변수: $VAR_NAME → process.env.VAR_NAME
// 2. 기본값 포함: ${VAR_NAME:-default_value} → 미설정 시 default_value
// 3. 입력 변수: ${input:id} → 프로젝트/워크스페이스별 동적 입력값

// User config 예시
{
  "mcpServers": {
    "my-server": {
      "command": "npx",
      "args": ["-y", "@my-org/mcp-server"],
      "env": {
        "API_KEY": "$MY_API_KEY",           // 단순 변수
        "PORT": "${PORT:-3000}",             // 기본값 포함
        "TIMEOUT": "${TIMEOUT:-30000}"
      }
    }
  }
}

// Project config 예시 — ${input:id}로 프로젝트 포터블
{
  "servers": {
    "project-server": {
      "command": "node",
      "args": ["./mcp-server.js"],
      "env": {
        "DB_URL": "${input:database_url}",   // 입력 변수
        "SECRET": "${input:api_secret}"
      }
    }
  }
}
</code></pre>
<h3>2.3 Setting priority</h3>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">graph TD
    WS["① Workspace (.vscode/mcp.json)&#x3C;br/>최우선"] --> MERGE["설정 병합"]
    PJ["② Project (.mcp.json)"] --> MERGE
    US["③ User (~/.config/copilot/mcp-config.json)&#x3C;br/>최하위"] --> MERGE
    MERGE --> VALIDATE["mcp_validate&#x3C;br/>(스키마 검증)"]
    VALIDATE -->|"에러"| FIX["수정 후 재검증"]
    FIX --> VALIDATE
    VALIDATE -->|"성공"| RELOAD["mcp_reload&#x3C;br/>(런타임 적용)"]
    RELOAD --> CONNECT["서버 연결 확인"]
</code></pre>
<hr>
<h2>3. Marketplace integration system</h2>
<h3>3.1 Built-in Marketplace</h3>
<p>Two default marketplaces hardcoded in the source code:</p>
<pre><code class="language-javascript">// store__1563.js — 기본 마켓플레이스 (재구성)
const BUILT_IN_MARKETPLACES = {
  "copilot-plugins": {
    source: { source: "github", repo: "github/copilot-plugins" },
  },
  "awesome-copilot": {
    source: { source: "github", repo: "github/awesome-copilot" },
  },
};
</code></pre>
<h3>3.2 Marketplace source type</h3>
<p>Three source types are supported, each with different interpretation logic:</p>
<pre><code class="language-javascript">// store__1563.js — 소스 타입 해석 (X6r 함수 재구성)
function resolveMarketplaceSource(request, basePath) {
  switch (request.source) {
    case "directory":
      // 로컬 디렉터리: 절대/상대 경로 지원
      return { source: "local", path: path.isAbsolute(request.path)
        ? request.path : path.resolve(basePath, request.path) };
    case "git":
      // Git URL: url + optional ref (브랜치/태그)
      return { source: "url", url: request.url, ref: request.ref };
    case "github":
      // GitHub 리포: repo (owner/name) + optional ref
      return { source: "github", repo: request.repo, ref: request.ref };
  }
}
</code></pre>
<h3>3.3 Plugin installation flow</h3>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">graph TD
    A["플러그인 spec 파싱&#x3C;br/>(github:owner/repo, marketplace:name/plugin, url:...)"] --> B{"이미 설치?"}
    B -->|"installed &#x26; enabled"| C["already_installed"]
    B -->|"installed &#x26; disabled"| D["enabled=true로 변경"]
    B -->|"미설치"| E{"spec 타입?"}
    E -->|"github/url/local"| F["installFromRepo()"]
    E -->|"marketplace"| G{"마켓플레이스 존재?"}
    G -->|"Yes"| H["installFromMarketplace()"]
    G -->|"No"| I["failed: Marketplace not found"]
    D --> J["ir.write(updated_plugins)"]
    F --> J
    H --> J
</code></pre>
<p>Enabling/disabling a plugin toggles the <code>enabled</code> field in the <code>installed_plugins</code> array and stores it atomically with <code>ir.write()</code>:</p>
<pre><code class="language-javascript">// store__1563.js — 플러그인 토글 (L6r 함수 재구성)
async function togglePlugin(plugin, enable, settings, context) {
  const current = await ir.load(context);
  const updated = (current.installed_plugins || []).map(p =>
    p.name === plugin.name &#x26;&#x26; p.marketplace === plugin.marketplace
      ? { ...p, enabled: enable }
      : p
  );
  await ir.write({ ...current, installed_plugins: updated }, "", context);
}
</code></pre>
<h3>3.4 Claude Settings integration</h3>
<p>Copilot CLI registers additional marketplaces by reading <code>extraKnownMarketplaces</code> in <code>.claude/settings.json</code>. This is designed for <strong>ecosystem cross-compatibility with Cloud Code</strong>:</p>
<pre><code class="language-javascript">// store__1563.js — Claude 설정에서 마켓플레이스 읽기 (H6r 함수 재구성)
function readClaudeMarketplaces(projectRoot) {
  if (!projectRoot) return {};
  const settingsPath = path.join(projectRoot, ".claude", "settings.json");
  if (!fs.existsSync(settingsPath)) return {};
  
  const data = JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(settingsPath, "utf-8"));
  const extra = data.extraKnownMarketplaces;
  // 각 마켓플레이스 소스를 directory/git/github 타입으로 해석
  const result = {};
  for (const [name, entry] of Object.entries(extra)) {
    const resolved = resolveMarketplaceSource(entry.source, projectRoot);
    if (resolved) result[name] = { source: resolved };
  }
  return result;
}
</code></pre>
<p>Final Marketplace Registry Merge Order:</p>
<ol>
<li><code>extraKnownMarketplaces</code> in Claude settings (lowest)</li>
<li><code>marketplaces</code> in user settings (middle)</li>
<li>Built-in (<code>copilot-plugins</code>, <code>awesome-copilot</code>) (top level)</li>
</ol>
<hr>

name: configure-copilot
model: claude-haiku-4.5
description: "MCP 서버 설정을 자동으로 수행하는 전용 에이전트"
</code></pre>
<h3>4.2 Agent toolchain</h3>

<th>Verification Step</th>
</tr>

<tbody>
<tr>

<td>Execute shell commands (server verification, etc.)</td>
<td>—</td>
</tr>

<td>Read configuration file</td>
<td>—</td>
</tr>
<tr>

<td>Modify existing settings</td>

<td>mcp_validate required</td>

<td>File navigation</td>
<td>—</td>

<h3>4.3 Verification flow details</h3>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">sequenceDiagram
    participant User as 사용자
    participant Agent as configure-copilot
    participant FS as 파일 시스템
    participant MCP as MCP 런타임

    User->>Agent: "Postgres MCP 서버 추가해줘"
    Agent->>FS: view(mcp-config.json)
    FS-->>Agent: 현재 설정
    Agent->>FS: edit(mcp-config.json, 새 서버 추가)
    Agent->>MCP: mcp_validate(mcp-config.json)
    alt 스키마 검증 실패
        MCP-->>Agent: 에러 상세
        Agent->>FS: edit(mcp-config.json, 수정)
        Agent->>MCP: mcp_validate(재검증)
    end
    MCP-->>Agent: 검증 성공
    Agent->>MCP: mcp_reload()
    MCP-->>Agent: 서버 연결 확인
    Agent-->>User: "Postgres MCP 서버 추가 완료"
</code></pre>

<h3>6.2 Content Exclusion</h3>
<p>Excludes specific files/directories from AI analysis through glob matching similar to the <code>.gitignore</code> pattern. <code>content-exclusion.js</code> (893 bytes) implements this logic, and exclusion patterns are managed in the configuration store or project settings.</p>
<h3>6.3 LSP settings</h3>

<hr>
<h2>7. Creative elements of Copilot CLI setup</h2>
<ol>
<li><strong>AI agent-based configuration</strong>: The only system in which the configuration change itself is performed by an AI agent (<code>configure-copilot</code>)</li>
<li><strong>Enforce two-step verification</strong>: Runtime safety is guaranteed by sequential execution of <code>mcp_validate</code> → <code>mcp_reload</code></li>
<li><strong>Marketplace Ecosystem</strong>: Distributed management of plugins via GitHub repo, URL, and local directory.</li>
<li><strong>Claude cross-compatibility</strong>: Share ecosystem by reading <code>extraKnownMarketplaces</code> in <code>.claude/settings.json</code></li>
<li><strong><code>${input:id}</code> variable</strong>: Runtime input binding for project portable settings.</li>
</ol>
<hr>

<td><code>deobfuscated/src/app/config/slash-heads.js</code></td>
<td>32KB</td>
<td>Slash command definition</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<h3>Reuse seam</h3>
<ul class="contains-task-list">
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> 3-tier settings (user/project/workspace) can be applied universally</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> <code>mcp_validate</code> → <code>mcp_reload</code> 2-step verification is a safe configuration change pattern</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> Environment variable expansion (<code>$VAR</code>, <code>${VAR:-default}</code>) is standard.</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> <code>${input:id}</code> variable reference is useful for project portable settings</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> Claude <code>extraKnownMarketplaces</code> Cross-reading see Ecosystem Integration</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> maxLines/partial handling of output buffer (<code>Bpt</code>) is a general purpose CLI pattern.</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" disabled> Setting-only AI agents incur AI call costs, so a trade-off is required</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" disabled> Only 3 layers exist, so there is no enterprise/MDM control</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" disabled> Difficult to debug settings due to lack of per-key origin tracking</li>
</ul>

<h1>Copilot CLI 설정 시스템 분석</h1>
<blockquote>
<p><strong>분석 스냅샷</strong>: <code>151_copilot_cli/</code> — configuration system.</p>
</blockquote>
<blockquote>
<p>⚠️ <strong>역공학 분석</strong>: <code>configure-copilot.agent.yaml</code>, MCP 설정 스키마, <code>decoded/07_config/</code> 내 설정 관련 모듈 13개, <code>deobfuscated/src/app/config/settings/store.js</code> (65KB) + <code>store__1563.js</code> (11KB), 그리고 <code>marketplace.js</code> (21KB)의 역공학 분석이다. 난독화된 심볼명은 패턴 기반 추정이며 일부 불확실할 수 있다.</p>
</blockquote>
<p>Copilot CLI의 설정은 <strong>3계층 MCP-중심 설정</strong> (user/project/workspace), <strong>JSON 기반 설정 스토어</strong> (<code>ir</code> 싱글톤), <strong>configure-copilot AI 에이전트</strong> (설정 자동화), <strong>GitHub Marketplace 통합</strong> (플러그인 생태계)의 4축 구조다. 설정 변경 후 <code>mcp_validate</code> → <code>mcp_reload</code> 2단계 검증 흐름이 강제되며, 플러그인 설치/활성화는 <code>installed_plugins</code> 배열을 통한 JSON write로 원자적으로 관리된다.</p>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">graph TD
    subgraph ConfigSources["설정 소스 계층"]
        UserConfig["User Config&#x3C;br/>~/.config/copilot/mcp-config.json&#x3C;br/>{mcpServers: {...}}"]
        ProjectConfig["Project Config&#x3C;br/>.mcp.json&#x3C;br/>{servers: {...}}"]
        WorkspaceConfig["Workspace Config&#x3C;br/>.vscode/mcp.json&#x3C;br/>{servers: {...}}"]
        ClaudeSettings[".claude/settings.json&#x3C;br/>extraKnownMarketplaces"]
    end

    subgraph SettingsStore["설정 스토어 (ir 싱글톤)"]
        StoreLoad["ir.load(context)&#x3C;br/>JSON 읽기"]
        StoreWrite["ir.write(data, prefix, context)&#x3C;br/>JSON 쓰기"]
        Plugins["installed_plugins[]&#x3C;br/>name, marketplace, enabled, source"]
    end

    subgraph ConfigAgent["configure-copilot 에이전트"]
        Agent["configure-copilot.agent.yaml&#x3C;br/>claude-haiku-4.5"]
        Validate["mcp_validate&#x3C;br/>(스키마 검증)"]
        Reload["mcp_reload&#x3C;br/>(런타임 적용)"]
    end

    subgraph Marketplace["Marketplace 레지스트리"]
        BuiltIn["Built-in Marketplaces&#x3C;br/>copilot-plugins, awesome-copilot"]
        Extra["extraKnownMarketplaces&#x3C;br/>(Claude settings)"]
        Custom["사용자 정의 소스&#x3C;br/>github/url/local"]
    end

    subgraph Templates["변수 치환 시스템"]
        ConfigDir["{{configDir}}"]
        CWD["{{cwd}}"]
        Schema["{{mcpSchema}}"]
        InputVar["${input:id}"]
        EnvVar["$VAR / ${VAR:-default}"]
    end

    UserConfig --> StoreLoad
    ProjectConfig --> Agent
    WorkspaceConfig --> Agent
    ClaudeSettings -->|extraKnownMarketplaces| Marketplace
    Agent --> Validate
    Validate --> Reload
    Marketplace --> Plugins
    StoreLoad --> Plugins
    InputVar --> ProjectConfig
    EnvVar --> UserConfig
</code></pre>
<hr>
<h2>1. 설정 스토어 내부 구조</h2>
<h3>1.1 <code>ir</code> 싱글톤 — JSON 설정 관리자</h3>
<p><code>settings/store.js</code> (65KB)의 <code>ir</code> 객체가 전체 설정의 CRUD를 담당한다. <code>BPe()</code> 팩토리 함수로 Zod 스키마와 파일명을 받아 type-safe한 설정 스토어를 생성한다:</p>
<pre><code class="language-javascript">// deobfuscated/src/app/config/settings/store__1563.js (재구성)
// ir = BPe(schema.parse, "config-filename")
// BPe 팩토리 패턴:
//   .load(context)  → JSON 파일 읽기 + Zod 파싱
//   .write(data, prefix, context)  → JSON 직렬화 + 파일 쓰기
</code></pre>
<p>설정 데이터의 주요 필드:</p>
<ul>
<li><code>installed_plugins</code> — 설치된 플러그인 배열 (name, marketplace, enabled, source)</li>
<li><code>extraKnownMarketplaces</code> — 추가 마켓플레이스 정의</li>
<li><code>marketplaces</code> — 마켓플레이스 소스 레지스트리</li>
<li><code>commandHistory</code> — 명령 히스토리 (별도 스토어, 최대 50개)</li>
</ul>
<h3>1.2 명령 히스토리 스토어</h3>
<p><code>commandHistory</code> 전용 스토어가 설정 스토어와 분리되어 있다:</p>
<pre><code class="language-javascript">// store__1563.js — 명령 히스토리 Zod 스키마
const historySchema = z.object({ commandHistory: z.array(z.string()) });
const historyStore = BPe(historySchema.parse, "command-history");

class CommandHistory {
  commandHistory = [];     // 최대 50개 유지
  historyIndex = -1;       // 현재 탐색 위치
  isNavigatingHistory = false;
  unSubmittedCommand = null;
  shellPrefix = undefined;  // "!" 접두사 필터
  excludePrefix = undefined;

  async addCommand(cmd) {
    // 중복 제거 → 앞에 추가 → 50개 제한 → 저장
    this.commandHistory = this.commandHistory.filter(c => c !== cmd);
    this.commandHistory.unshift(cmd);
    this.commandHistory = this.commandHistory.slice(0, 50);
    await this.saveHistory();
  }

  searchHistory(query, startIndex = 0, options) {
    // 대소문자 무시 검색, requirePrefix/excludePrefix 필터링
    const lower = query.toLowerCase();
    for (let i = startIndex; i &#x3C; this.commandHistory.length; i++) {
      const cmd = this.commandHistory[i];
      if (options?.requirePrefix &#x26;&#x26; !cmd.startsWith(options.requirePrefix)) continue;
      if (options?.excludePrefix &#x26;&#x26; cmd.startsWith(options.excludePrefix)) continue;
      if (cmd.toLowerCase().includes(lower)) return { index: i, command: cmd };
    }
    return null;
  }
}
</code></pre>
<h3>1.3 출력 버퍼 시스템</h3>
<p><code>Bpt</code> 클래스가 명령 출력을 라인 단위로 관리한다. <code>maxLines</code> 제한과 partial line 처리가 핵심이다:</p>
<pre><code class="language-javascript">// store__1563.js — 출력 버퍼
class OutputBuffer {
  static MAX_PARTIAL_LENGTH = 64 * 1024;  // 64KB 부분 라인 제한
  lines = [];
  linesDropped = 0;
  partial = "";

  append(text) {
    const parts = (this.partial + text).split('\n');
    this.partial = parts.pop();
    for (const line of parts) this.lines.push(line);
    // 부분 라인이 64KB 초과 시 강제 라인 분리
    if (this.partial.length > OutputBuffer.MAX_PARTIAL_LENGTH) {
      this.lines.push(this.partial);
      this.partial = "";
    }
    // maxLines 초과 시 앞에서 제거
    if (this.lines.length > this.maxLines) {
      const excess = this.lines.length - this.maxLines;
      this.lines.splice(0, excess);
      this.linesDropped += excess;
    }
  }

  snapshot() {
    // 드롭된 라인 수 표시 + 현재 라인 + partial 결합
    const prefix = this.linesDropped > 0
      ? truncationNotice("output", "lines", this.linesDropped, "start")
      : "";
    const all = this.partial ? [...this.lines, this.partial] : this.lines;
    return prefix + all.join('\n');
  }
}
</code></pre>
<hr>
<h2>2. MCP 설정 파일 구조</h2>
<h3>2.1 파일 형식과 키 체계</h3>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>계층</th>
<th>파일 경로</th>
<th>루트 키</th>
<th>변수 참조</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>User</td>
<td><code>{{configDir}}/mcp-config.json</code></td>
<td><code>mcpServers</code></td>
<td><code>$VAR</code>, <code>${VAR:-default}</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Project</td>
<td><code>.mcp.json</code></td>
<td><code>servers</code></td>
<td><code>${input:id}</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Workspace</td>
<td><code>.vscode/mcp.json</code></td>
<td><code>servers</code></td>
<td><code>${input:id}</code></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<p><strong>핵심 차이</strong>: User config는 <code>mcpServers</code> 키를, Project/Workspace는 <code>servers</code> 키를 사용한다. 이 비대칭은 Claude Code의 <code>pluginConfigs</code> → <code>.claude/settings.json</code>과 유사한 역사적 결정이다.</p>
<h3>2.2 환경 변수 치환 상세</h3>
<pre><code class="language-javascript">// 치환 패턴 (재구성)
// 1. 단순 변수: $VAR_NAME → process.env.VAR_NAME
// 2. 기본값 포함: ${VAR_NAME:-default_value} → 미설정 시 default_value
// 3. 입력 변수: ${input:id} → 프로젝트/워크스페이스별 동적 입력값

// User config 예시
{
  "mcpServers": {
    "my-server": {
      "command": "npx",
      "args": ["-y", "@my-org/mcp-server"],
      "env": {
        "API_KEY": "$MY_API_KEY",           // 단순 변수
        "PORT": "${PORT:-3000}",             // 기본값 포함
        "TIMEOUT": "${TIMEOUT:-30000}"
      }
    }
  }
}

// Project config 예시 — ${input:id}로 프로젝트 포터블
{
  "servers": {
    "project-server": {
      "command": "node",
      "args": ["./mcp-server.js"],
      "env": {
        "DB_URL": "${input:database_url}",   // 입력 변수
        "SECRET": "${input:api_secret}"
      }
    }
  }
}
</code></pre>
<h3>2.3 설정 우선순위</h3>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">graph TD
    WS["① Workspace (.vscode/mcp.json)&#x3C;br/>최우선"] --> MERGE["설정 병합"]
    PJ["② Project (.mcp.json)"] --> MERGE
    US["③ User (~/.config/copilot/mcp-config.json)&#x3C;br/>최하위"] --> MERGE
    MERGE --> VALIDATE["mcp_validate&#x3C;br/>(스키마 검증)"]
    VALIDATE -->|"에러"| FIX["수정 후 재검증"]
    FIX --> VALIDATE
    VALIDATE -->|"성공"| RELOAD["mcp_reload&#x3C;br/>(런타임 적용)"]
    RELOAD --> CONNECT["서버 연결 확인"]
</code></pre>
<hr>
<h2>3. Marketplace 통합 시스템</h2>
<h3>3.1 Built-in 마켓플레이스</h3>
<p>소스 코드에 하드코딩된 2개의 기본 마켓플레이스:</p>
<pre><code class="language-javascript">// store__1563.js — 기본 마켓플레이스 (재구성)
const BUILT_IN_MARKETPLACES = {
  "copilot-plugins": {
    source: { source: "github", repo: "github/copilot-plugins" },
  },
  "awesome-copilot": {
    source: { source: "github", repo: "github/awesome-copilot" },
  },
};
</code></pre>
<h3>3.2 마켓플레이스 소스 타입</h3>
<p>3가지 소스 타입을 지원하며, 각각 다른 해석 로직을 갖는다:</p>
<pre><code class="language-javascript">// store__1563.js — 소스 타입 해석 (X6r 함수 재구성)
function resolveMarketplaceSource(request, basePath) {
  switch (request.source) {
    case "directory":
      // 로컬 디렉터리: 절대/상대 경로 지원
      return { source: "local", path: path.isAbsolute(request.path)
        ? request.path : path.resolve(basePath, request.path) };
    case "git":
      // Git URL: url + optional ref (브랜치/태그)
      return { source: "url", url: request.url, ref: request.ref };
    case "github":
      // GitHub 리포: repo (owner/name) + optional ref
      return { source: "github", repo: request.repo, ref: request.ref };
  }
}
</code></pre>
<h3>3.3 플러그인 설치 흐름</h3>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">graph TD
    A["플러그인 spec 파싱&#x3C;br/>(github:owner/repo, marketplace:name/plugin, url:...)"] --> B{"이미 설치?"}
    B -->|"installed &#x26; enabled"| C["already_installed"]
    B -->|"installed &#x26; disabled"| D["enabled=true로 변경"]
    B -->|"미설치"| E{"spec 타입?"}
    E -->|"github/url/local"| F["installFromRepo()"]
    E -->|"marketplace"| G{"마켓플레이스 존재?"}
    G -->|"Yes"| H["installFromMarketplace()"]
    G -->|"No"| I["failed: Marketplace not found"]
    D --> J["ir.write(updated_plugins)"]
    F --> J
    H --> J
</code></pre>
<p>플러그인 활성/비활성화는 <code>installed_plugins</code> 배열의 <code>enabled</code> 필드를 토글하고 <code>ir.write()</code>로 원자적으로 저장한다:</p>
<pre><code class="language-javascript">// store__1563.js — 플러그인 토글 (L6r 함수 재구성)
async function togglePlugin(plugin, enable, settings, context) {
  const current = await ir.load(context);
  const updated = (current.installed_plugins || []).map(p =>
    p.name === plugin.name &#x26;&#x26; p.marketplace === plugin.marketplace
      ? { ...p, enabled: enable }
      : p
  );
  await ir.write({ ...current, installed_plugins: updated }, "", context);
}
</code></pre>
<h3>3.4 Claude Settings 통합</h3>
<p>Copilot CLI는 <code>.claude/settings.json</code>의 <code>extraKnownMarketplaces</code>를 읽어 추가 마켓플레이스를 등록한다. 이는 <strong>Claude Code와의 생태계 교차 호환</strong>을 위한 설계다:</p>
<pre><code class="language-javascript">// store__1563.js — Claude 설정에서 마켓플레이스 읽기 (H6r 함수 재구성)
function readClaudeMarketplaces(projectRoot) {
  if (!projectRoot) return {};
  const settingsPath = path.join(projectRoot, ".claude", "settings.json");
  if (!fs.existsSync(settingsPath)) return {};
  
  const data = JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(settingsPath, "utf-8"));
  const extra = data.extraKnownMarketplaces;
  // 각 마켓플레이스 소스를 directory/git/github 타입으로 해석
  const result = {};
  for (const [name, entry] of Object.entries(extra)) {
    const resolved = resolveMarketplaceSource(entry.source, projectRoot);
    if (resolved) result[name] = { source: resolved };
  }
  return result;
}
</code></pre>
<p>최종 마켓플레이스 레지스트리 병합 순서:</p>
<ol>
<li>Claude settings의 <code>extraKnownMarketplaces</code> (최하위)</li>
<li>사용자 설정의 <code>marketplaces</code> (중간)</li>
<li>Built-in (<code>copilot-plugins</code>, <code>awesome-copilot</code>) (최상위)</li>
</ol>
<hr>
<h2>4. configure-copilot AI 에이전트</h2>
<h3>4.1 에이전트 정의</h3>
<pre><code class="language-yaml"># configure-copilot.agent.yaml
name: configure-copilot
model: claude-haiku-4.5
description: "MCP 서버 설정을 자동으로 수행하는 전용 에이전트"
</code></pre>
<h3>4.2 에이전트 도구 체인</h3>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>

</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<h3>4.3 검증 흐름 상세</h3>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">sequenceDiagram
    participant User as 사용자
    participant Agent as configure-copilot
    participant FS as 파일 시스템
    participant MCP as MCP 런타임

    User->>Agent: "Postgres MCP 서버 추가해줘"
    Agent->>FS: view(mcp-config.json)
    FS-->>Agent: 현재 설정
    Agent->>FS: edit(mcp-config.json, 새 서버 추가)
    Agent->>MCP: mcp_validate(mcp-config.json)
    alt 스키마 검증 실패
        MCP-->>Agent: 에러 상세
        Agent->>FS: edit(mcp-config.json, 수정)
        Agent->>MCP: mcp_validate(재검증)
    end
    MCP-->>Agent: 검증 성공
    Agent->>MCP: mcp_reload()
    MCP-->>Agent: 서버 연결 확인
    Agent-->>User: "Postgres MCP 서버 추가 완료"
</code></pre>
<hr>

<h3>6.2 컨텐트 제외</h3>
<p><code>.gitignore</code> 패턴과 유사한 glob 매칭으로 특정 파일/디렉터리를 AI 분석에서 제외한다. <code>content-exclusion.js</code> (893 bytes)가 이 로직을 구현하며, 제외 패턴은 설정 스토어 또는 프로젝트 설정에서 관리된다.</p>

<h2>7. Copilot CLI 설정의 독창적 요소</h2>
<ol>
<li><strong>AI 에이전트 기반 설정</strong>: 설정 변경 자체를 AI 에이전트(<code>configure-copilot</code>)가 수행하는 유일한 시스템</li>
<li><strong>2단계 검증 강제</strong>: <code>mcp_validate</code> → <code>mcp_reload</code> 순차 실행으로 런타임 안전성 보장</li>
<li><strong>Marketplace 생태계</strong>: GitHub 리포, URL, 로컬 디렉터리를 통한 플러그인 분산 관리</li>
<li><strong>Claude 교차 호환</strong>: <code>.claude/settings.json</code>의 <code>extraKnownMarketplaces</code>를 읽어 생태계 공유</li>
<li><strong><code>${input:id}</code> 변수</strong>: 프로젝트 포터블한 설정을 위한 런타임 입력 바인딩</li>
</ol>

<h3>재사용 seam</h3>
<ul class="contains-task-list">
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> 3계층 설정 (user/project/workspace)은 범용적으로 적용 가능</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> <code>mcp_validate</code> → <code>mcp_reload</code> 2단계 검증은 안전한 설정 변경 패턴</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> 환경 변수 확장 (<code>$VAR</code>, <code>${VAR:-default}</code>)은 표준적</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> <code>${input:id}</code> 변수 참조는 프로젝트 포터블한 설정에 유용</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> Claude <code>extraKnownMarketplaces</code> 교차 읽기는 생태계 통합 참조</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> 출력 버퍼(<code>Bpt</code>)의 maxLines/partial 처리는 범용 CLI 패턴</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" disabled> 설정 전용 AI 에이전트는 AI 호출 비용이 발생하므로 trade-off 필요</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" disabled> 3계층만 존재하여 enterprise/MDM 통제가 없음</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" disabled> per-key origin 추적이 없어 설정 디버깅이 어려움</li>
</ul>

22:["$","$L2d","20-axis-08-config",{"id":"20-axis-08-config","order":30,"tier":"deep","title":"Axis 08: Config system","description":"008_config-system/08_cp_config.md","lang":"en","badge":"AXIS","children":["$","div",null,{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"$49"}}]}]
4a:T14c11,<h2>Overview</h2>
<p><strong>Axis 09: MCP orchestration</strong> — developer-depth section from the codex corpus. Structural highlights extracted from the analysis:</p>
<ul>
<li>
<blockquote>
<p><strong>분석 스냅샷</strong>: <code>151_copilot_cli/</code> — MCP orchestration.</p>
</blockquote>
</li>
<li>Copilot CLI의 MCP는 단순 "외부 도구 한 번 실행"이 아니다. 설정 3계층(user/project/workspace)에서 서버 정의를 모으고, <code>McpHost</code>가 stdio transport로 서버를 시작하고, 3개의 독립 Reporter가 연결 상태를 감시하고, <code>McpToolsProvider</code>가 서버별 도구를 필터링해 agent에 주입하고, 호출 시마다 ACP 이벤트에 MCP 메타데이터를 자동 포함하며, `mc</li>
<li>Copilot CLI의 MCP 설정은 세 가지 소스에서 합쳐진다.</li>
<li>첫째, <code>mcp-config.json</code>은 사용자 수준 설정이다. 둘째, 프로젝트 루트의 <code>.mcp.json</code>은 프로젝트 수준이다. 셋째, <code>.vscode/mcp.json</code>은 워크스페이스 수준이다. 이 세 소스의 <code>mcpServers</code> 맵이 합쳐져 최종 서버 레지스트리가 된다.</li>
<li>서버 시작은 <code>McpHost.startServer(name, config)</code>가 담당한다. transport는 <code>command</code>, <code>args</code>, <code>env</code>를 받는 stdio 방식이다. 환경 변수에는 <code>$VAR</code>과 <code>${VAR:-default}</code> 두 가지 확장 문법이 지원된다.</li>
<li>연결 상태는 <code>starting</code>, <code>connected</code>, <code>failed</code> 세 단계로 관리된다. 이 상태는 단일 콜백이 아니라 3개의 독립 Reporter가 각각 소비한다. <code>SlowConnectionReporter</code>는 연결 지연을 감시하고, <code>ConnectionCompletionReporter</code>는 전체 서버 초기화 완료를 추적하며, <code>TelemetryReporter</code>는 연결 성공/실패와 소요 시간을 원격 측정으로 보낸다. 이</li>
<li>도구 호출은 agent loop와 직접 결합된다. ACP 이벤트 스키마의 <code>tool.execution_start</code>에 <code>mcpServerName</code>과 <code>mcpToolName</code>이 포함되고, 권한 요청은 <code>kind: "mcp"</code> 전용 레코드로 분리된다. <code>readOnly</code> 플래그에 따라 자동 승인 여부가 결정된다.</li>
<li>graph TD</li>
<li>subgraph Config["설정 3계층"]</li>
<li>User["mcp-config.json사용자 수준"]</li>
<li>Project[".mcp.json프로젝트 수준"]</li>
<li>Workspace[".vscode/mcp.json워크스페이스 수준"]</li>
</ul>

    end

    User --> Registry
    Project --> Registry
    Workspace --> Registry
    Registry --> Transport
    Transport --> Reporters
    Slow --> |"session.warning"| SlashCmd
    Complete --> |"onComplete/onServerConnected"| Integration
    Telemetry --> |"telemetry event"| Integration

</code></pre>
<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-javascript">// src/app/session/slash-mcp.js — SlowConnectionReporter (복원)
class SlowConnectionReporter {
  slowConnectionTimeouts = new Map();
  slowConnectionThresholdMs;  // 기본값 10000ms
  session;

  onServerStatus(name, status) {
    if (status.status === "starting")
      this.handleStarting(name);     // timeout 등록
    else if (status.status === "connected")
      this.handleConnected(name);    // timeout 해제
    else if (status.status === "failed")
      this.handleFailed(name);       // 실패 경고
  }

  handleStarting(name) {
    // 기본 10초 후 경고 발행
    const timeout = setTimeout(() => {
      this.emitWarning(
        `MCP server '${name}' is taking longer than expected to connect.`
      );
    }, this.slowConnectionThresholdMs);
    this.slowConnectionTimeouts.set(name, timeout);
  }

  handleFailed(name) {
    this.emitWarning(
      `Failed to connect to MCP server '${name}'. Execute '/mcp show ${name}' to inspect or check the logs.`
    );
  }

  emitWarning(message) {
    this.session.emit("session.warning", { warningType: "mcp", message });
  }
}
</code></pre>
<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-javascript">// src/app/session/slash-mcp.js — ConnectionCompletionReporter (복원)
class ConnectionCompletionReporter {
  startingServers = new Set();
  connectedServers = [];
  hasReportedComplete = false;

  onServerStatus(name, status) {
    if (status.status === "starting")
      this.startingServers.add(name);
    else if (status.status === "connected") {
      this.startingServers.delete(name);
      if (!this.connectedServers.includes(name))
        this.connectedServers.push(name);
      this.callback.onServerConnected?.(this.connectedServers.length);
      this.checkComplete();
    } else if (status.status === "failed") {
      this.startingServers.delete(name);
      this.checkComplete();
    }
  }

  checkComplete() {
    if (this.startingServers.size === 0 &#x26;&#x26; !this.hasReportedComplete) {
      this.hasReportedComplete = true;
      this.callback.onComplete(this.connectedServers);
    }
  }
}
</code></pre>
<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-javascript">// src/app/session/slash-mcp.js — TelemetryReporter (복원)
class TelemetryReporter {
  startTimes = new Map();

  onServerStatus(name, status) {
    if (status.status === "starting")
      this.startTimes.set(name, Date.now());
    else if (status.status === "connected")
      this.emitSetupEvent(name, true);
    else if (status.status === "failed")
      this.emitErrorEvent(name, "connection_failed", status.error);
  }

  emitSetupEvent(name, success) {
    const startTime = this.startTimes.get(name);
    const durationMs = startTime !== undefined ? Date.now() - startTime : 0;
    const config = this.mcpHost.getConfig().mcpServers[name];
    // type, isDefaultServer, source, sourcePlugin, sourcePluginVersion 포함
    this.telemetrySender.sendTelemetry(
      createSetupTelemetry(name, config.type, config.isDefaultServer, success, durationMs,
        config.source, config.sourcePlugin, config.sourcePluginVersion)
    );
  }
}
</code></pre>
<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-javascript">// src/app/mcp/onCompactionComplete.js:672-706 — McpToolsProvider (복원)
class McpToolsProvider {
  constructor(mcpHost, settings, permissions = { requestRequired: false }) {
    this.mcpHost = mcpHost;
    this.settings = settings;
    this.permissions = permissions;
  }

  async addServerAndGetTools(name, config, logger, agentName) {
    await this.mcpHost.startServer(name, config);
    const allTools = await this.mcpHost.getTools(
      this.settings, logger, this.permissions
    );
    // 서버 이름 prefix로 필터링
    const prefix = `${sanitize(name)}-`;
    const serverTools = allTools.filter(
      t => t.name.startsWith(prefix) || t.namespacedName?.startsWith(`${name}/`)
    );
    return {
      tools: serverTools,
      shutdownMcpServers: async () => this.mcpHost.stopServer(name)
    };
  }
}
</code></pre>
<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-javascript">// src/app/mcp/agent-mcp-tools.js — setupAgentMcpServers (복원)
async function setupAgentMcpServers(logger, agentDefinition, mcpToolsProvider) {
  if (!agentDefinition.mcpServers ||
      Object.keys(agentDefinition.mcpServers).length === 0 ||
      !mcpToolsProvider)
    return { tools: [], shutdownMcpServers: async () => {}, serverNames: [] };

  const shutdownFns = [];
  const tools = [];
  const serverNames = [];

  for (const [name, config] of Object.entries(agentDefinition.mcpServers)) {
    const normalizedName = normalizeServerName(name);
    serverNames.push(normalizedName);
    const result = await mcpToolsProvider.addServerAndGetTools(
      normalizedName, config, logger, agentDefinition.name
    );
    tools.push(...result.tools);
    shutdownFns.push(result.shutdownMcpServers);
  }

  return {
    tools,
    serverNames,
    shutdownMcpServers: async () => {
      await Promise.allSettled(shutdownFns.map(fn => fn()));
    }
  };
}
</code></pre>
<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-text">┌──────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│ MCP Server "serverName" requests you to visit    │
│ a URL                                            │
│ [메시지 내용]                                      │
│                                                  │
│ https://example.com/auth/callback                │
│ Accepting will open this URL in your default     │
│ browser.                                         │
│                                                  │
│ enter: accept &#x26; open  |  esc: cancel             │
└──────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
</code></pre>
<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-javascript">// src/app/session/slash-mcp.js — useElicitationQueue (복원)
function useElicitationQueue(enableBeep) {
  const [queue, setQueue] = useState([]);
  const [current, setCurrent] = useState(null);

  // current가 null이고 queue에 아이템이 있으면 다음 아이템을 꺼냄
  useEffect(() => {
    if (current === null &#x26;&#x26; queue.length > 0) {
      if (enableBeep) process.stdout.write(beep);
      setCurrent(queue[0]);
      setQueue(q => q.slice(1));
    }
  }, [current, queue, enableBeep]);

  return {
    current,
    enqueue: (item) => setQueue(q => [...q, item]),
    resolve: (result) => { current?.resolve(result); setCurrent(null); },
    reject: (error) => { current?.reject(error); setCurrent(null); }
  };
}
</code></pre>
<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-javascript">// src/app/mcp/onCompactionComplete.js — MCP namespace normalization (복원)
function normalizeServerNamePrefix(name) {
  if (name.startsWith("io.github.github/github-mcp-server/") ||
      name.startsWith("io.github/github-mcp-server/"))
    return `github-mcp-server/${name.substring(name.lastIndexOf("/") + 1)}`;
  if (name.startsWith("github/github-mcp-server/"))
    return name.replace("github/github-mcp-server/", "github-mcp-server/");
  if (name.startsWith("com.microsoft/playwright-mcp/") ||
      name.startsWith("microsoft/playwright-mcp/"))
    return `playwright/${name.substring(name.lastIndexOf("/") + 1)}`;
  if (name.startsWith("github/"))
    return name.replace("github/", "github-mcp-server/");
  return name;
}
</code></pre>
<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-javascript">function parseMcpToolName(name) {
  if (!name.includes("/")) return null;
  const parsed = parseMcpName(name);  // serverName/toolName 분리
  if (!parsed) return null;
  return { mcpToolName: parsed.mcpToolName };
}
</code></pre>

<h2>Main analysis</h2>
<h1>Copilot CLI MCP orchestration analysis</h1>
<blockquote>
<p><strong>Analysis Snapshot</strong>: <code>151_copilot_cli/</code> — MCP orchestration.</p>
</blockquote>
<p>Copilot CLI's MCP is not simply "run an external tool once." Server definitions are collected from the three configuration layers (user/project/workspace), <code>McpHost</code> starts the server with stdio transport, 3 independent reporters monitor the connection status, <code>McpToolsProvider</code> filters tools for each server and injects them into the agent, automatically includes MCP metadata in the ACP event every time it is called, and even supports reflection of runtime settings with <code>mcp_validate</code> and <code>mcp_reload</code>. Here, when the MCP server requests URL or form input, <code>McpElicitationHandler</code> processes it as a TUI component.</p>
<p>The reason why this structure is important is because Copilot CLI treats the GitHub MCP server as a first-party default server, but also manages third-party MCP servers declared by custom agents in the same pipeline. Additionally, the direct connection to the MCP registry ecosystem through the MCPB (MCP Builder) manifest schema is a unique extension axis that is difficult to find in other agents.</p>
<h2>Overview</h2>
<p>Copilot CLI's MCP settings come from three sources:</p>
<p>First, <code>mcp-config.json</code> is a user-level configuration. Second, <code>.mcp.json</code> in the project root is at the project level. Third, <code>.vscode/mcp.json</code> is at the workspace level. The <code>mcpServers</code> maps from these three sources are combined to form the final server registry.</p>
<p><code>McpHost.startServer(name, config)</code> is responsible for starting the server. Transport is a stdio method that receives <code>command</code>, <code>args</code>, and <code>env</code>. Two extension syntaxes are supported for environment variables: <code>$VAR</code> and <code>${VAR:-default}</code>.</p>
<p>The connection status is managed in three stages: <code>starting</code>, <code>connected</code>, and <code>failed</code>. This state is not consumed by a single callback, but by three independent Reporters each. <code>SlowConnectionReporter</code> monitors connection delays, <code>ConnectionCompletionReporter</code> tracks full server initialization completion, and <code>TelemetryReporter</code> sends telemetry of connection success/failure and time taken. This three-layer separation is the structural core of Copilot CLI MCP.</p>
<p>Tool calls are directly coupled to the agent loop. <code>tool.execution_start</code> in the ACP event schema includes <code>mcpServerName</code> and <code>mcpToolName</code>, and the permission request is separated into a record dedicated to <code>kind: "mcp"</code>. Automatic approval is determined depending on the <code>readOnly</code> flag.</p>
<h2>Architecture</h2>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">graph TD
    subgraph Config["설정 3계층"]
        User["mcp-config.json&#x3C;br/>사용자 수준"]
        Project[".mcp.json&#x3C;br/>프로젝트 수준"]
        Workspace[".vscode/mcp.json&#x3C;br/>워크스페이스 수준"]
    end

    subgraph Host["McpHost"]
        Registry["서버 레지스트리&#x3C;br/>(name → config)"]
        Transport["stdio Transport&#x3C;br/>(command + args + env)"]
    end

    subgraph Reporters["3 Reporter 패턴"]
        Slow["SlowConnectionReporter&#x3C;br/>지연 경고 (기본 10초)"]
        Complete["ConnectionCompletionReporter&#x3C;br/>전체 서버 초기화 추적"]
        Telemetry["TelemetryReporter&#x3C;br/>연결 성공/실패 측정"]
    end

    subgraph McpToolsProvider["McpToolsProvider"]
        GetTools["getTools()&#x3C;br/>이름 prefix 필터링"]
        AddServer["addServerAndGetTools()&#x3C;br/>서버 시작 + 도구 수집"]
        Shutdown["shutdownMcpServers()&#x3C;br/>정리"]
    end

    subgraph Elicitation["MCP Elicitation"]
        UrlUI["URL 엘리시테이션&#x3C;br/>브라우저 열기"]
        FormUI["Form 엘리시테이션&#x3C;br/>SchemaForm 기반"]
    end

    subgraph Integration["ACP 통합"]
        ToolExec["tool.execution_start&#x3C;br/>(mcpServerName, mcpToolName)"]
        Permission["권한: kind=mcp&#x3C;br/>(serverName, readOnly)"]
        SlashCmd["/mcp enable|show&#x3C;br/>런타임 관리"]
    end

    User --> Registry
    Project --> Registry
    Workspace --> Registry
    Registry --> Transport
    Transport --> Reporters
    Slow --> |"session.warning"| SlashCmd
    Complete --> |"onComplete/onServerConnected"| Integration
    Telemetry --> |"telemetry event"| Integration
    Transport --> McpToolsProvider
    McpToolsProvider --> ToolExec
    ToolExec --> Permission
    Transport --> Elicitation
</code></pre>
<p>The key to this structure is that <code>McpHost</code> and <code>McpToolsProvider</code> are separate. <code>McpHost</code> is responsible for the server lifecycle (start/stop/configuration updates), and <code>McpToolsProvider</code> filters the tools for use by the agent and normalizes their names.</p>
<h2>Core components</h2>
<h3>1. <code>McpHost</code> and the server life cycle</h3>
<p><code>McpHost</code> manages the server registry and is responsible for making the actual connection. The core interfaces reverse-engineered from <code>src/app/session/slash-mcp.js</code> are as follows.</p>
<ul>
<li><code>startServer(name, config)</code>: Starts the server and connects stdio transport.</li>
<li><code>stopServer(name)</code>: Stops the server</li>
<li><code>getConfig()</code>: Returns the current <code>mcpServers</code> configuration.</li>
<li><code>getTools(settings, logger, permissions)</code>: Get a list of tools from a connected server.</li>
</ul>
<p>Special normalization is applied to server names. <code>normalizeServerName()</code> converts the name <code>"github"</code> to <code>"github-mcp-server"</code>. This is evidence that the GitHub MCP server has a special position as a first-party default server.</p>
<h3>2. 3 Reporter connection monitoring pattern</h3>
<p>Connection state consumption is how <code>CompositeReporter</code> binds multiple Reporters. Each Reporter implements the <code>onServerStatus(name, status)</code> interface.</p>
<h4>SlowConnectionReporter</h4>
<pre><code class="language-javascript">// src/app/session/slash-mcp.js — SlowConnectionReporter (복원)
class SlowConnectionReporter {
  slowConnectionTimeouts = new Map();
  slowConnectionThresholdMs;  // 기본값 10000ms
  session;

  onServerStatus(name, status) {
    if (status.status === "starting")
      this.handleStarting(name);     // timeout 등록
    else if (status.status === "connected")
      this.handleConnected(name);    // timeout 해제
    else if (status.status === "failed")
      this.handleFailed(name);       // 실패 경고
  }

  handleStarting(name) {
    // 기본 10초 후 경고 발행
    const timeout = setTimeout(() => {
      this.emitWarning(
        `MCP server '${name}' is taking longer than expected to connect.`
      );
    }, this.slowConnectionThresholdMs);
    this.slowConnectionTimeouts.set(name, timeout);
  }

  handleFailed(name) {
    this.emitWarning(
      `Failed to connect to MCP server '${name}'. Execute '/mcp show ${name}' to inspect or check the logs.`
    );
  }

  emitWarning(message) {
    this.session.emit("session.warning", { warningType: "mcp", message });
  }
}
</code></pre>
<p>This Reporter immediately alerts the user when there is a connection delay and guides the user to the <code>/mcp show</code> command in case of failure.</p>
<h4>ConnectionCompletionReporter</h4>
<pre><code class="language-javascript">// src/app/session/slash-mcp.js — ConnectionCompletionReporter (복원)
class ConnectionCompletionReporter {
  startingServers = new Set();
  connectedServers = [];
  hasReportedComplete = false;

  onServerStatus(name, status) {
    if (status.status === "starting")
      this.startingServers.add(name);
    else if (status.status === "connected") {
      this.startingServers.delete(name);
      if (!this.connectedServers.includes(name))
        this.connectedServers.push(name);
      this.callback.onServerConnected?.(this.connectedServers.length);
      this.checkComplete();
    } else if (status.status === "failed") {
      this.startingServers.delete(name);
      this.checkComplete();
    }
  }

  checkComplete() {
    if (this.startingServers.size === 0 &#x26;&#x26; !this.hasReportedComplete) {
      this.hasReportedComplete = true;
      this.callback.onComplete(this.connectedServers);
    }
  }
}
</code></pre>
<p>This Reporter tracks whether "all servers have reached a state" and issues a startup completion event only once.</p>
<h4>TelemetryReporter</h4>
<pre><code class="language-javascript">// src/app/session/slash-mcp.js — TelemetryReporter (복원)
class TelemetryReporter {
  startTimes = new Map();

  onServerStatus(name, status) {
    if (status.status === "starting")
      this.startTimes.set(name, Date.now());
    else if (status.status === "connected")
      this.emitSetupEvent(name, true);
    else if (status.status === "failed")
      this.emitErrorEvent(name, "connection_failed", status.error);
  }

  emitSetupEvent(name, success) {
    const startTime = this.startTimes.get(name);
    const durationMs = startTime !== undefined ? Date.now() - startTime : 0;
    const config = this.mcpHost.getConfig().mcpServers[name];
    // type, isDefaultServer, source, sourcePlugin, sourcePluginVersion 포함
    this.telemetrySender.sendTelemetry(
      createSetupTelemetry(name, config.type, config.isDefaultServer, success, durationMs,
        config.source, config.sourcePlugin, config.sourcePluginVersion)
    );
  }
}
</code></pre>
<p>This Reporter includes the connection time for each server, whether it was successful or not, whether it is the default server, and even the source of the plugin in its telemetry. The <code>isDefaultServer</code> and <code>sourcePlugin</code> fields are used to track the origin of the GitHub MCP server and extension MCP.</p>
<h3>3. <code>McpToolsProvider</code>: Agent-specific tools injection</h3>
<p>The <code>McpToolsProvider</code> class takes <code>mcpHost</code>, <code>settings</code>, and <code>permissions</code> and injects MCP tools into the agent.</p>
<pre><code class="language-javascript">// src/app/mcp/onCompactionComplete.js:672-706 — McpToolsProvider (복원)
class McpToolsProvider {
  constructor(mcpHost, settings, permissions = { requestRequired: false }) {
    this.mcpHost = mcpHost;
    this.settings = settings;
    this.permissions = permissions;
  }

  async addServerAndGetTools(name, config, logger, agentName) {
    await this.mcpHost.startServer(name, config);
    const allTools = await this.mcpHost.getTools(
      this.settings, logger, this.permissions
    );
    // 서버 이름 prefix로 필터링
    const prefix = `${sanitize(name)}-`;
    const serverTools = allTools.filter(
      t => t.name.startsWith(prefix) || t.namespacedName?.startsWith(`${name}/`)
    );
    return {
      tools: serverTools,
      shutdownMcpServers: async () => this.mcpHost.stopServer(name)
    };
  }
}
</code></pre>
<p>The key point is tool name filtering. MCP tools are exposed in the format <code>sanitize(serverName) + "-" + toolName</code>. At the same time, <code>namespacedName</code> is stored in parallel in <code>serverName/toolName</code> format. Because of this dual naming system, permission rules and tool searches work with both formats.</p>
<h3>4. Agent MCP server settings</h3>
<p><code>setupAgentMcpServers()</code> starts servers and collects tools according to the custom agent's <code>mcpServers</code> declaration.</p>
<pre><code class="language-javascript">// src/app/mcp/agent-mcp-tools.js — setupAgentMcpServers (복원)
async function setupAgentMcpServers(logger, agentDefinition, mcpToolsProvider) {
  if (!agentDefinition.mcpServers ||
      Object.keys(agentDefinition.mcpServers).length === 0 ||
      !mcpToolsProvider)
    return { tools: [], shutdownMcpServers: async () => {}, serverNames: [] };

  const shutdownFns = [];
  const tools = [];
  const serverNames = [];

  for (const [name, config] of Object.entries(agentDefinition.mcpServers)) {
    const normalizedName = normalizeServerName(name);
    serverNames.push(normalizedName);
    const result = await mcpToolsProvider.addServerAndGetTools(
      normalizedName, config, logger, agentDefinition.name
    );
    tools.push(...result.tools);
    shutdownFns.push(result.shutdownMcpServers);
  }

  return {
    tools,
    serverNames,
    shutdownMcpServers: async () => {
      await Promise.allSettled(shutdownFns.map(fn => fn()));
    }
  };
}
</code></pre>
<p>Shutdown is handled by <code>Promise.allSettled()</code>, so failure to shut down one server does not prevent other servers from being cleaned up.</p>
<h3>5. MCP Elicitation UI</h3>
<p>Copilot CLI provides two TUI components when the MCP server requests user input.</p>
<h4>URL Elicitation</h4>
<p>When the server requests to visit a URL with <code>mode: "url"</code>, <code>McpUrlElicitation</code> is rendered.</p>
<pre><code>┌──────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│ MCP Server "serverName" requests you to visit    │
│ a URL                                            │
│ [메시지 내용]                                      │
│                                                  │
│ https://example.com/auth/callback                │
│ Accepting will open this URL in your default     │
│ browser.                                         │
│                                                  │
│ enter: accept &#x26; open  |  esc: cancel             │
└──────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
</code></pre>
<p>When the user presses Enter, the URL is opened with <code>openInBrowser()</code> and the server responds with <code>resolve({ action: "accept" })</code>. If opening the browser fails, you will be prompted to manually copy the URL.</p>
<h4>Form Elicitation</h4>
<p>When the server requests structured input with <code>mode: "form"</code>, <code>McpFormElicitation</code> is rendered as a <code>SchemaForm</code> component. When a JSON Schema-based form is displayed and the user enters a value, it is sent to the server as <code>resolve({ action: "accept", content: formData })</code>.</p>
<p>If <code>elicitationSource</code> is <code>"__copilot_agent__"</code>, it is displayed as "Copilot is requesting information", otherwise it is displayed as <code>"MCP Server \"name\" is requesting information"</code>.</p>
<h3>6. Elicitation queue management</h3>
<p>MCP elicitation requests are serialized with the <code>useElicitationQueue()</code> hook.</p>
<pre><code class="language-javascript">// src/app/session/slash-mcp.js — useElicitationQueue (복원)
function useElicitationQueue(enableBeep) {
  const [queue, setQueue] = useState([]);
  const [current, setCurrent] = useState(null);

  // current가 null이고 queue에 아이템이 있으면 다음 아이템을 꺼냄
  useEffect(() => {
    if (current === null &#x26;&#x26; queue.length > 0) {
      if (enableBeep) process.stdout.write(beep);
      setCurrent(queue[0]);
      setQueue(q => q.slice(1));
    }
  }, [current, queue, enableBeep]);

  return {
    current,
    enqueue: (item) => setQueue(q => [...q, item]),
    resolve: (result) => { current?.resolve(result); setCurrent(null); },
    reject: (error) => { current?.reject(error); setCurrent(null); }
  };
}
</code></pre>
<p>This queue only activates one elicitation at a time, and automatically pulls out the next request after processing is complete. If <code>enableBeep</code> is true, a new request will cause a terminal beep.</p>
<h3>7. MCP tool name normalization and namespace</h3>
<p>Tool name mapping is handled in <code>Ovr()</code> (resolveToolsByPermissions`). This function maps the tool name specified in the permission rule to the actual tool object, and a special path exists for MCP tools.</p>
<pre><code class="language-javascript">// src/app/mcp/onCompactionComplete.js — MCP namespace normalization (복원)
function normalizeServerNamePrefix(name) {
  if (name.startsWith("io.github.github/github-mcp-server/") ||
      name.startsWith("io.github/github-mcp-server/"))
    return `github-mcp-server/${name.substring(name.lastIndexOf("/") + 1)}`;
  if (name.startsWith("github/github-mcp-server/"))
    return name.replace("github/github-mcp-server/", "github-mcp-server/");
  if (name.startsWith("com.microsoft/playwright-mcp/") ||
      name.startsWith("microsoft/playwright-mcp/"))
    return `playwright/${name.substring(name.lastIndexOf("/") + 1)}`;
  if (name.startsWith("github/"))
    return name.replace("github/", "github-mcp-server/");
  return name;
}
</code></pre>
<p>This canonicalization converts the fully qualified name (<code>io.github.github/github-mcp-server/tool</code>) in the MCPB registry to a short name (<code>github-mcp-server/tool</code>). <code>playwright-mcp</code> is abbreviated to <code>playwright/tool</code> in the same way.</p>
<p>The MCP tool also supports namespacedName in the format <code>server/tool</code>.</p>
<pre><code class="language-javascript">function parseMcpToolName(name) {
  if (!name.includes("/")) return null;
  const parsed = parseMcpName(name);  // serverName/toolName 분리
  if (!parsed) return null;
  return { mcpToolName: parsed.mcpToolName };
}
</code></pre>
<h3>8. Azure DevOps MCP Policy</h3>
<p>The GitHub MCP server is automatically disabled in Azure DevOps repositories.</p>
<pre><code class="language-javascript">// src/app/mcp/slash-mcp.js — Azure DevOps 감지
if (detectionResult.hasAzureDevOps &#x26;&#x26; !detectionResult.hasGitHub) {
  emit({
    type: "info",
    text: "Detected Azure DevOps repository. GitHub MCP server has been disabled. " +
          "Use /mcp enable github-mcp-server to re-enable."
  });
}
</code></pre>
<p>This policy reflects that GitHub MCP servers are only meaningful for GitHub repositories. In an Azure DevOps environment, unnecessary connection attempts are prevented while manual reactivation is allowed with <code>/mcp enable</code>.</p>
<h3>9. MCPB Manifest Schema</h3>
<p>Copilot CLI includes a manifest schema that connects to the MCPB (MCP Builder) registry. This schema, defined in <code>src/app/export_surface/McpbManifestSchema.js</code>, includes the MCP server's package metadata, transport declaration, and variable definitions.</p>
<pre><code class="language-javascript">// McpbManifestSchema (복원)
const McpbManifestSchema = z.object({
  manifest_version: z.string().optional(),
  dxt_version: z.string().optional(),
  server: z.object({
    type: z.enum(["python", "node", "binary"]),
    entry_point: z.string(),
    mcp_config: z.object({
      command: z.string(),
      args: z.array(z.string()).optional(),
      env: z.record(z.string(), z.string()).optional(),
      platform_overrides: z.record(z.string(), PlatformOverride).optional()
    })
  }),
  _meta: z.record(z.string(), z.unknown()).optional()
}).passthrough();
</code></pre>
<p>Registry server entries are more abundant.</p>
<pre><code class="language-javascript">const McpRegistryServer = z.object({
  name: z.string(),
  description: z.string(),
  version: z.string(),
  repository: z.object({ id, source, subfolder, url }).optional(),
  websiteUrl: z.string().optional(),
  icons: z.array(Icon).optional(),
  packages: z.array(Package).nullable().optional(),
  remotes: z.array(Remote).nullable().optional()
});
</code></pre>
<p><code>packages</code> contains stdio information for local execution, and <code>remotes</code> contains HTTP/SSE remote connection information. Three discriminated unions are supported for <code>transport</code>: <code>stdio</code>, <code>streamable-http</code>, and <code>sse</code>.</p>
<p>The existence of this schema means that Copilot CLI is not a simple MCP client, but also prepares an MCP registry-based server discovery and installation flow.</p>
<h3>10. MCP Management Tool in Settings Agent</h3>
<p>The configure-copilot agent has two MCP-specific tools.</p>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>tools</th>
<th>Role</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><code>mcp_validate</code></td>
<td>Schema validation in MCP configuration files. If there is an error, a detailed message is returned</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>mcp_reload</code></td>
<td>Apply verified settings at runtime. Restart server/renew connection</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<p>This two-step verification provides a path for users to safely apply after editing <code>.mcp.json</code>.</p>
<h2>Data flow</h2>
<h3>Starting the server and collecting tools</h3>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">sequenceDiagram
    participant Config as Config 3계층
    participant Host as McpHost
    participant Transport as stdio Transport
    participant Server as MCP Server
    participant Reporter as 3 Reporters
    participant Provider as McpToolsProvider
    participant Agent as Agent Loop

    Config->>Host: mcpServers 병합
    Host->>Transport: startServer(name, config)
    Transport->>Server: stdio process spawn
    Reporter->>Reporter: onServerStatus("starting")
    Server-->>Transport: initialize response
    Reporter->>Reporter: onServerStatus("connected")
    Host->>Server: getTools()
    Server-->>Host: tool definitions
    Host->>Provider: 전체 도구 목록
    Provider->>Provider: 서버 prefix 필터링
    Provider->>Agent: 서버별 도구 세트
</code></pre>
<h3>MCP tool call</h3>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">sequenceDiagram
    participant Model as LLM
    participant ACP as ACP 이벤트 시스템
    participant Permission as 권한 검사
    participant Host as McpHost
    participant Server as MCP Server
    participant Telemetry as TelemetryReporter

    Model->>ACP: tool.execution_start(mcpServerName, mcpToolName)
    ACP->>Permission: kind: "mcp", readOnly 확인
    alt readOnly === true
        Permission-->>ACP: 자동 승인
    else readOnly === false
        Permission-->>ACP: 사용자 확인 요청
    end
    ACP->>Host: tool call
    Host->>Server: tools/call
    Server-->>Host: result (text/image/audio/resource)
    Host-->>ACP: tool.execution_complete
    ACP->>Telemetry: tool_call_executed 이벤트
</code></pre>
<h3>MCP Elicitation Flow</h3>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">sequenceDiagram
    participant Server as MCP Server
    participant Queue as ElicitationQueue
    participant UI as McpElicitationHandler
    participant User as 사용자

    Server->>Queue: elicitation 요청 (url 또는 form)
    Queue->>Queue: 큐에 추가, 현재 없으면 즉시 활성화
    Queue->>UI: 현재 elicitation 전달
    alt mode === "url"
        UI->>User: URL 방문 요청 표시
        User->>UI: Enter (accept)
        UI->>UI: openInBrowser(url)
        UI->>Server: resolve({ action: "accept" })
    else mode === "form"
        UI->>User: SchemaForm 표시
        User->>UI: 폼 입력 완료
        UI->>Server: resolve({ action: "accept", content: formData })
    end
    Queue->>Queue: 다음 elicitation 꺼냄
</code></pre>

<h3>Tool alias map</h3>
<p>Copilot CLI categorizes tools into functional groups. MCP tools are included in the <code>custom-agent</code>, <code>agent</code>, and <code>task</code> groups.</p>
<pre><code class="language-javascript">const toolAliases = {
  execute: ["bash", "powershell"],
  shell: ["bash", "powershell"],
  read: ["readFile"],
  edit: ["apply_patch", "str_replace_editor", "create", "edit"],
  search: ["search"],
  "custom-agent": ["task"],  // custom agent MCP 도구 포함
  agent: ["task"],
  task: ["task"]
};
</code></pre>

<h2>Judgment and reuse perspective</h2>
<p>Copilot CLI's MCP can be called "product-level MCP integration with monitoring."</p>
<p>3 Reporter separation has very high reuse value. Because connection delay alerts, initialization completion tracking, and telemetry are independent of each other, it's easy to fork just one or add a new Reporter.</p>
<ul class="contains-task-list">
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> 3 Reporter pattern is a good reference design for MCP operational visibility.</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> Server-specific tool filtering in <code>McpToolsProvider</code> is essential in a multi-server environment.</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> MCP metadata is naturally integrated into ACP events</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> MCPB manifest schema is evidence of registry integration that is not present in other agents</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> Elicitation UI is the only implementation that handles the user interaction needs of the MCP server.</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> <code>readOnly</code> based automatic approval is a practical security trade-off</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" disabled> Tool normalization is hard-coded in GitHub and Playwright, making it less versatile.</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" disabled> hot reload is a two-stage process of <code>mcp_validate</code> + <code>mcp_reload</code> and is not automatic.</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" disabled> Prompt/resource integration evidence is weak. It is a tool-centric MCP</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" disabled> Azure DevOps policies are hardcoded and are unnecessary for general-purpose forks</li>
</ul>
