<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-javascript">const confusingConstructs = new Set([
  "expansion",              // ${VAR} 변수 확장
  "simple_expansion",       // $VAR
  "command_substitution",   // $(...)
  "process_substitution",   // &#x3C;(...)
  "arithmetic_expansion",   // $((...))
  "variable_assignment",    // VAR=value
  "if_statement",           // if/then/fi
  "for_statement",          // for
  "while_statement",        // while
  "case_statement",         // case
  "function_definition",    // function f() {}
  "subshell",              // (...)
  "compound_statement",     // { ... }
  "binary_expression",      // a &#x26;&#x26; b
  "test_command",          // [ -f ... ]
  "negated_command",       // ! command
  "brace_expression",      // 추가
]);
</code></pre>
<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-javascript">// 디컴파일된 core 권한 엔진 (app.js 내 Ame)
Ame = ({ requestToolPermissionFromUser, requestPathPermissionFromUser,
         requestUrlPermissionFromUser, approveAllToolPermissionRequests,
         rules, pathManager, urlManager, getContentExclusionService,
         telemetrySender }) => {
  let sessionApprovedRules = [];      // 세션 중 승인된 규칙
  let locationApprovedRules = [];     // 위치 기반 승인 규칙  
  let approveAll = approveAllToolPermissionRequests;  // "yolo" 모드

  return {
    request: async (permissionRequest) => {
      // 1. ContentExclusion 정책 확인 (경로 기반 차단)
      // 2. 경로 허용 여부 확인 (pathManager)
      // 3. 규칙 기반 판정:
      //    - rules.denied → 거부 (denied-by-rules)
      //    - approveAll → 즉시 승인
      //    - rules.approved / sessionApprovedRules / locationApprovedRules → 승인
      //    - readOnly → 승인
      //    - 없으면 → 사용자에게 물어봄 (requestToolPermissionFromUser)
      return zPe(permissionRequest, { onShell, onWrite, onMCP, ... });
    },
    resetSessionToolApprovals: () => { sessionApprovedRules.length = 0; },
    setApproveAllToolPermissionRequests: (flag) => { approveAll = flag; },
    addApprovedRules: (rules) => { sessionApprovedRules.push(...rules); },
    addLocationApprovedRules: (rules) => { locationApprovedRules.push(...rules); },
  };
};
</code></pre>
<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-javascript">function lve(userResponse, { onSessionApproval }) {
  switch (userResponse.kind) {
    case "approve-once":      return { kind: "approved" };
    case "approve-for-session": 
      onSessionApproval(userResponse.approval);  // sessionApprovedRules에 추가
      return { kind: "approved" };
    case "approve-for-location":
      onSessionApproval(userResponse.approval);   // 위치 규칙 추가
      return { kind: "approved" };
    case "reject": return { kind: "denied-interactively-by-user", feedback };
    case "user-not-available":
      return { kind: "denied-no-approval-rule-and-could-not-request-from-user" };
  }
}
</code></pre>
<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-javascript">// 위험 확장 패턴 (cMs 함수)
function hasDangerousExpansion(containerNode) {
  // 1. command_substitution $(...) 포함 → 위험
  // 2. process_substitution &#x3C;(...) 포함 → 위험
  // 3. expansion 노드 중:
  //    - operator에 "=" 또는 ":=" → 변수 할당 (위험)
  //    - operator에 "!" → indirect expansion (위험)
  //    - operator에 "@" + "P" → parameter transformation (위험)
  //    - 내부에 command_substitution/process_substitution → 위험
  return true;
}
</code></pre>
<h2>Main analysis</h2>
<h1>Copilot CLI guardian/authorization system analysis</h1>
<blockquote>
<p><strong>Analysis Snapshot</strong>: <code>151_copilot_cli/</code> — guardian and approval.</p>
</blockquote>
<blockquote>
<p>⚠️ <strong>Decompile bundle analysis</strong>: Reverse engineering analysis of the permission system of <code>workspace-context__1025.js</code>, read-only rules of the code-review agent, and ACP event schema.</p>
</blockquote>
<p>Copilot CLI's guardian/approval system consists of <strong>7 permission types</strong> (shell/write/read/mcp/url/memory/custom-tool), <strong>Session-wide approval</strong> (<code>canOfferSessionApproval</code>), <strong>Read-only flag</strong> (<code>readOnly</code>), <strong>Risk warning</strong> (<code>warning</code>), and <strong>Agent-specific tool restrictions</strong> (<code>tools</code> field). There is no separate guardian process, and permission requests/approvals are processed within the ACP event flow.</p>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">graph TD
    subgraph PermissionFlow["권한 흐름"]
        ToolReq["도구 호출 요청&#x3C;br/>(assistant.message.toolRequests)"]
        Check["권한 확인&#x3C;br/>(7가지 종류)"]
        AutoApprove["자동 승인&#x3C;br/>(readOnly=true 또는 allowedTools)"]
        UserApprove["사용자 승인&#x3C;br/>(UI 다이얼로그)"]
        SessionApprove["세션 승인&#x3C;br/>(canOfferSessionApproval)"]
        Execute["도구 실행&#x3C;br/>(tool.execution_start)"]
        Deny["거부&#x3C;br/>(실행 안 함)"]
    end

    ToolReq --> Check
    Check -->|"readOnly/allowedTools"| AutoApprove
    Check -->|"위험한 작업"| UserApprove
    AutoApprove --> Execute
    UserApprove -->|"승인"| Execute
    UserApprove -->|"세션 전체 승인"| SessionApprove
    UserApprove -->|"거부"| Deny
    SessionApprove --> Execute
</code></pre>
<hr>
<h2>Technical Reference</h2>
<h3>6 permission dialog components</h3>
<p>React component implemented in <code>permission-dialogs.js</code> — <code>PermissionDialogRouter</code> routes by permission type:</p>
<pre><code class="language-javascript">// PermissionDialogRouter 디스패치
PermissionDialogRouter = ({ request, onConfirm, ... }) =>
  jPe(request, {
    onCommands: (r) => &#x3C;CommandPermissionDialog req={r} ... />,
    onWrite:    (r) => &#x3C;FileEditPermissionDialog req={r} ... />,
    onMCP:      (r) => &#x3C;McpToolPermissionDialog req={r} ... />,
    onMemory:   (r) => &#x3C;MemoryPermissionDialog req={r} ... />,
    onCustomTool: (r) => &#x3C;CustomToolPermissionDialog req={r} ... />,
  });
// HookPermissionDialog는 별도 경로로 호출
</code></pre>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>component</th>
<th>Display contents</th>
<th>Approval Options</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><strong>CommandPermissionDialog</strong></td>
<td>Full command + intent + ⚠ warning</td>
<td>1 time / session / location</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>FileEditPermissionDialog</strong></td>
<td>File diff + IDE diff preview</td>
<td>1 time / session / location</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>McpToolPermissionDialog</strong></td>
<td>Tool name + server name + JSON argument</td>
<td>1 time / Session (tool) / Session (entire server) / Location</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>MemoryPermissionDialog</strong></td>
<td>Subject + Fact + Citations</td>
<td>1 time / session / location</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>CustomToolPermissionDialog</strong></td>
<td>Extension tool name + description + arguments</td>
<td>1 time / session</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>HookPermissionDialog</strong></td>
<td>Tool name + hook message + arguments</td>
<td>Yes / No (refuse to enter text)</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<h3>Three-tier approval model</h3>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">graph TD
    A["도구 호출 요청"] --> B{"권한 확인"}
    B -->|"readOnly=true"| C["자동 승인"]
    B -->|"위험"| D["사용자 다이얼로그"]
    
    D -->|"Yes"| E["approve-once&#x3C;br/>(1회 승인)"]
    D -->|"세션 승인"| F["approve-for-session&#x3C;br/>(세션 전체)"]
    D -->|"위치 승인"| G["approve-for-location&#x3C;br/>(PERSISTED_PERMISSIONS)"]
    D -->|"No"| H["reject&#x3C;br/>(피드백 입력 가능)"]
    
    E --> I["실행"]
    F --> I
    G --> I
    H --> J["취소"]
</code></pre>
<h4>Layer 1: approve-once (once)</h4>
<p>Basic approval. Only this call is allowed.</p>
<h4>Layer 2: approve-for-session</h4>
<p>Provided only if <code>canOfferSessionApproval: true</code>. Automatically approve the same command/tool ​​within the same session:</p>
<pre><code class="language-javascript">// 셸 명령 세션 승인
{ kind: "approve-for-session",
  approval: { kind: "commands", commandIdentifiers: ["npm", "git"] } }

// MCP 도구 세션 승인 (도구별 또는 서버 전체)
{ kind: "approve-for-session",
  approval: { kind: "mcp", serverName: "github", toolName: "search" } }
// 서버 전체:
{ kind: "approve-for-session",
  approval: { kind: "mcp", serverName: "github", toolName: null } }
</code></pre>
<h4>Layer 3: approve-for-location (ongoing)</h4>
<p>Only if the <code>PERSISTED_PERMISSIONS</code> feature flag is enabled. <strong>Repo/Directory Based</strong> Permanent Authorization:</p>
<pre><code class="language-javascript">// 특정 위치에서 셸 명령 영구 승인
{ kind: "approve-for-location",
  approval: { kind: "commands", commandIdentifiers: ["npm"] },
  locationKey: "/Users/dev/project" }

// 특정 위치에서 파일 쓰기 영구 승인
{ kind: "approve-for-location",
  approval: { kind: "write" },
  locationKey: "/Users/dev/project" }
</code></pre>
<p>Display example: <code>"Yes, and don't ask again for npm in this repo (/Users/.../project)"</code></p>
<hr>
<h3>Details on 7 types of permissions</h3>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>Type</th>
<th align="center">Automatic Approval</th>
<th align="center">Session Approval</th>
<th align="center">Location Approval</th>
<th align="center">Danger warning</th>
<th>Key fields</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><code>shell</code></td>
<td align="center">✅ (<code>readOnly</code>)</td>
<td align="center">✅</td>
<td align="center">✅</td>
<td align="center">✅</td>
<td>fullCommandText, commands[], possiblePaths[], possibleUrls[]</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>write</code></td>
<td align="center">❌</td>
<td align="center">✅</td>
<td align="center">✅</td>
<td align="center">❌</td>
<td>fileName, diff, newFileContents</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>read</code></td>
<td align="center">✅ (estimated)</td>
<td align="center">❌</td>
<td align="center">❌</td>
<td align="center">❌</td>
<td>path, intention</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>mcp</code></td>
<td align="center">✅ (<code>readOnly</code>)</td>
<td align="center">✅ (by tool/server)</td>
<td align="center">✅</td>
<td align="center">❌</td>
<td>serverName, toolName, toolTitle, args</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>url</code></td>
<td align="center">❌</td>
<td align="center">❌</td>
<td align="center">❌</td>
<td align="center">❌</td>
<td>url, intention</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>memory</code></td>
<td align="center">❌</td>
<td align="center">✅</td>
<td align="center">✅</td>
<td align="center">❌</td>
<td>subject, fact, citations</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>custom-tool</code></td>
<td align="center">❌</td>
<td align="center">✅</td>
<td align="center">❌</td>
<td align="center">❌</td>
<td>toolName, toolDescription, args</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<hr>
<h2>Tree-sitter based shell command safety analysis</h2>
<p>Copilot CLI's most ingenious safety device. <strong>tree-sitter WASM</strong> parses bash/PowerShell scripts at the AST level to determine safety.</p>
<h3>Analysis Pipeline</h3>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">graph LR
    A["셸 스크립트&#x3C;br/>사용자 입력"] --> B["tree-sitter 파서&#x3C;br/>bash.wasm / powershell.wasm"]
    B --> C["AST 순회"]
    C --> D["커맨드 식별&#x3C;br/>commandIdentifier 추출"]
    C --> E["위험 구조 탐지&#x3C;br/>expansion, substitution, etc."]
    C --> F["리다이렉션 탐지&#x3C;br/>파일 쓰기"]
    C --> G["환경변수 탐지&#x3C;br/>PAGER, EDITOR 등"]
    D --> H["readOnly 판정&#x3C;br/>화이트리스트 기반"]
    E --> I["hasPotentiallyConfusingConstructs"]
    I --> J{"세션 승인&#x3C;br/>제공 여부"}
    J -->|false| K["canOfferSessionApproval: false"]
    J -->|true| L["canOfferSessionApproval: true"]
</code></pre>
<h3>Hazardous structure detection (11 types)</h3>
<p><code>hasPotentiallyConfusingConstructs = true</code> → <strong>Block session acknowledgment</strong> if the following node type is found in the AST:</p>
<pre><code class="language-javascript">const confusingConstructs = new Set([
  "expansion",              // ${VAR} 변수 확장
  "simple_expansion",       // $VAR
  "command_substitution",   // $(...)
  "process_substitution",   // &#x3C;(...)
  "arithmetic_expansion",   // $((...))
  "variable_assignment",    // VAR=value
  "if_statement",           // if/then/fi
  "for_statement",          // for
  "while_statement",        // while
  "case_statement",         // case
  "function_definition",    // function f() {}
  "subshell",              // (...)
  "compound_statement",     // { ... }
  "binary_expression",      // a &#x26;&#x26; b
  "test_command",          // [ -f ... ]
  "negated_command",       // ! command
  "brace_expression",      // 추가
]);
</code></pre>
<h3>Block dangerous environmental variables (9)</h3>
<p>If an assignment to the following environment variable is found <strong>immediately readOnly: false + canOfferSessionApproval: false</strong>:</p>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>variable</th>
<th>Reasons for risk</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><code>PAGER</code></td>
<td>arbitrary program execution</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>GIT_PAGER</code></td>
<td>Random execution on git output</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>EDITOR</code></td>
<td>Random execution when editing a file</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>VISUAL</code></td>
<td>Editor Replacement</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>GIT_EDITOR</code></td>
<td>Random execution when git commit</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>SHELL</code></td>
<td>Change the shell itself</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>GIT_SSH_COMMAND</code></td>
<td>Intercepting SSH commands</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>GIT_ASKPASS</code></td>
<td>Intercepting authentication information</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>MANPAGER</code></td>
<td>run manual page</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<h3>readOnly command whitelist</h3>
<h4>General purpose (bash + PowerShell)</h4>
<p><code>cat</code>, <code>cd</code>, <code>echo</code>, <code>false</code>, <code>grep</code>, <code>head</code>, <code>hostname</code>, <code>ls</code>, <code>pwd</code>, <code>true</code>, <code>whoami</code></p>
<h4>bash only (27)</h4>
<p><code>basename</code>, <code>cal</code>, <code>cut</code>, <code>date</code>※, <code>df</code>, <code>diff</code>, <code>dirname</code>, <code>du</code>, <code>expr</code>, <code>file</code>, <code>find</code>※, <code>free</code>, <code>groups</code>, <code>id</code>, <code>nl</code>, <code>printenv</code>, <code>ps</code>, <code>readlink</code>, <code>realpath</code>, <code>sed</code>※, <code>set</code>, <code>sort</code>※, <code>stat</code>, <code>tail</code>, <code>top</code>, <code>tr</code>, <code>type</code>, <code>uname</code>, <code>uniq</code>, <code>unset</code>, <code>uptime</code>, <code>wc</code>, <code>whatis</code>, <code>whereis</code>, <code>which</code></p>
<p>※ For <code>date</code>, <code>find</code>, <code>sed</code>, and <code>sort</code>, readOnly decision changes <strong>depending on the argument</strong> (e.g. <code>find -delete</code> → false, <code>sed -n '1,3p'</code> → true)</p>
<h4>PowerShell only (24)</h4>
<p><code>Compare-Object</code>, <code>Format-List</code>, <code>Format-Table</code>, <code>Get-ChildItem</code>, <code>Get-Command</code>, <code>Get-Content</code>, <code>Get-Date</code>, <code>Get-Help</code>, <code>Get-Item</code>, <code>Get-Location</code>, <code>Get-Member</code>, <code>Get-Process</code>, <code>Group-Object</code>, <code>Join-Path</code>, <code>Measure-Object</code>, <code>Out-Host</code>, <code>Out-String</code>, <code>Resolve-Path</code>, <code>Select-Object</code>, <code>Select-String</code>, <code>Sort-Object</code>, <code>Split-Path</code>, <code>Test-Path</code>, <code>Where-Object</code></p>
<h4>git subcommands (13 read-only)</h4>
<p><code>git blame</code>, <code>git branch</code>, <code>git describe</code>, <code>git diff</code>, <code>git grep</code>, <code>git log</code>, <code>git ls-files</code>, <code>git ls-remote</code>, <code>git rev-parse</code>, <code>git shortlog</code>, <code>git show</code>, <code>git status</code>, <code>git tag</code></p>
<p>However, if there is a <code>--upload-pack</code> argument, readOnly: false.</p>
<h4>ripgrep</h4>
<p><code>rg</code> → readOnly: true. However, <code>--pre</code> or <code>--pre-glob</code> argument → readOnly: false.</p>
<h3>Command Stem System</h3>
<p>URL extraction target command (iMs set):
<code>curl</code>, <code>wget</code>, <code>fetch</code>, <code>http</code>, <code>https</code>, <code>aria2c</code>, <code>axel</code>, <code>lynx</code>, <code>w3m</code>, <code>links</code>, <code>elinks</code>, <code>nc</code>, <code>netcat</code>, <code>telnet</code>, <code>Invoke-WebRequest</code>, <code>Invoke-RestMethod</code></p>
<p>Stem definitions (sMs) for separating subcommands:
<code>git</code> (ignore --no-pager), <code>gh</code>, <code>glab</code>, <code>npm</code>, <code>npx</code>, <code>yarn</code>, <code>pnpm</code>, <code>cargo</code>, <code>go</code>, <code>composer</code>, <code>pip</code>, <code>pipenv</code>, <code>poetry</code>, <code>conda</code>, <code>mvn</code>, <code>gradle</code>, <code>gradlew</code>, <code>dotnet</code>, <code>bundle</code>, <code>swift</code>, <code>sbt</code>, <code>flutter</code>, <code>mix</code>, <code>cabal</code>, <code>stack</code></p>
<hr>
<h2>Core authorization engine (<code>Ame</code> factory function)</h2>
<p><code>Ame</code> is a factory function that creates the entire permission determination pipeline. It manages three rule repositories and handles <code>PermissionRequest</code> with the <code>request()</code> method:</p>
<pre><code class="language-javascript">// 디컴파일된 core 권한 엔진 (app.js 내 Ame)
Ame = ({ requestToolPermissionFromUser, requestPathPermissionFromUser,
         requestUrlPermissionFromUser, approveAllToolPermissionRequests,
         rules, pathManager, urlManager, getContentExclusionService,
         telemetrySender }) => {
  let sessionApprovedRules = [];      // 세션 중 승인된 규칙
  let locationApprovedRules = [];     // 위치 기반 승인 규칙  
  let approveAll = approveAllToolPermissionRequests;  // "yolo" 모드

  return {
    request: async (permissionRequest) => {
      // 1. ContentExclusion 정책 확인 (경로 기반 차단)
      // 2. 경로 허용 여부 확인 (pathManager)
      // 3. 규칙 기반 판정:
      //    - rules.denied → 거부 (denied-by-rules)
      //    - approveAll → 즉시 승인
      //    - rules.approved / sessionApprovedRules / locationApprovedRules → 승인
      //    - readOnly → 승인
      //    - 없으면 → 사용자에게 물어봄 (requestToolPermissionFromUser)
      return zPe(permissionRequest, { onShell, onWrite, onMCP, ... });
    },
    resetSessionToolApprovals: () => { sessionApprovedRules.length = 0; },
    setApproveAllToolPermissionRequests: (flag) => { approveAll = flag; },
    addApprovedRules: (rules) => { sessionApprovedRules.push(...rules); },
    addLocationApprovedRules: (rules) => { locationApprovedRules.push(...rules); },
  };
};
</code></pre>
<p><strong>Shell command decision flow</strong> (inside the onShell handler):</p>
<ol>
<li>Match <code>QOn(identifier)</code> pattern in <code>rules.denied</code> → If matched, reject immediately</li>
<li>When including URLs, recursively request <code>url</code> permission for each URL.</li>
<li>Immediate approval in <code>approveAll</code> mode</li>
<li>For each command, if it is not <code>readOnly</code> and not in the rule → ask the user</li>
<li>If <code>hasWriteFileRedirection</code> and no write rule → ask user</li>
</ol>
<p><strong>Response Handler</strong> (<code>lve</code>):</p>
<pre><code class="language-javascript">function lve(userResponse, { onSessionApproval }) {
  switch (userResponse.kind) {
    case "approve-once":      return { kind: "approved" };
    case "approve-for-session": 
      onSessionApproval(userResponse.approval);  // sessionApprovedRules에 추가
      return { kind: "approved" };
    case "approve-for-location":
      onSessionApproval(userResponse.approval);   // 위치 규칙 추가
      return { kind: "approved" };
    case "reject": return { kind: "denied-interactively-by-user", feedback };
    case "user-not-available":
      return { kind: "denied-no-approval-rule-and-could-not-request-from-user" };
  }
}
</code></pre>
<h3>Detecting <code>hasDangerousExpansion</code></h3>
<p>After parsing the tree-sitter AST, <strong>dangerous parameter expansion</strong> is detected secondarily. Even a command that evaluates to <code>readOnly: true</code> will be demoted to <code>readOnly: false</code> if it catches this check:</p>
<pre><code class="language-javascript">// 위험 확장 패턴 (cMs 함수)
function hasDangerousExpansion(containerNode) {
  // 1. command_substitution $(...) 포함 → 위험
  // 2. process_substitution &#x3C;(...) 포함 → 위험
  // 3. expansion 노드 중:
  //    - operator에 "=" 또는 ":=" → 변수 할당 (위험)
  //    - operator에 "!" → indirect expansion (위험)
  //    - operator에 "@" + "P" → parameter transformation (위험)
  //    - 내부에 command_substitution/process_substitution → 위험
  return true;
}
</code></pre>
<p>The point of this check is that parameter expansions like <code>${var:=default}</code> can actually modify variables, and indirect expansions like <code>${!indirect}</code> can refer to unpredictable values.</p>

<h3>Reuse seam</h3>
<ul class="contains-task-list">
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> <strong>tree-sitter AST analysis</strong>: The most sophisticated command safety determination. bash.wasm + powershell.wasm</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> 7 types of permissions are comprehensive and extensible</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> 3-tier authorization model (one time / session / location) balances UX and security</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> MCP tool-specific + server-wide approvals are flexible</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> In case of rejection, inputting feedback informs the agent of an alternative.</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> IDE diff preview integration</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" disabled> No OS level isolation is a fundamental limitation</li>
</ul>

<h2>Korean corpus (reference)</h2>
<blockquote>
<p>Verbatim KO corpus <code>012_guardian-approval/12_cp_guardian.md</code> for cross-check; code blocks unchanged.</p>
</blockquote>
<h1>Copilot CLI 가디언·승인 시스템 분석</h1>
<blockquote>
<p><strong>분석 스냅샷</strong>: <code>151_copilot_cli/</code> — guardian and approval.</p>
</blockquote>
<blockquote>
<p>⚠️ <strong>디컴파일 번들 분석</strong>: <code>workspace-context__1025.js</code>의 권한 시스템, code-review 에이전트의 읽기 전용 규칙, ACP 이벤트 스키마의 역공학 분석이다.</p>
</blockquote>
<p>Copilot CLI의 가디언/승인 시스템은 <strong>7가지 권한 종류</strong> (shell/write/read/mcp/url/memory/custom-tool), <strong>세션 전체 승인</strong> (<code>canOfferSessionApproval</code>), <strong>읽기 전용 플래그</strong> (<code>readOnly</code>), <strong>위험 경고</strong> (<code>warning</code>), <strong>에이전트별 도구 제한</strong> (<code>tools</code> 필드)으로 구성된다. 별도의 가디언 프로세스는 없으며, ACP 이벤트 흐름 내에서 권한 요청/승인이 처리된다.</p>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">graph TD
    subgraph PermissionFlow["권한 흐름"]
        ToolReq["도구 호출 요청&#x3C;br/>(assistant.message.toolRequests)"]
        Check["권한 확인&#x3C;br/>(7가지 종류)"]
        AutoApprove["자동 승인&#x3C;br/>(readOnly=true 또는 allowedTools)"]
        UserApprove["사용자 승인&#x3C;br/>(UI 다이얼로그)"]
        SessionApprove["세션 승인&#x3C;br/>(canOfferSessionApproval)"]
        Execute["도구 실행&#x3C;br/>(tool.execution_start)"]
        Deny["거부&#x3C;br/>(실행 안 함)"]
    end

    ToolReq --> Check
    Check -->|"readOnly/allowedTools"| AutoApprove
    Check -->|"위험한 작업"| UserApprove
    AutoApprove --> Execute
    UserApprove -->|"승인"| Execute
    UserApprove -->|"세션 전체 승인"| SessionApprove
    UserApprove -->|"거부"| Deny
    SessionApprove --> Execute
</code></pre>
<hr>
<h2>기술 참조</h2>
<h3>6가지 권한 다이얼로그 컴포넌트</h3>
<p><code>permission-dialogs.js</code>에 구현된 React 컴포넌트 — <code>PermissionDialogRouter</code>가 권한 종류별로 라우팅한다:</p>
<pre><code class="language-javascript">// PermissionDialogRouter 디스패치
PermissionDialogRouter = ({ request, onConfirm, ... }) =>
  jPe(request, {
    onCommands: (r) => &#x3C;CommandPermissionDialog req={r} ... />,
    onWrite:    (r) => &#x3C;FileEditPermissionDialog req={r} ... />,
    onMCP:      (r) => &#x3C;McpToolPermissionDialog req={r} ... />,
    onMemory:   (r) => &#x3C;MemoryPermissionDialog req={r} ... />,
    onCustomTool: (r) => &#x3C;CustomToolPermissionDialog req={r} ... />,
  });
// HookPermissionDialog는 별도 경로로 호출
</code></pre>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>컴포넌트</th>
<th>표시 내용</th>
<th>승인 옵션</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><strong>CommandPermissionDialog</strong></td>
<td>전체 명령 + 의도 + ⚠ 경고</td>
<td>1회 / 세션 / 위치</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>FileEditPermissionDialog</strong></td>
<td>파일 diff + IDE diff 미리보기</td>
<td>1회 / 세션 / 위치</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>McpToolPermissionDialog</strong></td>
<td>도구명 + 서버명 + JSON 인자</td>
<td>1회 / 세션(도구) / 세션(서버 전체) / 위치</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>MemoryPermissionDialog</strong></td>
<td>Subject + Fact + Citations</td>
<td>1회 / 세션 / 위치</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>CustomToolPermissionDialog</strong></td>
<td>확장 도구명 + 설명 + 인자</td>
<td>1회 / 세션</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>HookPermissionDialog</strong></td>
<td>도구명 + 후크 메시지 + 인자</td>
<td>Yes / No (텍스트 입력 거부)</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<h3>3계층 승인 모델</h3>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">graph TD
    A["도구 호출 요청"] --> B{"권한 확인"}
    B -->|"readOnly=true"| C["자동 승인"]
    B -->|"위험"| D["사용자 다이얼로그"]
    
    D -->|"Yes"| E["approve-once&#x3C;br/>(1회 승인)"]
    D -->|"세션 승인"| F["approve-for-session&#x3C;br/>(세션 전체)"]
    D -->|"위치 승인"| G["approve-for-location&#x3C;br/>(PERSISTED_PERMISSIONS)"]
    D -->|"No"| H["reject&#x3C;br/>(피드백 입력 가능)"]
    
    E --> I["실행"]
    F --> I
    G --> I
    H --> J["취소"]
</code></pre>
<h4>1계층: approve-once (1회)</h4>
<p>기본 승인. 이번 호출만 허용.</p>
<h4>2계층: approve-for-session (세션)</h4>
<p><code>canOfferSessionApproval: true</code>인 경우에만 제공. 같은 세션 내에서 같은 명령/도구 자동 승인:</p>
<pre><code class="language-javascript">// 셸 명령 세션 승인
{ kind: "approve-for-session",
  approval: { kind: "commands", commandIdentifiers: ["npm", "git"] } }

// MCP 도구 세션 승인 (도구별 또는 서버 전체)
{ kind: "approve-for-session",
  approval: { kind: "mcp", serverName: "github", toolName: "search" } }
// 서버 전체:
{ kind: "approve-for-session",
  approval: { kind: "mcp", serverName: "github", toolName: null } }
</code></pre>
<h4>3계층: approve-for-location (지속적)</h4>
<p><code>PERSISTED_PERMISSIONS</code> 피처 플래그가 활성화된 경우에만. <strong>리포/디렉토리 기반</strong> 영구 승인:</p>
<pre><code class="language-javascript">// 특정 위치에서 셸 명령 영구 승인
{ kind: "approve-for-location",
  approval: { kind: "commands", commandIdentifiers: ["npm"] },
  locationKey: "/Users/dev/project" }

// 특정 위치에서 파일 쓰기 영구 승인
{ kind: "approve-for-location",
  approval: { kind: "write" },
  locationKey: "/Users/dev/project" }
</code></pre>
<p>표시 예시: <code>"Yes, and don't ask again for npm in this repo (/Users/.../project)"</code></p>
<hr>
<h3>7가지 권한 종류 상세</h3>
<table>

</tr>

<hr>
<h2>Tree-sitter 기반 셸 커맨드 안전성 분석</h2>
<p>Copilot CLI의 가장 독창적인 안전 장치. <strong>tree-sitter WASM</strong>으로 bash/PowerShell 스크립트를 AST 수준에서 파싱하여 안전성을 판정한다.</p>
<h3>분석 파이프라인</h3>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">graph LR
    A["셸 스크립트&#x3C;br/>사용자 입력"] --> B["tree-sitter 파서&#x3C;br/>bash.wasm / powershell.wasm"]
    B --> C["AST 순회"]
    C --> D["커맨드 식별&#x3C;br/>commandIdentifier 추출"]
    C --> E["위험 구조 탐지&#x3C;br/>expansion, substitution, etc."]
    C --> F["리다이렉션 탐지&#x3C;br/>파일 쓰기"]
    C --> G["환경변수 탐지&#x3C;br/>PAGER, EDITOR 등"]
    D --> H["readOnly 판정&#x3C;br/>화이트리스트 기반"]
    E --> I["hasPotentiallyConfusingConstructs"]
    I --> J{"세션 승인&#x3C;br/>제공 여부"}
    J -->|false| K["canOfferSessionApproval: false"]
    J -->|true| L["canOfferSessionApproval: true"]
</code></pre>
<h3>위험 구조 탐지 (11가지)</h3>
<p>AST에서 다음 노드 타입이 발견되면 <code>hasPotentiallyConfusingConstructs = true</code> → <strong>세션 승인 차단</strong>:</p>
<pre><code class="language-javascript">const confusingConstructs = new Set([
  "expansion",              // ${VAR} 변수 확장
  "simple_expansion",       // $VAR
  "command_substitution",   // $(...)
  "process_substitution",   // &#x3C;(...)
  "arithmetic_expansion",   // $((...))
  "variable_assignment",    // VAR=value
  "if_statement",           // if/then/fi
  "for_statement",          // for
  "while_statement",        // while
  "case_statement",         // case
  "function_definition",    // function f() {}
  "subshell",              // (...)
  "compound_statement",     // { ... }
  "binary_expression",      // a &#x26;&#x26; b
  "test_command",          // [ -f ... ]
  "negated_command",       // ! command
  "brace_expression",      // 추가
]);
</code></pre>
<h3>위험 환경변수 차단 (9개)</h3>
<p>다음 환경변수에 대한 할당이 발견되면 <strong>즉시 readOnly: false + canOfferSessionApproval: false</strong>:</p>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>변수</th>
<th>위험 이유</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><code>PAGER</code></td>
<td>임의 프로그램 실행</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>GIT_PAGER</code></td>
<td>git 출력 시 임의 실행</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>EDITOR</code></td>
<td>파일 편집 시 임의 실행</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>VISUAL</code></td>
<td>편집기 대체</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>GIT_EDITOR</code></td>
<td>git commit 시 임의 실행</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>SHELL</code></td>
<td>쉘 자체 변경</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>GIT_SSH_COMMAND</code></td>
<td>SSH 명령 가로채기</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>GIT_ASKPASS</code></td>
<td>인증 정보 가로채기</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>MANPAGER</code></td>
<td>매뉴얼 페이지 실행</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<h3>읽기 전용(readOnly) 커맨드 화이트리스트</h3>
<h4>범용 (bash + PowerShell)</h4>
<p><code>cat</code>, <code>cd</code>, <code>echo</code>, <code>false</code>, <code>grep</code>, <code>head</code>, <code>hostname</code>, <code>ls</code>, <code>pwd</code>, <code>true</code>, <code>whoami</code></p>
<h4>bash 전용 (27개)</h4>
<p><code>basename</code>, <code>cal</code>, <code>cut</code>, <code>date</code>※, <code>df</code>, <code>diff</code>, <code>dirname</code>, <code>du</code>, <code>expr</code>, <code>file</code>, <code>find</code>※, <code>free</code>, <code>groups</code>, <code>id</code>, <code>nl</code>, <code>printenv</code>, <code>ps</code>, <code>readlink</code>, <code>realpath</code>, <code>sed</code>※, <code>set</code>, <code>sort</code>※, <code>stat</code>, <code>tail</code>, <code>top</code>, <code>tr</code>, <code>type</code>, <code>uname</code>, <code>uniq</code>, <code>unset</code>, <code>uptime</code>, <code>wc</code>, <code>whatis</code>, <code>whereis</code>, <code>which</code></p>
<p>※ <code>date</code>, <code>find</code>, <code>sed</code>, <code>sort</code>는 <strong>인자에 따라</strong> readOnly 판정 변경 (예: <code>find -delete</code> → false, <code>sed -n '1,3p'</code> → true)</p>
<h4>PowerShell 전용 (24개)</h4>
<p><code>Compare-Object</code>, <code>Format-List</code>, <code>Format-Table</code>, <code>Get-ChildItem</code>, <code>Get-Command</code>, <code>Get-Content</code>, <code>Get-Date</code>, <code>Get-Help</code>, <code>Get-Item</code>, <code>Get-Location</code>, <code>Get-Member</code>, <code>Get-Process</code>, <code>Group-Object</code>, <code>Join-Path</code>, <code>Measure-Object</code>, <code>Out-Host</code>, <code>Out-String</code>, <code>Resolve-Path</code>, <code>Select-Object</code>, <code>Select-String</code>, <code>Sort-Object</code>, <code>Split-Path</code>, <code>Test-Path</code>, <code>Where-Object</code></p>
<h4>git 서브커맨드 (13개 읽기 전용)</h4>
<p><code>git blame</code>, <code>git branch</code>, <code>git describe</code>, <code>git diff</code>, <code>git grep</code>, <code>git log</code>, <code>git ls-files</code>, <code>git ls-remote</code>, <code>git rev-parse</code>, <code>git shortlog</code>, <code>git show</code>, <code>git status</code>, <code>git tag</code></p>
<p>단, <code>--upload-pack</code> 인자가 있으면 readOnly: false.</p>
<h4>ripgrep</h4>
<p><code>rg</code> → readOnly: true. 단, <code>--pre</code> 또는 <code>--pre-glob</code> 인자 → readOnly: false.</p>
<h3>커맨드 스템 시스템</h3>
<p>URL 추출 대상 커맨드 (iMs 집합):
<code>curl</code>, <code>wget</code>, <code>fetch</code>, <code>http</code>, <code>https</code>, <code>aria2c</code>, <code>axel</code>, <code>lynx</code>, <code>w3m</code>, <code>links</code>, <code>elinks</code>, <code>nc</code>, <code>netcat</code>, <code>telnet</code>, <code>Invoke-WebRequest</code>, <code>Invoke-RestMethod</code></p>
<p>하위 커맨드 분리를 위한 스템 정의 (sMs):
<code>git</code> (--no-pager 무시), <code>gh</code>, <code>glab</code>, <code>npm</code>, <code>npx</code>, <code>yarn</code>, <code>pnpm</code>, <code>cargo</code>, <code>go</code>, <code>composer</code>, <code>pip</code>, <code>pipenv</code>, <code>poetry</code>, <code>conda</code>, <code>mvn</code>, <code>gradle</code>, <code>gradlew</code>, <code>dotnet</code>, <code>bundle</code>, <code>swift</code>, <code>sbt</code>, <code>flutter</code>, <code>mix</code>, <code>cabal</code>, <code>stack</code></p>
<hr>
<h2>핵심 권한 엔진 (<code>Ame</code> 팩토리 함수)</h2>
<p><code>Ame</code>는 전체 권한 판정 파이프라인을 생성하는 팩토리 함수다. 3가지 규칙 저장소를 관리하고, <code>request()</code> 메서드로 <code>PermissionRequest</code>를 처리한다:</p>
<pre><code class="language-javascript">// 디컴파일된 core 권한 엔진 (app.js 내 Ame)
Ame = ({ requestToolPermissionFromUser, requestPathPermissionFromUser,
         requestUrlPermissionFromUser, approveAllToolPermissionRequests,
         rules, pathManager, urlManager, getContentExclusionService,
         telemetrySender }) => {
  let sessionApprovedRules = [];      // 세션 중 승인된 규칙
  let locationApprovedRules = [];     // 위치 기반 승인 규칙  
  let approveAll = approveAllToolPermissionRequests;  // "yolo" 모드

  return {
    request: async (permissionRequest) => {
      // 1. ContentExclusion 정책 확인 (경로 기반 차단)
      // 2. 경로 허용 여부 확인 (pathManager)
      // 3. 규칙 기반 판정:
      //    - rules.denied → 거부 (denied-by-rules)
      //    - approveAll → 즉시 승인
      //    - rules.approved / sessionApprovedRules / locationApprovedRules → 승인
      //    - readOnly → 승인
      //    - 없으면 → 사용자에게 물어봄 (requestToolPermissionFromUser)
      return zPe(permissionRequest, { onShell, onWrite, onMCP, ... });
    },
    resetSessionToolApprovals: () => { sessionApprovedRules.length = 0; },
    setApproveAllToolPermissionRequests: (flag) => { approveAll = flag; },
    addApprovedRules: (rules) => { sessionApprovedRules.push(...rules); },
    addLocationApprovedRules: (rules) => { locationApprovedRules.push(...rules); },
  };
};
</code></pre>
<p><strong>셸 명령 판정 흐름</strong> (onShell 핸들러 내부):</p>
<ol>
<li><code>rules.denied</code>에서 <code>QOn(identifier)</code> 패턴 매칭 → 일치하면 즉시 거부</li>
<li>URL 포함 시 각 URL에 대해 재귀적 <code>url</code> 권한 요청</li>
<li><code>approveAll</code> 모드면 즉시 승인</li>
<li>각 명령에 대해 <code>readOnly</code>가 아니고 규칙에 없으면 → 사용자에게 질문</li>
<li><code>hasWriteFileRedirection</code>이고 write 규칙 없으면 → 사용자에게 질문</li>
</ol>
<p><strong>응답 핸들러</strong> (<code>lve</code>):</p>
<pre><code class="language-javascript">function lve(userResponse, { onSessionApproval }) {
  switch (userResponse.kind) {
    case "approve-once":      return { kind: "approved" };
    case "approve-for-session": 
      onSessionApproval(userResponse.approval);  // sessionApprovedRules에 추가
      return { kind: "approved" };
    case "approve-for-location":
      onSessionApproval(userResponse.approval);   // 위치 규칙 추가
      return { kind: "approved" };
    case "reject": return { kind: "denied-interactively-by-user", feedback };
    case "user-not-available":
      return { kind: "denied-no-approval-rule-and-could-not-request-from-user" };
  }
}
</code></pre>
<h3><code>hasDangerousExpansion</code> 탐지</h3>
<p>tree-sitter AST 파싱 후 <strong>위험한 파라미터 확장</strong>을 2차로 검출한다. <code>readOnly: true</code>로 판정된 명령이라도 이 검사에 걸리면 <code>readOnly: false</code>로 강등된다:</p>
<pre><code class="language-javascript">// 위험 확장 패턴 (cMs 함수)
function hasDangerousExpansion(containerNode) {
  // 1. command_substitution $(...) 포함 → 위험
  // 2. process_substitution &#x3C;(...) 포함 → 위험
  // 3. expansion 노드 중:
  //    - operator에 "=" 또는 ":=" → 변수 할당 (위험)
  //    - operator에 "!" → indirect expansion (위험)
  //    - operator에 "@" + "P" → parameter transformation (위험)
  //    - 내부에 command_substitution/process_substitution → 위험
  return true;
}
</code></pre>
<p>이 검사의 핵심은 <code>${var:=default}</code> 같은 파라미터 확장이 실제로 변수를 수정할 수 있고, <code>${!indirect}</code> 같은 간접 확장이 예측 불가능한 값을 참조할 수 있기 때문이다.</p>

<h3>AI Safety 플래그</h3>
<p>모든 에이전트의 <code>promptParts.includeAISafety: true</code>로 AI 안전 지침이 시스템 메시지에 포함된다.</p>

</tr>

<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-javascript">// 0000__get.js — 보안 제약 require
const require = (module) => {
  let req = __rootRequire;

  // 특수 네이티브 모듈 라우팅
  if (typeof module === "string" &#x26;&#x26; module.startsWith("@img/")) {
    req = __sharpRequire;      // sharp 이미지 처리 라이브러리
  }
  if (typeof module === "string" &#x26;&#x26; module.startsWith("@teddyzhu/")) {
    req = __clipboardRequire;  // 클립보드 네이티브 바인딩
  }

  // Node.js 빌트인 모듈은 통과
  if (typeof module === "string" &#x26;&#x26; __module.isBuiltin(module)) {
    return req(module);
  }

  // 핵심 보안: 실제 경로가 앱 디렉토리 밖이면 차단
  const modulePath = __fs.realpathSync(req.resolve(module));
  const appPath = __fs.realpathSync(import.meta.dirname);
  const relativePath = __path.relative(appPath, modulePath);

  if (relativePath.startsWith("..")) {
    throw new Error(
      "Requiring module outside of application is a security concern; module: " +
        modulePath + ", app: " + appPath
    );
  }

  return req(module);
};
</code></pre>

function a8(t, e) {
  switch (t.type) {
    case "hmac":             return e.onHMACAuthInfo(t);
    case "env":              return e.onEnvAuthInfo(t);
    case "user":             return e.onUserAuthInfo(t);
    case "gh-cli":           return e.onGhCliAuthInfo(t);
    case "api-key":          return e.onApiKeyAuthInfo(t);
    case "token":            return e.onTokenAuthInfo(t);
    case "copilot-api-token": return e.onCopilotApiTokenAuthInfo(t);
    default:
      throw new Error(`unexpected auth info type: ${JSON.stringify(t)}`);
  }
}

<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-javascript">getPrioritizedAuthMethods(includeAllTokens) {
  let methods = [];
  // 1. SDK 토큰 (authTokenEnvVar 설정 시)
  if (this.config.authTokenEnvVar)
    methods.push(this.trySdkTokenLogin.bind(this));

  if (!this.config.disableAutoLogin) {
    methods.push(this.tryHMACLogin.bind(this));          // 2. HMAC
    methods.push(this.tryApiKeyLogin.bind(this));         // 3. API 키
    methods.push(this.tryCopilotApiTokenLogin.bind(this)); // 4. Copilot API
    methods.push(this.tryGitHubTokenLogin.bind(this));     // 5. PAT
    methods.push(                                           // 6. 키체인
      includeAllTokens
        ? this.getAllGitHubLoginTokens.bind(this)
        : this.tryLoginToken.bind(this)
    );
    methods.push(this.tryGhCliTokenLogin.bind(this));      // 7. gh CLI
  }
  return methods;
}
</code></pre>

<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-javascript">// 토큰 저장: keytar 우선, 실패 시 설정 파일 폴백
async storeToken(token, host, login, configPath) {
  if (!token) throw new Error("No token provided to store");
  let key = `${host}:${login}`;

  // 설정에서 평문 저장 모드 확인
  if ((await ir.load(configPath))?.store_token_plaintext)
    return (await storeCurrentTokenInConfig(host, login, configPath), true);

  // keytar 시도
  try {
    let keytar = await PQ();
    return (await jQ(keytar.setPassword("copilot-cli", key, token)), true);
  } catch {
    return false;  // keytar 실패 시 false 반환 (설정 파일 폴백 아님!)
  }
}
</code></pre>
<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-javascript">async tryGitHubTokenLogin() {
  let token =
    process.env.COPILOT_GITHUB_TOKEN ||
    process.env.GH_TOKEN ||
    process.env.GITHUB_TOKEN ||
    this.getGitHubAskpassToken();  // GITHUB_ASKPASS 바이너리 실행

  // Classic PAT (ghp_) 차단 — 보안상 fine-grained PAT만 허용
  if (token.startsWith("ghp_")) {
    q.error("Classic PATs are not supported.");
    return [];
  }

  // 토큰 타입별 처리
  if (token.startsWith("ghs_"))   return [envAuth];       // GitHub App 설치 토큰
  if (token.startsWith("gho_"))   return [validateUser];   // OAuth 토큰
  if (token.startsWith("ghu_"))   return [validateUser];   // User-to-server 토큰
  if (token.startsWith("github_pat_")) return [validateUser]; // Fine-grained PAT
  return [];  // 알 수 없는 토큰 타입 무시
}
</code></pre>
<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-javascript">getGitHubAskpassToken() {
  let askpass = process.env.GITHUB_ASKPASS;
  if (askpass) {
    let result = spawnSync(askpass, [], {
      encoding: "utf8",
      timeout: 10000,        // 10초 타임아웃
      maxBuffer: 1048576,    // 1MB 버퍼
    });
    return result.stdout?.trim();
  }
}
</code></pre>

  if (!x_()) return [];  // SDK 모드에서만 활성화

  if (process.env.ANTHROPIC_API_KEY)
    return [{ type: "api-key", apiKey: key, host: "https://api.anthropic.com" }];
  if (process.env.OPENAI_API_KEY)
    return [{ type: "api-key", apiKey: key, host: process.env.OPENAI_BASE_URL || "https://api.openai.com" }];
  if (process.env.AZURE_OPENAI_API_KEY)
    return [{ type: "api-key", apiKey: key, host: process.env.AZURE_OPENAI_API_ENDPOINT }];
}
</code></pre>
<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-javascript">function T9s(host) {
  let url = host.startsWith("https://") ? host : `https://${host}`;

  // github.com → 공용 Copilot API
  if (_oe(url))
    return { endpoints: { api: "https://api.githubcopilot.com" } };

  // *.ghe.com → 기업 Copilot API
  let match = new URL(url).hostname.match(/^(.+)\.ghe\.com$/);
  if (match)
    return { endpoints: { api: `https://copilot-api.${match[1]}.ghe.com` } };

  return { endpoints: {} };
}
</code></pre>
<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-javascript">async function FDr(cwd, featureFlags) {
  if (!featureFlags.ADO_DETECTION) return { hasAzureDevOps: false, hasGitHub: false };

  let { gitRoot, found } = await Ra(cwd);
  if (!found) return { hasAzureDevOps: false, hasGitHub: false };

  let remotes = await jq(gitRoot);  // git remote -v 파싱
  // origin 우선 정렬
  let prioritized = originFirst ? [originFirst, ...rest] : remotes;

  for (let remote of prioritized) {
    let urls = [remote.FetchURL, remote.PushURL].filter(Boolean);
    for (let url of urls) {
      let parsed = gitUrlParse(url);
      // Azure DevOps 감지: dev.azure.com, vs-ssh.visualstudio.com 등
      if (!azureUrl &#x26;&#x26; NEe(parsed.resource))
        azureUrl = url;
      // GitHub 감지: github.com, *.ghe.com
      if (!hasGitHub &#x26;&#x26; YDr(parsed.resource))
        hasGitHub = true;
    }
  }
  return { hasAzureDevOps: !!azureUrl, azureDevOpsUrl: azureUrl, hasGitHub };
}
</code></pre>
<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-javascript">// git URL 파서 실패 시 정규식 폴백
function xmi(url) {
  // HTTPS: https://host:port/path
  let httpsMatch = /^https?:\/\/([^/:?#]+)(?:\d+)?(?:[/?#]|$)/.exec(url);
  if (httpsMatch?.[1]) return httpsMatch[1];
  // SSH: user@host:path
  let sshMatch = /^[^@]+@([^:/\s]+):/.exec(url);
  if (sshMatch?.[1]) return sshMatch[1];
}
</code></pre>

<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-javascript">function Aco(text) {
  let entries = new Map();
  for (let line of lines) {
    let status = line.split("\t")[0];
    if (status.startsWith("R"))  entries.set(path, { changeType: "renamed", oldPath });
    else if (status === "A")     entries.set(path, { changeType: "added" });
    else if (status === "D")     entries.set(path, { changeType: "deleted" });
    else                         entries.set(path, { changeType: "modified" });
  }
  return entries;
}
</code></pre>
<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-javascript">function Dat(authInfo) {
  // GHE Cloud with data residency: Gist 불가
  if (authInfo.host.endsWith(".ghe.com"))
    return { supported: false, kind: "gheCloud",
             reason: "Gists are not available for GitHub Enterprise Cloud with data residency (*.ghe.com)." };

  // Enterprise Managed Users (EMU): Gist 불가
  if (_oe(authInfo.host) &#x26;&#x26; authInfo.login?.includes("_"))
    return { supported: false, kind: "emuUser",
             reason: "Gists are not available for Enterprise Managed Users." };

  return { supported: true };
}

<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-javascript">// 60+ 캡처 → 11개 컬러 카테고리 매핑 (발췌)
const CAPTURE_COLOR_MAP = new Map([
  ["keyword",              "syntaxKeyword"],
  ["keyword.function",     "syntaxKeyword"],
  ["keyword.operator",     "syntaxOperator"],
  ["string",               "syntaxString"],
  ["comment",              "syntaxComment"],
  ["function",             "syntaxFunction"],
  ["function.call",        "syntaxFunction"],
  ["type",                 "syntaxType"],
  ["variable",             "syntaxVariable"],
  ["variable.builtin",     "syntaxConstant"],
  ["number",               "syntaxNumber"],
  ["operator",             "syntaxOperator"],
  ["punctuation",          "syntaxPunctuation"],
  ["constant",             "syntaxConstant"],
  ["tag",                  "syntaxTag"],
  ["attribute",            "syntaxAttribute"],
]);

// 계층적 폴백: "keyword.return" → "keyword" → 찾을 때까지 축소
function Umn(captureName) {
  let name = captureName.startsWith("@") ? captureName.slice(1) : captureName;
  while (name) {
    let color = CAPTURE_COLOR_MAP.get(name);
    if (color) return color;
    let dotIndex = name.lastIndexOf(".");
    if (dotIndex === -1) break;
    name = name.slice(0, dotIndex);  // "keyword.return" → "keyword"
  }
}
</code></pre>
<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-javascript">async function IGt(sourceCode, filePath) {
  // 안전 가드
  if (Pmn || !sourceCode) return [];          // 초기화 실패 시 비활성
  if (sourceCode.length > 100000) return [];  // 100KB 초과 파일 스킵

  let langDef = Mmn(filePath);               // 확장자 → 언어 매핑
  if (!langDef) return [];

  if (!(await fYi())) return [];             // tree-sitter 초기화 확인

  let language = await EYi(langDef);          // WASM 언어 로드 (캐시)
  let query = await WYi(langDef, language);   // highlight query 로드 (캐시)
  if (!query) return [];

  let parser = new SAe();
  try {
    parser.setLanguage(language);
    let tree = parser.parse(sourceCode);
    return wYi(tree, query, sourceCode);     // 캡처 → 행별 컬러 배열
  } finally {
    parser.delete();                         // WASM 메모리 해제
  }
}
</code></pre>
<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-javascript">// 변경/삭제 행의 단어 수준 diff 계산
function bco(oldLine, newLine, offset) {
  // 공통 접두사/접미사 제거
  let commonPrefixLen = 0;
  while (commonPrefixLen &#x3C; min &#x26;&#x26; oldLine[commonPrefixLen] === newLine[commonPrefixLen])
    commonPrefixLen++;

  // 단어 경계까지 확장 (/[A-Za-z0-9_$]/)
  let wordStart = expandToWordBoundary(oldLine, commonPrefixLen);

  // 변경된 부분만 추출하여 del/add 프래그먼트 생성
  return { delFragments, addFragments, cost, hasRealChange };
}

// O(n*m) 비용의 최적 쌍 매칭 (최대 200행, 40,000 쌍)
const MAX_BLOCK_SIZE = 200;        // hco
const MAX_PAIR_PRODUCT = 40000;    // aYi

function ZYi(querySource) {
  return querySource.replace(
    /\(#(?:lua-match\?|not-lua-match\?|vim-match\?|gsub!|set!|has-ancestor\?|not-has-ancestor\?|has-parent\?|not-has-parent\?|contains\?)[^)]*\)/g,
    "",
  );

<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-javascript">// 스킬 로드 시 소스별 분류 집계
function LXr(loadResult) {
  let sourceCounts = {
    project: 0,                 // 프로젝트 로컬 스킬
    inherited: 0,               // 상위에서 상속
    "personal-copilot": 0,      // Copilot 개인 스킬
    "personal-claude": 0,       // Claude 개인 스킬
    plugin: 0,                  // 플러그인 스킬
    custom: 0,                  // 커스텀 스킬
  };

  let commandCount = 0,
      userInvocableCount = 0,
      modelInvocationDisabledCount = 0;

  for (let skill of loadResult.skills) {
    sourceCounts[skill.source]++;
    if (skill.isCommand) commandCount++;
    if (skill.userInvocable) userInvocableCount++;
    if (skill.disableModelInvocation) modelInvocationDisabledCount++;
  }

  return {
    kind: "skills_loaded",
    metrics: {
      total_skill_count: loadResult.skills.length,
      project_skill_count: sourceCounts.project,
      inherited_skill_count: sourceCounts.inherited,
      personal_skill_count: sourceCounts["personal-copilot"] + sourceCounts["personal-claude"],
      plugin_skill_count: sourceCounts.plugin,
      custom_skill_count: sourceCounts.custom,
      command_count: commandCount,
      user_invocable_count: userInvocableCount,
      model_invocation_disabled_count: modelInvocationDisabledCount,
      skill_error_count: loadResult.errors.length,
      skill_warning_count: loadResult.warnings.length,
    },
  };
}
</code></pre>

getGitHubAskpassToken() {
  let askpass = process.env.GITHUB_ASKPASS;
  if (askpass) {
    let result = spawnSync(askpass, [], {
      encoding: "utf8",
      timeout: 10000,
      maxBuffer: 1048576,

<h2>Main analysis</h2>
<h1>Copilot CLI residual cross-interest analysis</h1>
<h2>Overview</h2>
<p>Copilot CLI (GitHub Copilot Coding Agent CLI) has many cross-cutting concerns that are not included in dimensions 01-12. In particular, the <strong>7-step authentication system</strong> and the <strong>tree-sitter WASM-based code analysis</strong> engine are the key differentiators of Copilot CLI.</p>
<p><strong>Source for analysis:</strong> <code>/Users/jun/Developer/codex/151_copilot_cli/decoded/</code></p>
<pre><code>핵심 파일 맵:

│   │   ├── mcp_events.js              # MCP 서버 이벤트 추적

<hr>
<h2>1. Bootstrap chain</h2>
<h3>1.1 Security constraints <code>require</code> system</h3>
<p><strong>File path:</strong> <code>/Users/jun/Developer/codex/151_copilot_cli/decoded/00_bootstrap/0000__get.js</code></p>
<p>The Copilot CLI entry point defines a custom <code>require</code> function that <strong>prevents import path escapes</strong>. This forces all <code>require</code> calls to be made only within the scope of the application directory.</p>
<pre><code class="language-javascript">// 0000__get.js — 보안 제약 require
const require = (module) => {
  let req = __rootRequire;

  // 특수 네이티브 모듈 라우팅
  if (typeof module === "string" &#x26;&#x26; module.startsWith("@img/")) {
    req = __sharpRequire;      // sharp 이미지 처리 라이브러리
  }
  if (typeof module === "string" &#x26;&#x26; module.startsWith("@teddyzhu/")) {
    req = __clipboardRequire;  // 클립보드 네이티브 바인딩
  }

  // Node.js 빌트인 모듈은 통과
  if (typeof module === "string" &#x26;&#x26; __module.isBuiltin(module)) {
    return req(module);
  }

  // 핵심 보안: 실제 경로가 앱 디렉토리 밖이면 차단
  const modulePath = __fs.realpathSync(req.resolve(module));
  const appPath = __fs.realpathSync(import.meta.dirname);
  const relativePath = __path.relative(appPath, modulePath);

  if (relativePath.startsWith("..")) {
    throw new Error(
      "Requiring module outside of application is a security concern; module: " +
        modulePath + ", app: " + appPath
    );
  }

  return req(module);
};
</code></pre>
<p><strong>Design Features:</strong></p>
<ul>
<li>Prevent symbolic link bypass attacks with <code>__fs.realpathSync</code></li>
<li>Immediately block with <code>__path.relative</code> if the relative path starts with <code>..</code></li>
<li>Provide separate <code>createRequire</code> context for <code>@img/sharp</code> and <code>@teddyzhu/clipboard</code></li>
</ul>
<h3>1.2 Webpack module system</h3>
<pre><code class="language-javascript">// 지연 초기화 팩토리 패턴
var W = (t, e) => () => (t &#x26;&#x26; (e = t((t = 0))), e);  // 일회성 팩토리
var k = (t, e) => () => (e || t((e = { exports: {} }).exports, e), e.exports);  // CommonJS 래퍼
</code></pre>
<p><strong>Core Pattern:</strong></p>
<ul>
<li><code>W()</code>: Once called, resets the factory function to <code>0</code> and returns cached results when re-invoked.</li>
<li><code>k()</code>: Ensures singleton by wrapping module with CommonJS <code>module.exports</code> pattern</li>
<li><code>Me()</code>: ESModule interop — Solve default export based on <code>__esModule</code> flag</li>
</ul>
<h3>1.3 Bootstrap sequence</h3>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">flowchart TD
    A["0000__get.js (진입점)"] --> B[보안 require 설정]
    B --> C[Webpack 모듈 시스템 초기화]
    C --> D["1358___7r.js (86KB 핵심 런타임)"]
    D --> E[인증 로드]
    E --> F[MCP 서버 시작]
    F --> G[도구 등록]
    G --> H[TUI 렌더링 시작]

    subgraph "네이티브 모듈"
        I["@img/sharp (이미지)"]
        J["@teddyzhu/clipboard (클립보드)"]
        K["keytar.node (OS 키체인)"]
    end

    B -.-> I
    B -.-> J
    E -.-> K
</code></pre>
<hr>
<h2>2. Authentication/API key management (core strengths)</h2>
<h3>2.1 Architecture Overview</h3>
<p>Copilot CLI supports <strong>7 authentication types</strong> and implements a chain pattern that searches sequentially based on priority. This is one of the most comprehensive certification schemes in the industry.</p>
<p><strong>File path:</strong> <code>/Users/jun/Developer/codex/151_copilot_cli/decoded/06_auth/1008__slash-keytar-build-api-copilot-api-github.js</code></p>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">graph TD
    A[loadAuthInfo] --> B{SDK Token?}
    B -->|COPILOT_AUTH_TOKEN| C[SDK 토큰 검증]
    B -->|없음| D{HMAC?}
    D -->|CAPI_HMAC_KEY| E[HMAC 인증]
    D -->|없음| F{API Key?}
    F -->|ANTHROPIC/OPENAI_KEY| G[API 키 인증]
    F -->|없음| H{Copilot API Token?}
    H -->|GITHUB_COPILOT_API_TOKEN| I[Copilot API 토큰]
    H -->|없음| J{GitHub Token?}
    J -->|GH_TOKEN/GITHUB_TOKEN| K[GitHub PAT 검증]
    J -->|없음| L{Keytar 저장?}
    L -->|있음| M[키체인에서 토큰 조회]
    L -->|없음| N{gh CLI?}
    N -->|gh auth| O[gh CLI 토큰 추출]
    N -->|없음| P[인증 없음]

    style C fill:#4CAF50
    style E fill:#4CAF50
    style G fill:#8BC34A
    style I fill:#8BC34A
    style K fill:#FFC107
    style M fill:#FFC107
    style O fill:#FF9800
    style P fill:#f44336
</code></pre>
<h3>2.2 Authentication type dispatch</h3>
<pre><code class="language-javascript">// Visitor 패턴 기반 인증 타입 디스패치
function a8(t, e) {
  switch (t.type) {
    case "hmac":             return e.onHMACAuthInfo(t);
    case "env":              return e.onEnvAuthInfo(t);
    case "user":             return e.onUserAuthInfo(t);
    case "gh-cli":           return e.onGhCliAuthInfo(t);
    case "api-key":          return e.onApiKeyAuthInfo(t);
    case "token":            return e.onTokenAuthInfo(t);
    case "copilot-api-token": return e.onCopilotApiTokenAuthInfo(t);
    default:
      throw new Error(`unexpected auth info type: ${JSON.stringify(t)}`);
  }
}
</code></pre>
<h3>2.3 Priority Chain</h3>
<pre><code class="language-javascript">getPrioritizedAuthMethods(includeAllTokens) {
  let methods = [];
  // 1. SDK 토큰 (authTokenEnvVar 설정 시)
  if (this.config.authTokenEnvVar)
    methods.push(this.trySdkTokenLogin.bind(this));

  if (!this.config.disableAutoLogin) {
    methods.push(this.tryHMACLogin.bind(this));          // 2. HMAC
    methods.push(this.tryApiKeyLogin.bind(this));         // 3. API 키
    methods.push(this.tryCopilotApiTokenLogin.bind(this)); // 4. Copilot API
    methods.push(this.tryGitHubTokenLogin.bind(this));     // 5. PAT
    methods.push(                                           // 6. 키체인
      includeAllTokens
        ? this.getAllGitHubLoginTokens.bind(this)
        : this.tryLoginToken.bind(this)
    );
    methods.push(this.tryGhCliTokenLogin.bind(this));      // 7. gh CLI
  }
  return methods;
}
</code></pre>
<h3>2.4 Keytar native bindings</h3>
<pre><code class="language-javascript">// keytar.node — 플랫폼별 네이티브 키체인 접근
function x9s() {
  // 프리빌드 경로 탐색 순서
  var t = "prebuilds/" + process.platform + "-" + process.arch;
  var e = ["../build/Release", "../" + t, "./" + t];
  for (var n of e) {
    var r = S9s(n);
    if (r) return r;    // 첫 번째 성공한 바이너리 사용
  }
  throw new Error("Failed to load keytar native addon");
}

<h3>2.5 Token storage strategy (dual path)</h3>
<pre><code class="language-javascript">// 토큰 저장: keytar 우선, 실패 시 설정 파일 폴백
async storeToken(token, host, login, configPath) {
  if (!token) throw new Error("No token provided to store");
  let key = `${host}:${login}`;

  // 설정에서 평문 저장 모드 확인
  if ((await ir.load(configPath))?.store_token_plaintext)
    return (await storeCurrentTokenInConfig(host, login, configPath), true);

  // keytar 시도
  try {
    let keytar = await PQ();
    return (await jQ(keytar.setPassword("copilot-cli", key, token)), true);
  } catch {
    return false;  // keytar 실패 시 false 반환 (설정 파일 폴백 아님!)
  }
}
</code></pre>
<p><strong>Design Decision:</strong></p>
<ul>
<li>If the <code>store_token_plaintext</code> setting is true, the plaintext is stored in the <code>copilot_tokens</code> object in the configuration file.</li>
<li>Default path: OS Keychain (macOS Keychain, Windows Credential Vault, Linux Secret Service)</li>
<li>Keytar can be completely disabled with the <code>COPILOT_DISABLE_KEYTAR</code> environment variable.</li>
</ul>
<h3>2.6 GitHub PAT token verification</h3>
<pre><code class="language-javascript">async tryGitHubTokenLogin() {
  let token =
    process.env.COPILOT_GITHUB_TOKEN ||
    process.env.GH_TOKEN ||
    process.env.GITHUB_TOKEN ||
    this.getGitHubAskpassToken();  // GITHUB_ASKPASS 바이너리 실행

  // Classic PAT (ghp_) 차단 — 보안상 fine-grained PAT만 허용
  if (token.startsWith("ghp_")) {
    q.error("Classic PATs are not supported.");
    return [];
  }

  // 토큰 타입별 처리
  if (token.startsWith("ghs_"))   return [envAuth];       // GitHub App 설치 토큰
  if (token.startsWith("gho_"))   return [validateUser];   // OAuth 토큰
  if (token.startsWith("ghu_"))   return [validateUser];   // User-to-server 토큰
  if (token.startsWith("github_pat_")) return [validateUser]; // Fine-grained PAT
  return [];  // 알 수 없는 토큰 타입 무시
}
</code></pre>
<p><strong>GITHUB_ASKPASS Integration:</strong></p>
<pre><code class="language-javascript">getGitHubAskpassToken() {
  let askpass = process.env.GITHUB_ASKPASS;
  if (askpass) {
    let result = spawnSync(askpass, [], {
      encoding: "utf8",
      timeout: 10000,        // 10초 타임아웃
      maxBuffer: 1048576,    // 1MB 버퍼
    });
    return result.stdout?.trim();
  }
}
</code></pre>
<h3>2.7 Multi-provider API key support</h3>
<pre><code class="language-javascript">async tryApiKeyLogin() {
  if (!x_()) return [];  // SDK 모드에서만 활성화

  if (process.env.ANTHROPIC_API_KEY)
    return [{ type: "api-key", apiKey: key, host: "https://api.anthropic.com" }];
  if (process.env.OPENAI_API_KEY)
    return [{ type: "api-key", apiKey: key, host: process.env.OPENAI_BASE_URL || "https://api.openai.com" }];
  if (process.env.AZURE_OPENAI_API_KEY)
    return [{ type: "api-key", apiKey: key, host: process.env.AZURE_OPENAI_API_ENDPOINT }];
}
</code></pre>
<h3>2.8 GHE (GitHub Enterprise) support</h3>
<pre><code class="language-javascript">function T9s(host) {
  let url = host.startsWith("https://") ? host : `https://${host}`;

  // github.com → 공용 Copilot API
  if (_oe(url))
    return { endpoints: { api: "https://api.githubcopilot.com" } };

  // *.ghe.com → 기업 Copilot API
  let match = new URL(url).hostname.match(/^(.+)\.ghe\.com$/);
  if (match)
    return { endpoints: { api: `https://copilot-api.${match[1]}.ghe.com` } };

  return { endpoints: {} };
}
</code></pre>

<h2>3. Git/VCS integration</h2>
<h3>3.1 Remote repository detection engine</h3>
<p><strong>File path:</strong> <code>/Users/jun/Developer/codex/151_copilot_cli/decoded/01_core/git/remote_hosts.js</code></p>
<p>Copilot CLI automatically detects <strong>Azure DevOps (ADO)</strong> and <strong>GitHub</strong> remotes to determine authentication and API endpoints.</p>
<pre><code class="language-javascript">async function FDr(cwd, featureFlags) {
  if (!featureFlags.ADO_DETECTION) return { hasAzureDevOps: false, hasGitHub: false };

  let { gitRoot, found } = await Ra(cwd);
  if (!found) return { hasAzureDevOps: false, hasGitHub: false };

  let remotes = await jq(gitRoot);  // git remote -v 파싱
  // origin 우선 정렬
  let prioritized = originFirst ? [originFirst, ...rest] : remotes;

  for (let remote of prioritized) {
    let urls = [remote.FetchURL, remote.PushURL].filter(Boolean);
    for (let url of urls) {
      let parsed = gitUrlParse(url);
      // Azure DevOps 감지: dev.azure.com, vs-ssh.visualstudio.com 등
      if (!azureUrl &#x26;&#x26; NEe(parsed.resource))
        azureUrl = url;
      // GitHub 감지: github.com, *.ghe.com
      if (!hasGitHub &#x26;&#x26; YDr(parsed.resource))
        hasGitHub = true;
    }
  }
  return { hasAzureDevOps: !!azureUrl, azureDevOpsUrl: azureUrl, hasGitHub };
}
</code></pre>
<p><strong>URL parsing fallback:</strong></p>
<pre><code class="language-javascript">// git URL 파서 실패 시 정규식 폴백
function xmi(url) {
  // HTTPS: https://host:port/path
  let httpsMatch = /^https?:\/\/([^/:?#]+)(?:\d+)?(?:[/?#]|$)/.exec(url);
  if (httpsMatch?.[1]) return httpsMatch[1];
  // SSH: user@host:path
  let sshMatch = /^[^@]+@([^:/\s]+):/.exec(url);
  if (sshMatch?.[1]) return sshMatch[1];
}
</code></pre>
<h3>3.2 Diff Engine</h3>
<p><strong>File path:</strong> <code>/Users/jun/Developer/codex/151_copilot_cli/decoded/11_search/1657__...highlights.js</code></p>
<p>The Copilot CLI combines <code>git diff</code> and <code>git status</code> to build a <strong>global change map</strong>.</p>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">flowchart TD
    A[kLe - 변경사항 수집] --> B{git HEAD 있음?}
    B -->|Yes| C["git diff HEAD --name-status"]
    B -->|No| D["git status --porcelain"]
    C --> E[파일별 diff 수집]
    E --> F{maxBuffer 초과?}
    F -->|Yes| G[isTruncated=true]
    F -->|No| H[diff 텍스트 저장]
    D --> I[Untracked 파일 감지]
    I --> J["?? 프리픽스 파일 읽기"]
    J --> K[합성 diff 생성]

    L["fco - 브랜치 기반 비교"] --> M{merge-base 계산}
    M --> N["remote/main..HEAD"]
    M -->|실패| O["main..HEAD"]
    O -->|실패| P[kLe 폴백]
    N --> Q[참조 기반 diff + 미추적 파일 병합]
</code></pre>
<p><strong>Key constants:</strong></p>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>constant</th>
<th>value</th>
<th>Description</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><code>_Le</code></td>
<td>5MB</td>
<td>file diff max size</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>maxBuffer</code></td>
<td>10 MB</td>
<td>git process output upper limit</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>timeout</code></td>
<td>10 seconds</td>
<td>merge-base calculation timeout</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<p><strong>Change Type Classification:</strong></p>
<pre><code class="language-javascript">function Aco(text) {
  let entries = new Map();
  for (let line of lines) {
    let status = line.split("\t")[0];
    if (status.startsWith("R"))  entries.set(path, { changeType: "renamed", oldPath });
    else if (status === "A")     entries.set(path, { changeType: "added" });
    else if (status === "D")     entries.set(path, { changeType: "deleted" });
    else                         entries.set(path, { changeType: "modified" });
  }
  return entries;
}
</code></pre>
<h3>3.3 Gist availability check</h3>
<pre><code class="language-javascript">function Dat(authInfo) {
  // GHE Cloud with data residency: Gist 불가
  if (authInfo.host.endsWith(".ghe.com"))
    return { supported: false, kind: "gheCloud",
             reason: "Gists are not available for GitHub Enterprise Cloud with data residency (*.ghe.com)." };

  // Enterprise Managed Users (EMU): Gist 불가
  if (_oe(authInfo.host) &#x26;&#x26; authInfo.login?.includes("_"))
    return { supported: false, kind: "emuUser",
             reason: "Gists are not available for Enterprise Managed Users." };

  return { supported: true };
}
</code></pre>

<h2>4. Search Engine — Tree-sitter WASM</h2>
<h3>4.1 Architecture</h3>
<p>Copilot CLI performs structural code analysis using <strong>tree-sitter WASM</strong> in addition to <code>ripgrep</code>. This is one of the most sophisticated code understanding infrastructures among CLI agents.</p>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">graph TD
    A[소스 파일] --> B{확장자 매칭}
    B --> C[언어별 WASM 모듈 로드]
    C --> D[tree-sitter Parser.parse]
    D --> E[highlight query 실행]
    E --> F[AST 캡처]
    F --> G[시맨틱 컬러 매핑]
    G --> H[TUI diff 렌더링]

    I["17개 WASM 바이너리"] -.-> C
    J["SCM query 파일"] -.-> E
</code></pre>
<h3>4.2 Supported language table</h3>
<pre><code class="language-javascript">const LANGUAGE_DEFINITIONS = [
  { name: "typescript",  extensions: ["ts", "mts", "cts"],    wasmFile: "tree-sitter-typescript.wasm" },
  { name: "tsx",         extensions: ["tsx"],                  wasmFile: "tree-sitter-tsx.wasm" },
  { name: "javascript",  extensions: ["js", "jsx", "mjs", "cjs"], wasmFile: "tree-sitter-javascript.wasm" },
  { name: "python",      extensions: ["py", "pyi", "pyw"],    wasmFile: "tree-sitter-python.wasm" },
  { name: "go",          extensions: ["go"],                   wasmFile: "tree-sitter-go.wasm" },
  { name: "rust",        extensions: ["rs"],                   wasmFile: "tree-sitter-rust.wasm" },
  { name: "ruby",        extensions: ["rb", "rake", "gemspec"], wasmFile: "tree-sitter-ruby.wasm" },
  { name: "java",        extensions: ["java"],                 wasmFile: "tree-sitter-java.wasm" },
  { name: "c",           extensions: ["c", "h"],               wasmFile: "tree-sitter-c.wasm" },
  { name: "cpp",         extensions: ["cpp", "cc", "cxx", "hpp", "hxx", "h++"], wasmFile: "tree-sitter-cpp.wasm" },
  { name: "csharp",      extensions: ["cs"],                   wasmFile: "tree-sitter-c_sharp.wasm" },
  { name: "bash",        extensions: ["sh", "bash", "zsh"],    wasmFile: "tree-sitter-bash.wasm" },
  { name: "json",        extensions: ["json", "jsonc"],        wasmFile: "tree-sitter-json.wasm" },
  { name: "html",        extensions: ["html", "htm"],          wasmFile: "tree-sitter-html.wasm" },
  { name: "css",         extensions: ["css"],                  wasmFile: "tree-sitter-css.wasm" },
  { name: "php",         extensions: ["php"],                  wasmFile: "tree-sitter-php.wasm" },
  { name: "scala",       extensions: ["scala", "sc"],          wasmFile: "tree-sitter-scala.wasm" },
];
</code></pre>
<h3>4.3 Semantic Capture → Color Mapping</h3>
<p>Convert the tree-sitter's highlight query capture names to color names for TUI rendering:</p>
<pre><code class="language-javascript">// 60+ 캡처 → 11개 컬러 카테고리 매핑 (발췌)
const CAPTURE_COLOR_MAP = new Map([
  ["keyword",              "syntaxKeyword"],
  ["keyword.function",     "syntaxKeyword"],
  ["keyword.operator",     "syntaxOperator"],
  ["string",               "syntaxString"],
  ["comment",              "syntaxComment"],
  ["function",             "syntaxFunction"],
  ["function.call",        "syntaxFunction"],
  ["type",                 "syntaxType"],
  ["variable",             "syntaxVariable"],
  ["variable.builtin",     "syntaxConstant"],
  ["number",               "syntaxNumber"],
  ["operator",             "syntaxOperator"],
  ["punctuation",          "syntaxPunctuation"],
  ["constant",             "syntaxConstant"],
  ["tag",                  "syntaxTag"],
  ["attribute",            "syntaxAttribute"],
]);

// 계층적 폴백: "keyword.return" → "keyword" → 찾을 때까지 축소
function Umn(captureName) {
  let name = captureName.startsWith("@") ? captureName.slice(1) : captureName;
  while (name) {
    let color = CAPTURE_COLOR_MAP.get(name);
    if (color) return color;
    let dotIndex = name.lastIndexOf(".");
    if (dotIndex === -1) break;
    name = name.slice(0, dotIndex);  // "keyword.return" → "keyword"
  }
}
</code></pre>
<h3>4.4 Highlighting Pipeline</h3>
<pre><code class="language-javascript">async function IGt(sourceCode, filePath) {
  // 안전 가드
  if (Pmn || !sourceCode) return [];          // 초기화 실패 시 비활성
  if (sourceCode.length > 100000) return [];  // 100KB 초과 파일 스킵

  let langDef = Mmn(filePath);               // 확장자 → 언어 매핑
  if (!langDef) return [];

  if (!(await fYi())) return [];             // tree-sitter 초기화 확인

  let language = await EYi(langDef);          // WASM 언어 로드 (캐시)
  let query = await WYi(langDef, language);   // highlight query 로드 (캐시)
  if (!query) return [];

  let parser = new SAe();
  try {
    parser.setLanguage(language);
    let tree = parser.parse(sourceCode);
    return wYi(tree, query, sourceCode);     // 캡처 → 행별 컬러 배열
  } finally {
    parser.delete();                         // WASM 메모리 해제
  }
}
</code></pre>
<h3>4.5 Diff Inline Highlighting</h3>
<pre><code class="language-javascript">// 변경/삭제 행의 단어 수준 diff 계산
function bco(oldLine, newLine, offset) {
  // 공통 접두사/접미사 제거
  let commonPrefixLen = 0;
  while (commonPrefixLen &#x3C; min &#x26;&#x26; oldLine[commonPrefixLen] === newLine[commonPrefixLen])
    commonPrefixLen++;

  // 단어 경계까지 확장 (/[A-Za-z0-9_$]/)
  let wordStart = expandToWordBoundary(oldLine, commonPrefixLen);

  // 변경된 부분만 추출하여 del/add 프래그먼트 생성
  return { delFragments, addFragments, cost, hasRealChange };
}

// O(n*m) 비용의 최적 쌍 매칭 (최대 200행, 40,000 쌍)
const MAX_BLOCK_SIZE = 200;        // hco
const MAX_PAIR_PRODUCT = 40000;    // aYi
</code></pre>
<h3>4.6 SCM Query Sanitization</h3>
<pre><code class="language-javascript">// Vim/Lua 전용 쿼리 프레디킷 제거 (표준 tree-sitter에서 미지원)
function ZYi(querySource) {
  return querySource.replace(
    /\(#(?:lua-match\?|not-lua-match\?|vim-match\?|gsub!|set!|has-ancestor\?|not-has-ancestor\?|has-parent\?|not-has-parent\?|contains\?)[^)]*\)/g,
    "",
  );
}
</code></pre>

<h2>5. Telemetry / Observability</h2>
<h3>5.1 Skill Metrics</h3>
<p><strong>File path:</strong> <code>/Users/jun/Developer/codex/151_copilot_cli/decoded/01_core/telemetry/skills_metrics.js</code></p>
<p>It is a granular telemetry system that tracks skill calls and load.</p>
<pre><code class="language-javascript">// 스킬 호출 이벤트
function kXr(skillInvocation) {
  return {
    kind: "skill_invoked",
    properties: {
      event_id: skillInvocation.id,
      skill_name_hash: Va(skillInvocation.data.name),  // 이름 해시화 (PII 보호)
      has_allowed_tools: String(!!skillInvocation.data.allowedTools?.length),
    },
    restrictedProperties: {     // 내부 분석용 (외부 미전송)
      skill_name: skillInvocation.data.name,
      skill_path: skillInvocation.data.path,
      plugin_name: skillInvocation.data.pluginName,
      plugin_version: skillInvocation.data.pluginVersion,
    },
    metrics: {
      skill_content_length: skillInvocation.data.content.length,
      allowed_tools_count: skillInvocation.data.allowedTools?.length ?? 0,
    },
  };
}
</code></pre>
<h3>5.2 Skill Load Metrics</h3>
<pre><code class="language-javascript">// 스킬 로드 시 소스별 분류 집계
function LXr(loadResult) {
  let sourceCounts = {
    project: 0,                 // 프로젝트 로컬 스킬
    inherited: 0,               // 상위에서 상속
    "personal-copilot": 0,      // Copilot 개인 스킬
    "personal-claude": 0,       // Claude 개인 스킬
    plugin: 0,                  // 플러그인 스킬
    custom: 0,                  // 커스텀 스킬
  };

  let commandCount = 0,
      userInvocableCount = 0,
      modelInvocationDisabledCount = 0;

  for (let skill of loadResult.skills) {
    sourceCounts[skill.source]++;
    if (skill.isCommand) commandCount++;
    if (skill.userInvocable) userInvocableCount++;
    if (skill.disableModelInvocation) modelInvocationDisabledCount++;
  }

  return {
    kind: "skills_loaded",
    metrics: {
      total_skill_count: loadResult.skills.length,
      project_skill_count: sourceCounts.project,
      inherited_skill_count: sourceCounts.inherited,
      personal_skill_count: sourceCounts["personal-copilot"] + sourceCounts["personal-claude"],
      plugin_skill_count: sourceCounts.plugin,
      custom_skill_count: sourceCounts.custom,
      command_count: commandCount,
      user_invocable_count: userInvocableCount,
      model_invocation_disabled_count: modelInvocationDisabledCount,
      skill_error_count: loadResult.errors.length,
      skill_warning_count: loadResult.warnings.length,
    },
  };
}
</code></pre>

<h3>5.4 Classification of telemetry properties</h3>

<th>tier</th>
<th>field name</th>

<td><code>properties</code></td>

</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>restrictedProperties</code></td>
<td>Limited</td>
<td>For internal debugging (original value)</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<p>This dual structure simultaneously achieves PII protection and debugging efficiency.</p>
<hr>
<h2>6. Agent prompt system</h2>
<h3>6.1 Prompt structure</h3>
<p><strong>File path:</strong> <code>/Users/jun/Developer/codex/151_copilot_cli/decoded/11_search/0647__slash-code-solution-user-example-reduce-tool-file-terminal-editing-resources.js</code></p>
<p>Copilot CLI uses a structured prompting system based on XML tags:</p>
<pre><code>프롬프트 조립 순서:
1. &#x3C;tool_use_guidelines>       — 도구 사용 규칙 (rg 우선, 병렬 호출)
2. &#x3C;editing_constraints>       — 편집 규칙 (dirty worktree 존중, 비가역적 명령 금지)
3. &#x3C;exploration_and_reading_files> — 파일 탐색 규칙 (배치 읽기, 병렬화)
4. &#x3C;autonomy_and_persistence>  — 자율성 규칙 (end-to-end 완료 지향)
5. &#x3C;solution_persistence>      — 행동 편향 ("should we?" → 실행)
6. &#x3C;user_updates_spec>         — 사용자 업데이트 빈도/톤 (8 도구 호출마다)
7. &#x3C;reduce_aggressive_code_changes> — 설명 vs 변경 판별 규칙
8. &#x3C;tool_preferences>          — 셸 도구 대체 규칙 (grep, glob, view)
9. &#x3C;file_paths_for_edit_view_create> — 파일 경로 검증 규칙
10. &#x3C;preamble_messages>        — 진행 상황 공유 규칙
11. &#x3C;responses_to_users>       — 응답 형식 (GitHub Markdown)
</code></pre>
<h3>6.2 Core prompt rules</h3>
<p><strong>Tool Priority:</strong></p>
<pre><code class="language-javascript">S$e = ({ shellConfig }) => {
  let shellName = shellConfig?.shellToolName ?? "bash";
  let isPowershell = shellName === "powershell";
  return `&#x3C;tool_preferences>
Use built-in tools instead of ${shellName} tools whenever possible.
* Use the **grep** tool instead of ${isPowershell ? "`Select-String`/`findstr`" : "`grep`/`rg`"}
* Use the **glob** tool instead of ${isPowershell ? "`Get-ChildItem`/`dir`" : "`find`/`ls`"}
* Use the **view** tool instead of ${isPowershell ? "`Get-Content`" : "`cat`/`head`/`tail`"}
&#x3C;/tool_preferences>`;
};
</code></pre>
<h3>6.3 report_progress checklist</h3>
<pre><code class="language-javascript">// PR 자동화를 위한 진행 보고 규칙
const Y9t = `
* Use **report_progress** frequently to commit and push your changes to the PR.
* Use markdown checklists to track progress (- [x] completed, - [ ] pending)
* Keep the checklist structure consistent between updates
* Review the files committed by **report_progress** to ensure minimal scope
* Use .gitignore to exclude build artifacts (node_modules, dist)
`;
</code></pre>

<h2>8. Model routing</h2>
<h3>8.1 Copilot API proxy structure</h3>
<p>Copilot CLI does not directly connect to the LLM provider, but uses <strong>GitHub Copilot API</strong> as a proxying layer. This is a unique structure that handles authentication token exchange and model access control in the GitHub infrastructure.</p>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">flowchart LR
    A[Copilot CLI] --> B[api.githubcopilot.com]
    B --> C{모델 라우팅}
    C --> D[GPT-4o]
    C --> E[Claude Sonnet]
    C --> F[o3 / o4-mini]

    G["API 키 모드"] --> H[직접 Anthropic API]
    G --> I[직접 OpenAI API]
    G --> J[Azure OpenAI]
</code></pre>
<h3>8.2 SDK mode multi-provider</h3>
<p>When the <code>x_()</code> function returns true, SDK mode is activated and you can use Anthropic/OpenAI/Azure directly.</p>
<hr>
<h2>9. Error handling/recovery pattern</h2>
<h3>9.1 Tool Result Failure Structure</h3>
<pre><code class="language-javascript">function Mhe(errorMessage) {
  return {
    textResultForLlm: errorMessage,     // LLM에 전달되는 에러 메시지
    resultType: "failure",               // 실패 구분자
    error: errorMessage,                 // 상세 에러
    sessionLog: errorMessage,            // 세션 로그
    toolTelemetry: {},                   // 빈 텔레메트리
  };
}
</code></pre>
<h3>9.2 Git error defense</h3>
<pre><code class="language-javascript">// git 명령 실패 시 graceful degradation
try {
  let changes = await dYi(gitRoot);     // git diff HEAD
} catch (error) {
  if (error instanceof Error) {
    let msg = error.message.toLowerCase();
    if (msg.includes("not a git repository") ||
        msg.includes("fatal: bad revision") ||
        msg.includes("unknown revision or path not in the working tree") ||
        msg.includes("fatal: ambiguous argument 'head'"))
    {
      return await Omn(gitRoot);        // git status로 폴백
    }
  }
  throw error;
}
</code></pre>
<h3>9.3 maxBuffer exceeding processing</h3>
<pre><code class="language-javascript">// diff가 5MB를 초과하면 truncated 마킹
try {
  let { stdout } = await HM("git", ["diff", ref, "--no-color"], {
    maxBuffer: 5 * 1024 * 1024,
  });
} catch (error) {
  if (error.message.includes("maxBuffer"))
    return { diff: "", isTruncated: true };
  throw error;
}
</code></pre>
<hr>
<h2>10. IDE Integration</h2>
<h3>10.1 GITHUB_ASKPASS integration</h3>
<pre><code class="language-javascript">// IDE가 GITHUB_ASKPASS를 설정하면 토큰을 동기적으로 교환
getGitHubAskpassToken() {
  let askpass = process.env.GITHUB_ASKPASS;
  if (askpass) {
    let result = spawnSync(askpass, [], {
      encoding: "utf8",
      timeout: 10000,
      maxBuffer: 1048576,
    });
    return result.stdout?.trim();
  }
}
</code></pre>
<p>Through this, authentication tokens are automatically exchanged in IDE environments such as VS Code and Codespace.</p>
<h3>10.2 MCP-based tool integration</h3>
<p>Copilot CLI provides GitHub API tools by embedding <code>github-mcp-server</code>:</p>
<ul>
<li><code>summarize_job_log_failures</code> — CI failure diagnosis</li>
<li><code>get_job_logs</code> — CI log query</li>
<li><code>issue_read</code> — Read issues/comments</li>
</ul>

<h3>Key findings</h3>
<ol>
<li>
<p><strong>Security-first bootstrap</strong>: Overriding <code>require</code> to physically block loading of modules outside the app directory is a level of defense that is difficult to find in other CLI agents.</p>
</li>
<li>
<p><strong>7-type authentication chain</strong>: HMAC, SDK token, API key (Anthropic/OpenAI/Azure), Copilot API token, GitHub PAT, keytar, gh CLI — it has the most comprehensive authentication system.</p>
</li>
<li>
<p><strong>Explicitly block Classic PAT (ghp_)</strong>: Only fine-grained PAT, OAuth tokens, and GitHub App tokens are allowed, and Classic PAT is rejected for security reasons.</p>
</li>
<li>
<p><strong>Use of tree-sitter WASM</strong>: Unlike Aider, which uses tree-sitter for code map (RepoMap), Copilot CLI specializes in diff highlighting (TUI rendering).</p>
</li>
<li>
<p><strong>GitHub Copilot API Proxy</strong>: A structure that goes through the Copilot API rather than the LLM API directly, and authentication-routing-access control is integrated and managed in the GitHub infrastructure.</p>
</li>
<li>
<p><strong>Dual telemetry layer</strong>: Separation of <code>properties</code> (hash) + <code>restrictedProperties</code> (sic) to achieve PII protection and debugging simultaneously.</p>
</li>
</ol>
